title: Absolutely fabulous, a real ski hotel next to the valley station (and the apres ski) of Kreischberg
positive_comment: The Gasthof is clean, the room was also very neat. Both the breakfast and the dinner was very delicious and the menu selection was divers. On of us has gluten intolerancy, it was handled in minutes and we got gluten free bread freshly baked!

The location is excellent, next to the lift and bars.
Good breakfast and dinner, kind staff.

We really liked the food, both breakfasts and dinners offered wide variety of food selection of really good quality. Dinners were truly delicious. Rooms are spacious enough with sufficient storage space even in the bathroom.
negative_comment: Rooms were quite warm even when the heating was down.

Pályaszállás, kedves magyar személyzet, kiváló konyha
negative_comment: Emeletes ágy nagyon nyikorgott.

title: vrlo dobro za kraći period
positive_comment:
Lokacija je najbolja, hrana isto odlična!
Osoblje ljubazno!
negative_comment: npr da ima više sadržaja osim saune

positive_comment: A szálloda elhelyezkedése, az ágy, a reggeli és az ízletes vacsora a kiváló és különleges desszertekkel. A szakácsot, a fiatal pincéreket és a recepcióst külön kiemelnénk, nagyon jó és pozitív emléket hagytak bennünk.
negative_comment: A folyamatosan kellemetlen szag a szobai mellékhelyiségben, hiányzott egy mini hűtőszekrény a szobából, valamint a szálloda bejáratához felvezető lépcső állapota.

positive_comment: Nagyon kedves személyzet, finom ételek. A szobák tökéletesek egy sítrip-re a haverokkal.

Igazi hagyományos osztrák alpesi vendégház fa belsővel, kitűnő konyhával, udvarias és segítőkész személyzettel, kulturált szobákkal, fűtött sítárolóval, tökéletes helyszínen. A konyha hagyományos alapon korszerű osztrák és magyar fogásokat kínál svédasztalos rendszerben, pincérekkel, este Stube. Saját parkoló, működő wifi. Szauna az árban.
negative_comment: Minden tetszett, nagyon jól éreztük magunkat két kicsivel.

title: Családias, hangulatos, magyon
positive_comment: Hangulatos, családias szállás. Tökéletes azoknak egy meghitt kedves panzió hangulatára várnak. Finom ennivalo, kedvesség. Biztosan visszatérünk még.
negative_comment: Minimális apróság: Sotetito függöny jól jött volna, mert a kinti fények bevilagitanak.

positive_comment: Nice, clean, well equipped, good wellness, nice bar and food.
The hotel is nice and close to ski resorts. The breakfast and the dinner was satisfying, the staff was also kind.
negative_comment: I would strongly recommend reconsidering the wellness area: the pool has very cold water, and especially during the winter it is not comfortable. In addition, I would recommend changing the sauna concept (now it is adults only). The food was fine, but wider assortment would be better.

title: We are very satisfied with the hotel.
positive_comment:
The staff was very freindly and helpful, especially in the restaurant. They tried to do their best to fulfill your requests.
Foods are tasty. There are plenty of facilities and services: parking place, gym, swimming pool, saunna, washing room, ski stuff storage, etc.

title: Nice, peaceful hotel at a great location
positive_comment: Great location, spacious rooms, nice breakfast, nice staff.
negative_comment:
Dinner could have been better, but it was still OK.
I was missing a jacuzzi.
The pool was quite cold, but warm enough for swimming.

title: If you want to get away from it all, this is the place
positive_comment: Great hotel in small village. Typical Austrian Hospitality
negative_comment: Bartender was grumpy

title: Great experience with a few minor drawbacks
positive_comment:
We had a great stay at this hotel! The entire place was extremely clean, and the staff was not only very nice but also incredibly helpful, making our experience even better. The hotel is well-equipped, providing everything we needed.

The breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of options to suit different tastes.
negative_comment:
One downside was that the room we received was different from what was shown in the pictures, which was a bit disappointing.

The dinner could have been better. Almost every dish contained paprika and onion, which might not be to everyone’s liking. While we fully support minimizing food waste, it felt like the dinner menu was designed based on leftover ingredients from breakfast rather than a well-thought-out selection.

positive_comment: A great team working to make sure everyone was looked after

title: Generally it was good. Nice foods, wellness, drinks. I would give 4 out of 5 stars because of the parking experience, bu
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, one of our best stays in austria! Delicious foods in the restaurant, clean rooms, nice wellness facility.
negative_comment:
Out of all the goods there were only two things we did not like:
- Food varieties
- Parking

The food was super delicious but the breakfast was essentially always the same, and I would have loved if I saw some fantasy in the dinner.

The parking was ok, but it is not convenient/comfortable at all. Asking 6 euros/day for this parking experience is not fair. The hotel is fully booked and the best case if there is one parking spot for each room.. If you arrive late your only options will be the 2 parking spots right next to the walls, left from the entrance. These spots are so tight that I cant even open the door on either sides.

title: Perfect ski getaway 🎿
positive_comment: Everything was perfect - from the location, staff, rooms, food.. everything! Will be back 🙌🎿
Very nice hotel with lovely wellness area, climbing wall, cozy lobby bar and dog friendly rooms. Breakfast and dinner were good with gluten free options.
negative_comment: A tea/coffee maker would be a nice to have in the rooms.

positive_comment: El desayuno y las habitaciones remodeladas, así como la ubicación.

positive_comment:
Stanza bellissima,11 esimo piano 
Vista stupenda e pulizia impeccabile
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Super Tolles Wochenende!
positive_comment: Die Lage des Hotels war optimal - sehr zentral gelegen! vor dem Hotel gibt es die Möglichkeit eine Elektroauto-Ladestation zu nutzen. Die hoteleigene Garage (kostenpflichtig - aber jeden Cent wert) haben wir sehr gerne genutzt. man kann mit der Zimmerkarte immer wieder ein- und ausfahren. Das Hotel macht einen sehr modernen Eindruck. das Personal ist sehr bemüht und sehr freundlich. Das Frühstück und Abendessen (wir hatten HP) waren sehr gut und täglich abwechselnd. Die Zimmer sehr sauber. das gesamte Hotel eigentlich sehr übersichtlich aufgebaut. der Indoor-Pool ist eine tolle Angelegenheit und für Kids traumhaft. Es gibt auch eine Saunalandschaft. Wir kommen gerne wieder!
negative_comment: wir konnten nichts negatives feststellen

positive_comment: Das Buffet beim Frühstück und Abendessen lässt keine Wünsche offen. Das gesamte Personal ist sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend.  Das Schwimmbad und der Fitnessraum sind schon ab 7 Uhr Früh geöffnet. Das Spielezimmer mit Kletterwand hat unseren Kindern sehr gefallen. Tischtennis kann man auch spielen, die Schläger können ausgeborgt werden. In der Umgebung gibt es zahlreiche Ausflugsziele.

title: Für eine erholsame Auszeit zu betriebsam
positive_comment: Sehr freundliches Personal, sehr sauber, Essen gut.
negative_comment:
Man spürt dass das Gebäude ursprünglich nicht als Hotel konzipiert wurde es wirkt klinisch. 
Es gab sehr viele lärmende Kinder besonders im Hallenbad des Wellnessbereiches.

title: Wir würden wieder kommen.
positive_comment: Hell, sauber, ruhig. Angenehme Sauna. Schöne Halle mit Leseecke. Freundliches Personal. Kosmetik im Haus. Geräumiges Zimmer mit Balkon und Blick auf das Stift. Genügend Platz für alle Gäste.
negative_comment: Schwimmbad eher klein und ständig von Kindern besetzt. Aber das ist bei einem Familienhotel zu erwarten.p

title: Perfekter Aufenthalt
positive_comment: Sehr gutes Frühstücksangebot sowie auch sehr gutes Angebot zum Abendbuffet, sehr nettes Personal, angenehmer SPA-Bereich,

title: Sehr angenehmer Aufenthalt
positive_comment: Sehr gutes und reichhaltiges Frühstückbuffet, angenehmer SPA-Bereich, sehr gutes Abendbuffet, freundliche Bedienung.
Schön ausgestattet, Bad mit Wanne, Wasserbetten im allgemeinen Ruhebereich, freundliches Personal
negative_comment: Saunaöffnungszeiten

positive_comment: Das Personal im Speisesaal, sowie der Bar war sehr sehr freundlich.

Das gesamte Hotel ist in einem überaus gepflegten Zustand. Der Umstand, dass es sich um ein ehemaliges Krankenhaus handelt kommt positiv zum Tragen, da es hier keine engen Hotelflure gibt, sondern alles schön weit und luftig ist. Das Personal war durchweg freundlich und hilfsbereit, das Angebot über die Feiertage, insbesondere für Kinder, vielfältig.

title: Schön,
positive_comment: Angenehmer Gym und Spa-Bereich, sehr sauber, gut eingerichtet, groß und hell.
negative_comment: Das Abendessen war leider nicht besonders gut.

title: Un lugar emblemático con instalaciones muy actuales
positive_comment:
Precioso. Bien situado 
Gran atención y amabilidad

title: Una estancia inolvidable
positive_comment: La ubicación, las habitaciones y el personal todos en general pero, la conserjería, con Víctor y una chica argentina en el desayuno, ambos estupendos.
negative_comment: Nada

title: Ha superado mis expectativas
positive_comment: La atención del personal, el silencio auque sea muy centrico y en una calle muy comercial

title: Linda Visita en Viena
positive_comment:
El hotel es bello, lleno de historia. Excelentes camas, almohadas y plumones.
Servicio excepcional. Todos muy amables.
Excelente ubicación
negative_comment:
Creo que ha cambiado algunas cosas.
Antiguamente funcionaban los TV en el baño, si no funcionan, deberían retirarlos. La calidad de los ameneties bajo. Loción de cuerpo no es la antigua, los jabones más pequeños.
El desayuno también bajo de calidad.

title: Iconic hotel with amazing service and premier location
positive_comment: We loved the history and sense of tradition and the welcoming staff! Staff would go over and above to ensure that our requests or needs, were not only met but in some cases, anticipated.
negative_comment: Line of tourists at hotel cafes.

title: A very special place to stay.
positive_comment: Beautiful, luxurious property in central location.  Excellent breakfast.  Loved the blue cocktail lounge.  This was a great place to begin the evening with friends.
negative_comment: Nothing not to like.

positive_comment: Great hotel for unforgettable experience in Vienna. It was a great journey

title: Very good and attentive service staff during breakfast.
positive_comment: Very well appointed. Lovely room with a direct view of the Albertina. Very convenient distance to the main shopping strip.
negative_comment: Very poor first impression when doorman slammed our luggage against the door.

title: The attention to detail by the staff was fantastic, customer service is clearly the priority and it shows.
positive_comment: It is a jewel box of a hotel just absolutely beautiful inside. Very well located in the centre of everything. Staff rush to greet you - you are made to feel like this is your home.
negative_comment: I liked everything

title: Vienna. Full stop.
positive_comment: Nothing much to dislike. The staff were lovely and attentive. Especially the concierge and Grüne Bar staff. The anniversary gift they left for us was the icing on the cake. So lovely.
negative_comment: Not much. Wish it had been left with more of the original woodwork and patine, but I get it.

title: Kommen wieder
positive_comment: Frühstück und Lage könnten nicht besser sein. Beim Abendessen am 19. waren die Schnitzel optimal,besser als im Sacher, das Ambiente und die Hintergrundmusik eher trist.

title: Meraviglioso
positive_comment:
La ricercatezza dei particolari ,la raffinatezza degli ambienti .
Entrando ho avuto la sensazione meravigliosa di entrare in una casa di lusso non in un hotel.

Die nähe zum lift, personal unvorstellbar freundlich, freundlicher Empfang beim Ankommen, freundliche Bedienung u zuvorkommend. Alles wurde genauestens erklärt. Sehr sehr gutes Frühstück und perfektes Abendbuffet. Kommen auf jeden Fall wieder

title: War ein paar schöne Schitage, in perfekter Lage.
positive_comment:
Das Frühstück und das Abendessen war ausreichend und gut.
Die Lage zu Lift ist perfekt. Das Zimmer war sauber und die Größe optimal.
negative_comment: war alles gut

positive_comment: sehr gepflegtes 3 Sterne Hotel. direkt an der Piste.
negative_comment:
Personal hatte eher Probleme mit dem deutsch. 
Ungarisch kein Problem.
ist halt doch Urlaub in Österreich.

title: Ausgezeichnete Lage beim Lift, für eine 3-Sterne Unterkunft o.k. aber etwas zu teuer!
positive_comment: Die Lage des Kellerschlössels ist direkt an der Talstation, Parkplätze für die Gäste sind vorhanden, ebenso ein Raum für die Schi und die Schischuhe (beheizt), 2 Saunen kostenlos zu benützen. Ausstattung für ein 3-Stern-Hotel ist in Ordnung. Frühstück und Abendessen in reicher Auswahl vorhanden
negative_comment: Müsli beim Frühstück fehlt, Fernsehkanäle größtenteils nur in ungarischer Sprache (wohl wegen der vielen ungarischen Gäste am Kreischberg ...) - kein ORF Programm und auch kein Servus-Kanal.

title: Beste Lage zur Talstation, Unterkunft empfehlenswert
positive_comment: HP: Frühstück war sehr gut und vielfältig. Abendessen mit 2 versch. Suppen, 3 Hauptspeisen inkl. salat und als Nachspeise versch. Desserts

Die Lage ist einzigartig.
Es wurde uns eine extra vegetarische Platte serviert.
Frühstück ist vielfältig und ausreichend.
negative_comment: Wenn man später zu Abendessenbuffet kommt, kann schon etwas aus sein, das dann nicht mehr nachgebracht wird.

title: Sehr schön
positive_comment:
Wir hatten zwei tolle Tage in Ohrid!
Haben sogar ein Upgrade bekommen und hatten einen traumhaften Blick auf die Stadt!
Gemeinsame Küche war gut ausgestattet.
negative_comment: Parkplatz könnte im der Hochsaison tricky werden!

title: Struttura pulita e accogliente.
positive_comment:
Della struttura ho apprezzato soprattutto la pulizia, sia della camera che delle aree comuni. Molto comodo anche il parcheggio nel garage sotterraneo. Il personale è sempre stato disponibile ed educato: qualunque richiesta è stata accolta senza problemi. Abbiamo trovato molto buono anche il cibo del ristorante. La struttura è assolutamente adatta alle famiglie con bambini. La stanza dedicata ai più piccoli è davvero bella, con una parete di arrampicata che mia figlia ha adorato.
La struttura dispone di tutto l’occorrente per rilassarsi e tenersi in forma: palestra, piscina e una bella area spa.
negative_comment: Per quanto riguarda gli aspetti meno positivi, la piscina è risultata piuttosto piccola e le sdraio disponibili non erano sufficienti rispetto al numero di ospiti. Durante il nostro soggiorno, l’acqua delle piscine era fredda, rendendo difficile il bagno, soprattutto per i bambini più piccoli. Inoltre, il personale della reception non parlava italiano, il che in alcune situazioni ha reso la comunicazione più complicata. Infine, la struttura non offre animazione né per i bambini né per gli adulti.

positive_comment: Molto bello per i bambini, dal personale, alla cena alla piscina

title: Rilassante
positive_comment: Struttura molto bella con sala fitness piscina e centro benessere, e spazi esterni per rilassarsi. Comodo parcheggio sotterraneo
negative_comment: C’ero già stato nel 2017 e all’epoca il ristorante era all’altezza dell’hotel. Adesso no, poca scelta e la cucina chiude prestissimo la sera. Solo la colazione resta ottima

title: Posto dove rilassarsi e rigenerarsi!
positive_comment:
Albergo situato nel centro di St. Lambrecht.
Struttura con molti servizi per le famiglie, stanza giochi, parete arrampicata, tavolo da ping pong e servizio baby sitter. Piscina bellissima e zona Spa curata e molto pulita.
Colazione continentale abbondante a buffet e cena con ampia scelta.
Stanza familiare ampia con letto matrimoniale e divano letto per i ragazzi.
Molto apprezzato e comodo il book disponibile in reception con le escursioni e posti da visitare nelle vicinanze o nel raggio di 30 km dalla struttura.
negative_comment: Proporrei di avere il menù anche in lingua inglese, non solo in tedesco.

positive_comment: Nice, clean, well equipped, good wellness, nice bar and food.
The hotel is nice and close to ski resorts. The breakfast and the dinner was satisfying, the staff was also kind.

title: Hotel precioso en Viena
positive_comment:
El hotel es una maravilla, realmente precioso, con una estética cuidada y muy bien situado. 
Las habitaciones que reservamos (Suite Sisi e Imperial) eran enormes, con camas y almohadas cómodas y estaban contiguas, lo que nos agradó mucho para estar juntos los 4. El personal del hotel resolvió nuestras dudas y peticiones, fue muy agradable y gentil. Diariamente revisan y reponen agua y café en las habitaciones.
El desayuno nos encantó, el bar del hotel tiene los precios del alojamiento, si bien la calidad es alta.
negative_comment:
Nos gustó todo, sin embargo quizás podrían mejorar algo los baños para estar completamente a altura de la Suite, al igual que la cantidad y calidad de los amenities que proporcionan. 
La suite Imperial no tenía balcón, pensé por las fotos que si había, quizás al estar en la planta primera esta Suite en concreto no disponía de balcón, por lo demás, todo genial.

title: Volveremos!!
positive_comment: Estuve en El Imperial hace 64 años, Y EL HOTEL LO TENÍA APUNTADO! Me trataron de modo especial, habitación extra grande y lujosa, regalos del gerente…en fin, sólo un hotel de primerísima clase como EL IMPERIAL tiene ese trato con sus clientes fieles.
negative_comment: Todo me gustó!!

positive_comment: La amabilidad en una especie de cariño al recibir y como un viajero de un país ajeno hacerle gran atención de su personal
negative_comment: Que me tuve que ir

title: Perfecto
positive_comment: Puedo decir sólo lo mejor. Las instalaciones increíbles, llenas de historia. Las habitaciones tenían todo lo que uno necesitaba, el desayuno una maravilla. Todos muy amables.

title: Hotel espléndido
positive_comment:
El hotel es precioso, el personal agradable , la señora de la limpieza muy simpática y atenta. Casi todas las noches cenábamos allí y la comida es exquisita. 
Es la habitación más silenciosa q he estado, no se se escuchaba ningún ruido.
negative_comment:
En el baño tardaba en salir el agua caliente, tenías q tener un buen rato el grifo abierto. La puerta del baño para cerrarla tenías q dar un portazo porque sino se abría sola.
La puerta de la habitación sino te dabas cuenta se cerraba de un golpe muy fuerte , debería tener algún retenedor para que no de ese portazo.

Probablemente el mejor hotel de 5 estrellas que hemos estado. Nada era un problema y no era nada ostentoso. Estabas relajado pero te sentías muy respetado.

title: Easy acces, clean and modern
positive_comment: The eMotel is really easily accesible from the main road and the motorway and there is a lot of free parking spaces in front of the building. Check in is very practical as well - self check in via an ekiosk in the lobby right next to the entrance door. The room was spacious, very clean and modern. The quality of service and price ratio is okay.

Convenient location, modern and clean lobby and room, not noisy despite the close proximity of the highway, and I also found the self-check in convenient (even though it did not accept our documents so a lot of data had to be entered manually).
negative_comment: The only thing I did not like was that while we had a good wifi connection when we arrived in the middle of the night, the wifi did not work at all in the morning.

positive_comment: We stayed for a night while crossing through Germany. The location was extra convenient for us as the motorway was a minute away. The check-in, room, and environment were extremely great and easy. We will most likely visit again the next time we drive through Germany.

title: Brilliant place to stay
positive_comment:
The view from the top room was stunning. 
They had communal area which had a kitchen and seating area, which was nice area to relax having breakfast or in an evening. 
Veritsa was very helpful and accommodating throughout our stay. She was helpful with recommendations and booked us a taxi back to the airport when needed.

Everything was just fantastic, loved the view from the terrace and could see a glimpse of Lake Ochrid from the room. Room was also nicely decorated.
I loved that there was a communal kitchenette for guests. Lovely gesture.

The host was also really friendly; she has even offered to make us coffee when making herself one.
negative_comment: Cleanliness in general was perfect but I am being a bit picky there were few hair left behind after cleaning.

title: Amazing view! Great location.
positive_comment: The house is beautifully presented and spotless. Well equipped, comfortable and perfect location for quiet retreat. The owner have thought of everything. Wished I could have a time to enjoy the garden. Couldn't have wished for anything better.

title: Ein sauberes und freundlich gestaltetes Hotel. Passend für die Durchreise.
positive_comment: Beim Check-In hatte ich Schwierigkeiten mit der Erfassung am Terminal. Neben dem Terminal befindet sich eine Klingel mit einer Verbindung zum Personal. Die Mitarbeiterin war sehr, sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit und hatte mir dann alles geduldig und freundlich erklärt. Ein wahrer Pluspunkt. Dankeschön nochmals.

Der unkomplizierte check-in. 
Es gab auch eine sofortige telefonische Unterstützung bei Unklarheiten.

title: Empfehlenswert

positive_comment:
Der online Check-in funktionierte reibungslos. Der Check-in Automat am Eingangsbereich war mehrsprachig und einfach zu bedienen. 
Die Zimmer waren sehr sauer und einladend. 

Im Eingangsbereich gab es Automaten mit Sandwiches, Getränken und Snacks. 

Lage sehr gut mit Einkaufsmöglichkeiten, Restaurants und Nahe der Autobahn.

 Gerne wieder. Sehr zu empfehlen!

title: Perfekte Unterkunft für Zwischenübernachtung
positive_comment:
Super Anbindung. Zimmer sind ausserordentlich sauber und hat unsere Erwartung übertroffen.
Perfekt für eine Zwischenübernachtung. Einfacher Self-Checkin (noch einfacher, wenn man sich vorher registriert).
Gut durchdachtes Hotelkonzept.
Alles in der Nähe, was man braucht. 
Tipp fürs Frühstück: Taverne, die sich nicht weit vom Hotel befindet. Super nette Bedienung und sehr leckeres Frühstück.

title: Ziemlich perfekt für Durchreise mit Auto. Ladestation direkt beim Hotel.
positive_comment: Super praktisch. Alles automatisiert. Schöner Kaffeeraum für morgens. Super gelegen (kurz nach Autobahnabfahrt Trieben), also perfekt für Durchreisende. Bonus für Elektrofahrzeuge: Teslay Supercharger sowie via ENBW direkt beim Hotel !!

title: Immer wieder gerne
positive_comment: Gute Lage, sauber und für eine Nacht unkompliziert und gut
negative_comment: Scanner des Automaten, funktionierte nicht

title: Bin sehr zufrieden,komme wieder!
positive_comment: Super Lage,sehr sauber und bequem.Ideal für Durchreise.

Das Hotel hat eine gute Verkehrsanbindung zum Zentrum 
Sehr gutes Frühstück und freundliches ,hilfsbereiten Personal
Sehr sauber, war auch jemand vor Ort falls man Hilfe brauchte, Self Check in hat super funktioniert, Ausstattung modern und zweckmäßig, Automaten vor Ort mit Getränken und Snacks

title: Ein kurzer, gelungener Aufenthalt zu einem besonderen Anlass im Sacher in Wien.
positive_comment:
Die Lage des Hotel Sacher ist sehr zentral. Man kann alle wichtigen Sehenswürdigkeiten problemlos zu Fuß erreichen.
Unser Zimmer war geräumig (nicht riesig) mit Blick auf die Oper.
Das Frühstück bot alles, was das Herz begehrt.
Zum Geburtstag, den wir im Sacher gefeiert haben, gab es für sie ein tolles Geschenk.
Das Personal war überaus zuvorkommend und machte den Aufenthalt zu einem besonderen Erlebnis.
negative_comment: Wir fanden nichts zu beanstanden.

title: Wie immer TOP
positive_comment: Wie bisher in der Vergangenheit auch diesmal alles perfekt!
negative_comment: gar nichts!

title: Einmal Sacher immer Sacher. 👍🏻
positive_comment:
Es war ein unbeschreiblich schöner Aufenthalt. 
Mein Verlobter und ich sind mehrmals im Jahr in verschiedensten Hotels (4-6 Sterne). 
So einen durchwegs positiven Aufenthalt hatten wir noch nie. 
Das Personal ist zu jeder Zeit sehr freundlich, zuvorkommend… es spiegelt sich in allem wieder, dass der Gast „König“ ist. 
Wir haben uns sogar ertappt, als wir über die Tagesplanung sprachen das Sacher als „daheim“ zu betiteln. 
Dazu muss ich denke ich nichts mehr hinzufügen. 
Besser geht es einfach nicht.

title: Ein geradezu königlicher Aufenthalt
positive_comment: Rundum - das Sacher ist nicht zu toppen. Vom Service, Lage, Atmosphäre, Qualität. . . . einfach alles auf allerhöchstem Niveau
negative_comment: Absolut nichts

title: Sehr gut mit Abstrichen (1 minus)
positive_comment: Eine der besten Lagen in Wien! Ab hier ist alles fussläufig zu erreichen. Auch die Anbindung an die Öffentlichen ist sehr gut.
negative_comment:
Leider feht es in diesem Tophotel an dem entsprechenden guten Service. Auch die Zimmer sind gemessen an diesem Preisniveau zu teuer. wenn man 3.000,--€ pro Nacht ausgibt möchte man keine Kompromisse machen. Es sind Kleinigkeiten die die man dann auch erwartet. Der Champagner sollte mit Eiswürfeln nachgefüllt werden. Wenn der Service den Flachenöffner aus dem Zimmer räumt sollte er auch einen neuen bringen. Der Ferneher sollte richtig programmiert sein (nicht in Blindensprache), die georderten Getränke sollten ohne 2-facher Erinnerung kommen etc. Alles das erwartet man zu diesem Preis. Eben Top Klasse.
Zweifelsohne ein sehr gutes Hotel-aber es ist noch Luft nach oben!

title: Besser geht’s nicht
positive_comment: Die Unterkunft war sehr schön das Hotel hat eine top Lage das Personal ist sehr freundlich

Diseño sencillo pero moderno. Extremadamente limpio y cómodo. Definitivamente no es una ubicación para quedarse varios días de vacaciones, pero perfecto para pasar una noche si estás de paso con el coche.
negative_comment: Hice una reserva para varias habitaciones individuales y obtener todas las tarjetas en la máquina de la entrada para acceder a las habitaciones con una sola reserva fué un poco complicado, aunque todo se solucionó muy rápidamente llamando al número de teléfono que facilitaban en caso de problemas. La atención fué excelente.

title: transit hotel with an automated checkin of 30 min
positive_comment: The place is quite new and good for transit, safe parking in the back, village nearby has great breakfasts
negative_comment: Calculate 30min for a complicated automated checkin

title: Clean,comforable, modern good sized room. Close proximity to motorway, fuel station and town
positive_comment: Location for the motorway. Location for petrol station over the road for fuel and food. Room was modern, very clean with a decent sized shower/toilet room. Shower gell and shampoo provided. Overall feel of the hotel was very and exceede our expectations.
negative_comment: The rear of the hotel for parking was initially rather off putting as it was basically ramshackle business premises, some large trucks etc, which gave a very poor feel to the place. We parked there and no problems incurred. No restaurant although a room and microwave provided for personal use. We used the local restaurant a few minutes drive down the road.

positive_comment: Excellent value for money, new, well maintained and clean
I think it's great because I was able to check in myself after 10:00 PM and get a room card. It's not a problem at all to come to the room during the night. Nice rooms and drink&food
negative_comment: Maybe on booking.com it would be better to write that you have an excellent check-in system throughout the day and night. This helps in selecting latecomers. For me this was invaluable.

title: Cheap and cheerful
positive_comment:
Decent accommodation for cheap.Free parking available around the property. Mind it's in a very quiet location.It's very close to most major roads , a Shell petrol station and  a food van within 
50 yards that's open til late (22:00 I'm not sure)
negative_comment: Self check in procedure could be challenging for some

title: Brilliant Thankyou!
positive_comment: Brilliant location right off the motorway, lovely size room & bathroom. Beautiful views in the morning and for us we found self check in/out very efficient.
negative_comment: No lock on the inside of the bedroom door, which can be a problem if traveling with small children as was worried my toddler would let himself out!

title: Easy acces, clean and modern
positive_comment: The eMotel is really easily accesible from the main road and the motorway and there is a lot of free parking spaces in front of the building. Check in is very practical as well - self check in via an ekiosk in the lobby right next to the entrance door. The room was spacious, very clean and modern. The quality of service and price ratio is okay.

Convenient location, modern and clean lobby and room, not noisy despite the close proximity of the highway, and I also found the self-check in convenient (even though it did not accept our documents so a lot of data had to be entered manually).
negative_comment: The only thing I did not like was that while we had a good wifi connection when we arrived in the middle of the night, the wifi did not work at all in the morning.

positive_comment: We stayed for a night while crossing through Germany. The location was extra convenient for us as the motorway was a minute away. The check-in, room, and environment were extremely great and easy. We will most likely visit again the next time we drive through Germany.

Las vistas al lago desde la terraza. Una pasada. La habitación estaba reformada, moderna. Y la atención del personal, un 10. Nos contaron muchas cosas sobre Ohrid, además de darnos algunas recomendaciones.
negative_comment: Nada!

positive_comment: Habitación cómoda. Hermosas vistas al Lago. Muy buena ubicación. No incluye desayuno, pero cuenta con una cocina de uso común con café y té a disposición.

The location is perfect, right in the old town of Ohrid, making it easy to explore everything on foot. The place is very beautiful and has a lovely atmosphere.
The staff was very kind, friendly, and always helpful.
Highly recommended!

Unbeatable Views in the Heart of Old Town"
​I had a wonderful stay  at Villa Dvor. The highlight was definitely the stunning view of Lake Ohrid from the room—it’s even better in person! The location is perfect for exploring the Old Town on foot, and the rooms were incredibly clean and comfortable. The hosts were very welcoming and made me feel right at home. Highly recommend!
negative_comment: N/a

title: Location, the view, the beds, everything was super. Also the hosts.

title: Staying in the tranquil old town of Ohrid
positive_comment: Beautiful views and quiet location. It was quick to walk down to the lake and the bazaar area. The old town was quiet at night and the villa had a very tranquil feeling. Friendly and helpful staff made me feel at home. The kitchen  area was fantastic to make hot drinks and to eat take out dishes. I would return there.
negative_comment: I was aware that the villa is located on a hill - thus the great views. Other guests might be put off a hill.

positive_comment: No breakfast included  but shared facility available
negative_comment: Loved the view from location

positive_comment: Hotel molto centrale, ben arredato, comodo e staff super disponibile

title: Brilliant place to stay
positive_comment:
The view from the top room was stunning. 
They had communal area which had a kitchen and seating area, which was nice area to relax having breakfast or in an evening. 
Veritsa was very helpful and accommodating throughout our stay. She was helpful with recommendations and booked us a taxi back to the airport when needed.

title: Struttura fantastica!
positive_comment: La struttura è nuovissima e molto accogliente; subito all’uscita dell’autostrada, è comodissima per chi arriva in auto come noi. Le camere sono ampie e moderne con letti comodissimi. Una nota di merito al personale: siamo arrivati alle 23 e abbiamo avuto problemi con il self check in, assolutamente non causati dalla struttura, e la persona che ci ha soccorso è stata gentilissima e ha risolto velocemente il problema permettendoci di andare in camera. Solo questo vale 1000. Se torneremo in zona, ci ricorderemo sicuramente del posto. Super consigliato!

Einfach Traumhaft. Die Lage des Hotels und die Freundlichkeit der Mitarbeiter sind einfach hervorragend. Das Ambiente des Hotels ist wie in einem Film. Abendessen und Frühstück waren hervorragend. Alles einfach TOP!!!!

title: Einer der besten Hotels im Zentrum mit Geschichte
positive_comment: Einfach alles! Komme sehr gerne ins Hotel. Frühstück sensationell und ruhig. An der Bar ist es sehr nett und eine kleine Speisekarte Karte gibt es auch. Auch das einfachste Zimmer ist sensationell.

title: Hotel Sacher Wien, höchster Standard
positive_comment: Der Service, das Ambiente, die Sauberkeit, die Speisen und vor allem das exzellente Personal, alles vom höchsten Standard.
negative_comment: Es gibt nichts, was uns nicht gefallen hätte. Es ist das Hotel Sacher in Wien, und es immer um das Wohl seiner Gäste umsorgt.

title: Immer wieder gerne. Es war nicht das erste Mal - und bestimmt nicht das letzte Mal!
positive_comment: Was soll ich sagen - es ist und bleibt das Sacher. Eines der letzten, echten Grand-Hotels.
negative_comment: Junior-Suite ohne Aussicht werde ich nicht mehr buchen. Das Zimmer ist super, der Service perfekt. Aber man hat durch die Fenster den tristen Blick auf einen kleinen “Innenhof”, wo halt alle hinblicken, die ohne Aussicht gebucht haben.

title: Per un Viaggio a Vienna Indimenticabile
positive_comment:
Tutto. Posizione, camere, comfort, cortesia e disponibilità dello staff. Tutto.
La migliore struttura in assoluto a Vienna.
Colazione eccellente, tranquilla e probabilmente ancora meglio se opzionata in camera.
negative_comment:
Qualche misunderstanding al check-in, ma gestite con professionalità dal personale dell’hotel.
Il mio consiglio, sebbene comprenda i costi, è che alcuni servizi aggiuntivi dovrebbero essere inclusi nell’offerta o per lo meno più ampiamente ammortizzati.

positive_comment: Atmosfera. Ottimo servizio ai tavoli ristorante e bar. Struttura ben mantenuta.
negative_comment: Scarsa competenza del concierge. Pochi tavoli al bar e cambio di programma bar (seratat fragole e cioccolato) senza preavviso.

positive_comment:
Das Zimmer war groß und modern möbliert. Bis in die Stadt oder zur Burg waren es nur ein kurzer Weg zu Fuß. 
Die Gastgeberin war sehr zuvorkommend und hilfsbereit.
negative_comment: Nichts

title: Tolle Lage, toller Blick - perfekt um Ohrid zu erkunden/genießen
positive_comment: Der Ausblick ist der überragend. Sehr gut gelegen und alles fußläufig erreichbar. Wir haben uns super wohl gefühlt. Ganz tolle, niedliche kleine Appartements. Eine Küche zur Benutzung ist auch vorhanden. Wir haben den Aufenthalt dort geliebt!

title: Angenehmes Zimmer und super Lage!
positive_comment: Super Lage, Supermarkt und Restaurants in der Nähe!

title: Maravilloso hotel muy bien ubicado y muy confortable

positive_comment: Location, the view, the beds, everything was super.

title: Staying in the tranquil old town of Ohrid
positive_comment: Beautiful views and quiet location. It was quick to walk down to the lake and the bazaar area. The old town was quiet at night and the villa had a very tranquil feeling. Friendly and helpful staff made me feel at home. The kitchen  area was fantastic to make hot drinks and to eat take out dishes. I would return there.
negative_comment: I was aware that the villa is located on a hill - thus the great views. Other guests might be put off a hill.

positive_comment: No breakfast included  but shared facility available
negative_comment: Loved the view from location

title: Brilliant place to stay
positive_comment:
The view from the top room was stunning. 
They had communal area which had a kitchen and seating area, which was nice area to relax having breakfast or in an evening. 
Veritsa was very helpful and accommodating throughout our stay. She was helpful with recommendations and booked us a taxi back to the airport when needed.

Everything was just fantastic, loved the view from the terrace and could see a glimpse of Lake Ochrid from the room. Room was also nicely decorated.
I loved that there was a communal kitchenette for guests. Lovely gesture.

The host was also really friendly; she has even offered to make us coffee when making herself one.
negative_comment: Cleanliness in general was perfect but I am being a bit picky there were few hair left behind after cleaning.

title: Amazing view! Great location.
positive_comment: The house is beautifully presented and spotless. Well equipped, comfortable and perfect location for quiet retreat. The owner have thought of everything. Wished I could have a time to enjoy the garden. Couldn't have wished for anything better.

title: Perfect.
positive_comment: If you ever wish to visit the Vienna opera and allow yourself the perfect place to stay almost next to the Opera house, a little luxury of a beautiful building, spacious rooms, a location in the middle of Vienna (yet windows that isolate possible noise), a breakfast that has it all... well, this is it. Ambassador, we will certainly come again!

title: A charming hotel in a great location offerring exceptional service
positive_comment: The hotel is in a great location near the opera house and some of the best shopping streets and restaurants. The staff and all services from front desk to housekeeping were exceptional. The room and bathroom were very spacious and comfortable decorated in period style. We loved our stay there and will return

title: Fantastic great hotel

title: It was a wonderful experience. I’d be happy to stay there a gain.

positive_comment: We liked everything.  The position was great, central to everything we needed.  The hotel had old world charm and was sparkling clean.  Breakfast was wonderful. Can't wait to come back .

title: A bit of grandeur in central Vienna
positive_comment: Excellent location, close to alll the museums, and places to eat. Superclean , and a lovely big room, helpful staff

title: Great location.

positive_comment: We enjoyed everything but we would like to have a coffee machine in the room. Everything else was perfect.

positive_comment:

Soft mattresses, I finally slept 😆. A buffet is available in the morning, simple but tasty.

Sofia, thank you for all the attention and kindness you have given us.

positive_comment: Eine sehr gute Lage, besonders weil wir die Oper und das Konzerthaus besuchten.

title: Ein toller Städtetripp
positive_comment: Das Hotel liegt direkt in der Einkaufsstraße und ist trotzdem sehr ruhig. Unser Zimmer war nach hinten raus gelegen. Es gibt sehr viele Restaurants und Cafés in unmittelbarer Nähe. Der Stephansdom liegt fußläufig ca. 2-3 Minuten vom Hotel entfernt. Auch die U-Bahn ist schnell zu erreichen.  Das Personal war sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Wir würden jederzeit das Hotel wieder buchen.
negative_comment: nichts

title: Es waren sehr schöne Tage und die Unterkunft hat dazu beigetragen.
positive_comment: Nettes und sehr freundliches Personal, Mitten Zentrum, das Frühstück war sehr gut, unser Zimmer war sehr sauber und es wurde jeden Tag gereinigt, es war eine sehr gepflegte Atmosphäre
negative_comment: Nichts

title: Sehr gutes und gemütliches Stadthotel mit Flair in ausgezeichneter Lage.
positive_comment:
Das Zimmer punktet mit einer außergewöhnlichen Größe - Eingangsbereich - Schlafzimmer - Wohnbereich, separates Bad.
Die Lage ist hervorragend. Frühstück habe ich nicht gebucht. Die Lounge ist gemütlich, der Barkeeper freundlich und hat exquisit beraten.
negative_comment: Kleine Espressomaschine oder Wasserkocher für Tee bzw. Kaffee zwischendurch wäre zu empfehlen.

title: Gerne wieder
positive_comment: Die Lage ist super, mitten im Geschehen. (Shoppingmeile) Nachts hört man, so gut wie nichts von draußen. Das Personal war sehr freundlich und das Hotel hält was es verspricht. Wir kommen gerne wieder
negative_comment: Es gab nichts zu beanstanden

title: Perfekt für den Trip nach Wien
positive_comment:
Beste Lage, sehr vieles fussläufig erreichbar.
Sehr reichhaltiges Frühstück, bester Service, sodass die 30€ angemessen sind.
Gut geführte Bar zu günstigen Preisen
negative_comment: Fällt uns nichts ein…..

positive_comment: Lage, Größe der Zimmer, Freundlichkeit des Personals

title: Ein Ort zum daheim fühlen.
positive_comment:
Super Lage
Sehr freundliches Personal 
Schönes Haus
negative_comment: Die Türen zum Badezimmer und zur Toilette kann man nicht offen halten, sie schlagen zu, und in der Toilette wird die Luft dann knapp.

title: Sehr gut, sehr freundliches Personal, immer wieder, wenn wir in Wien sind.
positive_comment: Sehr gute Lage in mitten der Stadt. Gediegene Atmosphäre, sehr gute Ausstattung. Das Frühstück, obwohl nicht billig, läßt keine Wünsche offen.
negative_comment: Das Hotel könnte einen kleinen Relaunch gebrauchen. Obwohl gediegen könnten einige kleinere und größere Erneuerungen noch mehr "Punkte" ergeben, wie z.B. Fernsehen im Zimmer und damit verbundene Kabel. Badezimmer braucht meines Erachtens keine Badewanne (mit integrierter Dusche), komfortablere Dusche würde reichen.

positive_comment: Trotz der geschlossenen Gesellschaft war der Empfang freundlich. Da wir nur eine Übernachtung auf dem Weg nach Kroatien gebucht hatten, war der Aufenthalt angenehm.

title: Prima
positive_comment: Sehr freundlich und zuverlässig. Wir sind sehr spät angekommen und haben uns sehr gefreut, dass für uns geöffnet wurde.

title: Gute Unterkunft für die Durchreise nach Kroatien!
positive_comment:
Diese Unterkunft ist perfekt für einen Zwischenstopp auf den Weg nach oder von Kroatien. Die Leiterin der Unterkunft ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Zimmer waren sauber und mit allen ausgestattet. Die Betten waren bequem und für mich perfekt.
Das Abendessen war sehr gut und das Preis Leistungs Verhältnis hat auf alle Fälle gepasst. Da wir sehr zeitig am Morgen abgereist sind, war das Frühstück überschaubar. Aber für unsere Zwecke hat alles gepasst.
negative_comment: gab nichts zu bemängeln

positive_comment: Ein einfacher Gasthof an der Straße. Gegenüber ein riesiges LKW und Baumaschinen-Depot. Im Prinzip alles in Ordnung und angesichts des niedrigen Preises auch empfehlenswert.
negative_comment: Die Lage

positive_comment: Zimmer gut, Frühstück gut, Essen am Abend voll in Ordnung. Sehr nette Wirtsleute. Gerne wieder

title: Immer wieder gern
positive_comment:
Sehr freundlich sympathische Gastgeber. Wunderbares reichhaltige Speisen. Sehr gute Küche!
Die Betten waren wunderbar. Das Bad ist in die Jahre gekommen jedoch sauber und voll Funktional.
negative_comment: Da fällt mir nichts ein.

positive_comment: Das Hotel ist perfekt für eine Übernachtung auf der Reise in den Süden. Das Zimmer war sehr sauber und das Personal sehr freundlich. Das Frühstück entsprach unseren Erwartungen.
Sympathisch und sehr zuvorkommend - genau so wie man sich einen Aufenthalt wünscht.

Hatte leider nicht viel Zeit. Späte Ankunft. frühe Abreise. Essen habe ich nur gesehen, sah sehr gut aus. Die Gäste waren sehr zufrieden. Unterkunft alles ok. Werde demnächst mit etwas mehr Zeit wieder buchen.
Il posto è molto comodo se si sta viaggiando, completo di ristorante per non doversi muovere alla sera. La signora è molto gentile e le stanze sono carine e pulite.

title: Great value for money, with some improvements needed

negative_comment:
Rainfall shower: It is impossible to turn on the shower without first being hit by a burst of very cold water, as the showerhead is mounted on the ceiling and positioned between the user and the control handle.
Room furniture: The room lacks a standard chair suitable for working at the small round table. Instead, there is an armchair, which results in the table being positioned at chest height, making it impractical for work or dining.

title: Good hotel, just avoid a couple of things...
positive_comment: Great size on the room for us three (two adults and a two-year-old), very comfortable bed, spacious bathroom with a separate bathtub and shower, decent selection at breakfast, very close to the U1 subway line, nice standard on the room. Quiet.
negative_comment:
A bit odd that there's a glass wall between the room and the toilet, not a nice experience for your travelling companions. The bathroom is quite dark due to the black interior. I'd also like to warn about asking the hotel staff to order a taxi for you. I thought they'd provide a serious taxi service but we ended up getting scammed, being charged €72 for a 20min drive to the airport at 5am. I was in shock when I heard his price. Also, avoid asking for a breakfast box if you're leaving early, they give you a gigantic cardboard box (per person) containing only a couple of fruits and a sandwich made out of very old, dry bread without butter. They were so dry that we had to throw them away. 

Finally, a little bit annoying that the sky bar is only open from 4pm and that you need to pre-book your drink several days ahead. We were unfortunately not able to go up there as a result as I noticed too late and no info was given at the check-in.

title: Fantástica ubicación para disfrutar Viena a pie
positive_comment:
- La ubicación excelente en el anillo central del casco histórico de Viena, donde te podías desplazar andando prácticamente a todos los sitios de interés turístico y monumental.
- Los desayunos lo suficientemente variados, estilo buffet, donde he descubierto los huevos a la Benedictina, los Royal… y me he aficionado. Fruta fresca, zumo de naranja natural , etc.
- El personal de restauración muy atentos y amables.
- la camarera de piso muy amable, estaba muy pendiente de que no faltase nada y dejaba la habitación muy limpia.
- Las habitaciones, espaciosas, luminosas, muy limpias y con un baño muy grande, con plato de ducha y bañera por separado. Con dos lavabos y con la equipación suficiente.
- El Hotel en general muy bonito, se nota calidad y que se han utilizado Buenos mareriales en su construcción. Las ventanas están muy bien aisladas, apenas se oye la calle
negative_comment:
- En el anuncio de la web pone que tiene Spa, pero realmente se trata de una sauna y gimnasio junto con una sala de relajación. Esperábamos encontrar un spa en una pequeña piscina, o al menos hidromasaje.
- para el momento del checking, el día de la llegada, no sabía que te pedían la tarjeta de crédito para cargarte el importe de la estancia de forma provisional, cuando tenían entendido que se pagaba a través de la aplicación de Booking. No tenía activada en la tarjeta compras por una cantidad tan alta y tuve que contactar con mi banco en el país de origen. Fue una situación incómoda, me llevó tiempo y noté impaciencia e incomodez en la persona que me estaba atendiendo, en vez de comprensión. Al final pude solucionarlo con mi banco.
- Como hecho curioso, aunque imaginamos que por causas ajenas, se quedó sin luz el Hotel durante una tarde - noche más de tres horas

La arquitectura, con su diseño envolvente de cristal, ofrece la sensación de estar flotando entre las nubes, como si se durmiera en el cielo.

Tornerei volentieri qui anche se d'impatto ha un costo superiore ad altre location ma mette a disposizione altri servizi come l'ingresso alla sauna e fitness. Voto 10

title: Esperienza stellare
positive_comment:
Gli Hilton sono hotel d’eccezione. Completo di tutto, dalla sala fitness al mini market al piano terra, si conferma una chicca nel cuore di Vienna. All’uscita dall’hotel  a pochi metri si trova la fermata del tram che vi porta praticamente ovunque. 
Il personale inoltre è stato gentilissimo con noi, soprattutto visto che c’erano problemi con la ricezione del pos e non abbiamo potuto versare la cauzione di 100 euro (anche se avevamo proposto di versarla in contanti). 
Raramente ho trovato una accoglienza così elegante e cordiale, sicuramente ci piacerebbe tornare in futuro! 
Altra nota positiva: l’acqua in vetro che viene ogni giorno rifornita gratuitamente nella stanza.
negative_comment: Frigo bar vuoto, la porta della doccia scricchiolava leggermente quando si apriva, il phon a volte si spegneva da solo. Nulla di grave in ogni caso

title: Magico
positive_comment: La struttura è bellissima, pulita e ordinata. Tutto lo staff è stato gentile, disponibile e premuroso. Ho amato il clima che si respirava. L’hotel si trova a 10 min dal centro principale. Ha uno stile moderno ma molto accogliente. La nostra camera al nono piano era molto spaziosa e pulita. Abbiamo soggiornato con il nostro bambino di tre anni e tutto è stato perfetto. Lo consiglio e ci tornerei volentieri.

Mein Aufenthalt im Hotel Imperial war einfach außergewöhnlich. Zu meinem Geburtstag habe ich mich wirklich wie eine Prinzessin gefühlt – das historische Ambiente, die liebevollen Details und die besondere Atmosphäre machen dieses Haus einzigartig.

Der Service war aufmerksam, herzlich und absolut auf höchstem Niveau. Jeder Wunsch wurde erfüllt, oft sogar bevor man ihn aussprechen musste.

Ein perfekter Ort für besondere Momente. Ich komme sehr gerne wieder.

negative_comment: Das die tür meistens nicht funktioniert hat

title: Gut gelegenes Hotel mit schönem Design, viel Komfort, reichhaltigem Buffet und freundlichem Personal
positive_comment:
Hervorragendes, reichhaltiges Frühstücksbuffet; sehr freundliches, aufmerksames, mehrsprachiges Personal
Executive Rooms geschmackvoll renoviert -. schöne Farben / Textilien /Design, TV Grösse passend.
Es wurde uns wunschgemäss ein Zimmer inkl. Badewanne zugewiesen;
Bedienung bei Concierge effizient und professionell und sehr freundlich.
Executive-Lounge Zugang bei Buchung von Executive Room hat uns sehr positiv überrascht.

title: Empfehlenswert
positive_comment: Aussergewöhnlich grosse Auswahl beim Frühstück. Das Personal ist immer zuvorkommend und ist sehr nett. Die Lage könnte besser nicht sein. Wir sind nun schon öfters in diesem Hotel zu Gast gewesen und werden auch beim nächsten Mal unseren Wien-Aufenthalt im gleichen Hotel buchen. Etwas entgegenkommender dürfte man aber bei dieser Anzahl von Besuchen beim Preis doch etwas sein...

title: Eccellente
positive_comment: Tutto perfetto, splendide stanze, fantastica vista, posizione eccezionale
negative_comment: All'arrivo non funzionava l' aria condizionata ed ho dovuto sollecitare un paio di volte, ma sono poi intervenuti ottimamente risolvendo il problema

title: Un soggiorno da sogno e da ripetere assolutamente
positive_comment:
Ho adorato tutto dell struttura. Dagli spazi comuni alla mia camera meravigliosa e confortevole. Ho goduto di una vista panoramica e ogni dettaglio era molto curato. Struttura che merita tutte le stelle sotto ogni punto di vista anche per location ( la metro per raggiungere il centro è a meno di 5 minuti a piedi )
Vorrei soprattutto sottolineare la grande professionalità e gentilezza di tutto lo staff. In particolare la ragazza del ricevimento Ljubica che ho trovato STRAORDINARIA. Sono stata consigliata e assistita da lei in ogni particolare del mio soggiorno. Il suo modo così sincero e gentile mi ha fatto sentire a casa e coccolata. Grazie di cuore , mi ha fatto partire con la voglia di tornare al più presto.
Bellissima vista Danubio, molto moderna e lussuosa. Colazione varia e buona. Vicina alla metro e a tante belle passeggiate in mezzo al verde
negative_comment: Quando si metteva l’acqua fredda in bagno (sia lavandino che doccia) partiva un fischio. La porta del bagno scorrevole era divisa in due e la metà di sinistra non restava aperta

positive_comment: Veramente bellissimo posizione ottima collegato bene con metropolitana e aeroporto ....
negative_comment: Nulla tutto perfetto

title: Molto bello
positive_comment: Hotel si trova in una posizione comoda. A 100 mt dalla metro e con la linea rossa vi porta direttamente in centro. Facilissimo da capire. Struttura e’ molto moderna e molto bella erispecchia le foto.  Camere belle come in foto, belle e pulite, manca kit di benvenuto, però alla reception vi danno quello che chiedete. L’unica pecca è il costo del parcheggio che è 40€ al giorno. Colazione internazionale e in un splendido ristorante.
negative_comment: Parcheggiato a pagamento

positive_comment: Moderna accogliente staff gentile e disponibile sempre
negative_comment: Nonostante clienti del LEVEL, visto che alle 22 chiude, ci siamo spostati allo Sky bar (io il mio compagno e le due bimbe). Il cameriere dello Sky bar , il signor stefan, ci ha obbligati a prendere almeno due consumazioni perché stavamo occupando il tavolo da 4. Sono d’accordo con lui, ma dovresti fare una cernita tra chi viene da fuori e chi è cliente dell’hotel, in più iscritti al programma frequent client e con accesso esclusivo alla Lounge. Vista la sua età è stato poco esperto e ci ha molto amareggiati.

positive_comment: La location...la pulizia...la colazione ben curata...
negative_comment: Il tempo purtroppo😅

title: Stupendo
positive_comment: Lo staff era super disponibile, gentile e cordiale. Ci siamo trovati bene. La vista merita tutto. È meravigliosa è davvero suggestiva. Si vede tutta vienna, anche il centro. È meraviglioso fare colazione in un posto del genere, alzare le serrande al mattino e poter ammirare l'incredibile vista
negative_comment: La colazione ha poca varietà di scelta nel buffet. Ma compensa con quello che preparani gli chef. Però ci vorrebbero piu scelte vegan

title: Bellissimo soggiorno presso questo hotel che consiglio
positive_comment: Tutto. Camere spaziose , pulizia, comfort e personale
negative_comment: Il ristorante all’ultimo piano può essere migliorato nella proposta dei piatti

title: Es war ein wunderbarer Aufenthalt - gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Der Ausblick beim Frühstück ist einfach atemberaubend :-)
negative_comment: gibt keinen Verbesserungsvorschlag - alles perferkt!

title: Hotel mit Wohlfühlfaktor
positive_comment: … schönes Zimmer, tolle Aussicht, sehr schönes Badezimmer. Vor allem das Kissen-Menü fand ich sehr nett…

title: Extravagant am Event
positive_comment: Das Hotel ist neben dem convention Area, wenn man da hin will ist die Lage Perfekt. Die Zimmer sind grandios, die Bar ebenso und das Restaurant ist beeindruckend.
negative_comment: nichts, komme wieder

positive_comment: Es ist ein super Hotel, wo es einfach Spaß macht, nach der Stadtbesichtigung von Wien, zu verweilen und zu genießen.
negative_comment: Nix

title: TOP und jederzeit sehr gerne wieder :)
positive_comment:
Wir waren bereits zum zweiten Mal im Melià Vienna - es hat wieder alles super gepasst.
Wir haben sogar ein Upgrade erhalten aber leider war die Aussicht dann nicht wie gewünscht - jedoch das Zimmer war TOP.
Frühstück auch sehr sehr gut.

title: wunderschönes erlebnis!
positive_comment: war inzwischen öfters da und es war jedes mal ein wunderschönes erlebnis! die zimmer waren super und so auch wie aussicht, das personal ist einem entgegengekommen und ich habe mich total wohl gefühlt!

title: Wunderschönes Hotel werden mit Sicherheit beim nächsten Wien Besuch dieses Hotel wieder buchen
positive_comment:
Sehr freundlich zuvorkommendes Personal

An der Rezeption Großes Lob an Frau Luvy  ( weis leider den Namen nicht mehr ganz genau bzw. wie man ihn richtig schreibt  )
Sehr sehr kompetent zuvorkommend freundlich !
Einfach Top Top diese Frau !!!

title: Super Städtetrip
positive_comment: Lage mit Blick auf die Donau, Zimmer auf 15. Etage, Größe des Zimmers, der ganze Komfort, Anbindung an öffentliche Verkehrsmittel.
Schönes Hotel mit sehr freundlichem Personal mit toller Aussicht über Wien.

title: Sehr schönes modernes Hotel am VIC
positive_comment: Ich war jetzt schon mehrfach in diesem Hotel und finde es nach wie vor klasse. Es ist modern, gut ausgestattet und man hat von den oberen Zimmern eine tolle Aussicht. Ich komme immer wieder gerne.
negative_comment: Leider war ich nur eine Nacht da...

title: Esperienza unica!
positive_comment: Struttura spettacolare ed austera con personale gentilissimo. Ci hanno dato una camera spaziosissima e bellissima. Abbiamo fatto la colazione, che era spettacolare, ordinando sia piatti alla carta che preso al buffet. Abbiamo fatto anche una cena al Rote Bar dove era tutto buonissimo. Personalmente l'hotel migliore dove io sia mai stato, addirittura il caffè della stanza era buonissimo, cosa che per me, al di fuori di Napoli, è impossibile trovare. La Sacher è spaziale!
negative_comment: Unico neo il tablet per ordinare i piatti in camera che era scarico e non ben funzionante al nostro arrivo che ci ha fatto impiegare un po' di tempo per ordinare.

title: Tornare indietro nel tempo …
positive_comment:
L’hotel è molto caratteristico, la camera era spaziosa, capiente cabina armadio, bagno davvero grande con il pavimento di marmo riscaldato - ottimo per chi adora camminare a piedi nudi. 
L’accoglienza al check in potrebbe essere più “calorosa” con anche tour della struttura. 
Molto accogliente il bar blu, sembra di essere in un’altra epoca.
negative_comment:
In una struttura di questo tipo mi aspetto che le pulizie vengano effettuate sempre alla stessa maniera, la prima mattina si sono dimenticata di rimettere il vanity kit, hanno fatto confusione con l’ordine in camera della colazione e sebbene se ne fossero accorti, hanno addebitato la colazione sbagliata sul conto sbagliando. Se sei ospite dell’albergo ti trattano meglio nei f&b outlet e non lo trovo corretto. Il servizio in questa struttura dovrebbe sempre essere impeccabile. 
Trovo assurdo che chiudano a chiave l’hotel di notte, non lo dicono e inoltre dalla sera in poi non c’é il portiere che invece c’è solo di giorno. 
I cassetti della cabina armadio non sono rigorosamente puliti. 
Dovrebbero avere un phone moderno come il Dyson.

title: Un hotel storico al passo con i tempi
positive_comment: Hotel spettacolare nel cuore di Vienna. Cortesia ed attenzione per il cliente da vero hotel di lusso

title: Alloggiare al Sacher è assaporare la storia e sentirsi ospiti speciali!
positive_comment: Tutto. In particolare le sale della colazione e la lobby

title: Hotel meraviglioso in centro storico
positive_comment:
Hotel meraviglioso, con arredi tradizionali di grande gusto 
Posizione perfetta vicina al centro e ai principali musei 

Abbiamo soggiornato in una junior suite molto spaziosa, bagno molto grande, pulizia perfetta 
Abbiamo anche cenato a capodanno, servizio impeccabile e bellissima atmosfera !
negative_comment:
Unica cosa migliorabile la colazione 
Il buffet non era molto ricco ( poca frutta/ formaggi ) anche il locale riservato è piccolo 
la nostra colazione era esclusa dal costo della camera e molto costosa in proporzione

title: Un quadro dell’era imperiale asburgica
positive_comment:
Antico albergo stile asburgico imperiale rimasto intatto nel tempo.
La peculiarità e’ rimasto come due secoli fa. Estremamente lussuoso mobili d’epoca boiserie velluto e broccati ! Degno di un impero come quello asburgico
negative_comment: Nulla

positive_comment: la gentilezza e la disponibilità del personale, si sono messi a disposizione per organizzare il compleanno della bimba.
La posizione, l’eleganza e la storicità del hotel.
negative_comment:
Il riassetto della stanza non era mai completo, gli asciugami non venivano sostituiti completamente, cioè venivano portati via quelli sporchi ma sostituiti in un numero minore.
Abbiamo dovuto fare colazione in una stanza secondaria decisamente buia e brutta in quanto il personale non sgomberava velocemente i tavoli; a volte favorendo gli ospiti esterni rispetto a coloro che soggiornano in hotel.

title: Uno dei must mondiali
positive_comment: Tutto, e’ un hotel che conferma, nei secoli, il proprio prestigio con la ricercatezza degli arredi, l’eccellenza dei prodotti, la precisione impeccabile dei servizi uniti ad un alto livello di tecnologia. Bravissimi

personnel charmant

positive_comment: Nous avons appréciés l'emplacement, nous avons pu tout faire a pied dans Vienne. Les chambres très bien insonorisé et très confortable. La literie excellent. Nous avions également appréciés la formule Penthouse exécutive, vraiment très bien. Nous retournerons certainement et je conseillerais.

title: Parfait

title: Superbe expérience à Vienne
positive_comment:
J’ai été vraiment régalée par cet hôtel !
Merci pour le superbe service : le personnel est adorable et toujours souriant.
La chambre était impeccablement propre, et le lit m’a offert l’une de mes meilleures nuits de sommeil depuis un an.
La vue depuis la fenêtre sur le CBD de Venise est juste magnifique.
Rien à redire, je recommande cet hôtel à tout le monde les yeux fermés !

title: Estadia Excelente.

Adoramos o Hotel e a sua localização.
negative_comment: O serviço do pequeno almoço pode e deve melhorar.

title: Foi Boa. A organização do "Lay Out" da zona de pequeno almoço em regime de Buffet é que não é boa
positive_comment: A disponibilidade do funcionário da recepção em obter transportes para diversas localidades da Áustria e locais da cidade, incluindo Taxis e sobretudo rapidez para o Aeroporto ou para a Estação de Comboios. Muito Bom e Assertivo.

A demora no check in porque a Reserva efetuada no Booking.com não constava informaticamente dos Registos do Hotel:
Resultado: Espera de de cerca de 20 minutos.
Tudo se resolveu entretanto, após essa espera. mas diga-se com diligência interessada
Funcionárias adstritas à Zona de Pequeno Almoço parece que não dominam a língua inglesa.

title: Descobrir Vienna

O quarto de excelente tamanho, camas confortáveis.
Pequeno almoço muito bom.

Simpatia do staff.

Cama muito confortável

Arrumação do quarto demasiada apressada

Falta de chinelos no quarto

title: Excellent  I definitely recemmhotel with brilliant service in the centre of Vienna
positive_comment:
Excellent customer care - all the staff were very good, courteous and helpful. 
Hotel is beautiful, clean and offered great service. Breakfast offered a wide range of food. I definitely recommend this hotel. Furthermore, it is close to many of the attractions in central Vienna - walking distance to St. Stephen's Cathedral, Hofburg Palace, State Opera House, Town Hall etc. Tram is on literally on the door step of the hotel
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Excellent. We will definitely be back.
positive_comment: Everything was perfect. Clean and spacious rooms, we got a free upgrade which was a nice surprise also. The hotel is very close by to the main city and tourist attractions. Easy to get around by uber and lime bikes also. Staff were very friendly and attentive.
negative_comment: Nothing.

title: It was a joy from start to end
positive_comment: Everything was just amazing. Friendly welcome upon checking in. Room was superb. Amazing choice at the breakfast buffet. Staff in all areas were wonderful.

title: Beautiful hotel

negative_comment: The only downside was that we couldn't order a cocktail from the restaurant before 6 pm. Other than that, no remarks.

title: Great Location and good value for money
positive_comment: For family is great we had connecting rooms with our kids and the rooms were spacious ,comfortable , and clean.
negative_comment: nothing really

positive_comment: Loved everything about this hotel, thank you for a fab stay!
negative_comment: Nothing!

positive_comment: Amazing stone floors! V comfortable, fantastic views, very helpful and friendly staff. Great shower!
negative_comment: All good.

positive_comment:
The staff was amazing! 
The view from The room was great and location excellent. 
I would highly reconmend this experience.

title: Amazing accommodation would highly recommend
positive_comment: It was very luxurious and what I expected with the money that I paid for this five star hotel. I absolutely love the fact that they had amazing fine dining at the top of the building and a cocktail bar as the service all around was wonderful.
negative_comment: The room was slightly smaller than I anticipated, but not the end of the world.

positive_comment: The location near the river is great. The area is urban, yet close to the water, so you can enjoy some peace and relax.
negative_comment: Parking underneath the hotel is difficult to find, and it’s confusing to figure out which garage entrance to use.

title: Nice place near the metro station!
positive_comment: Great building from the outside and the room we had was plenty big enough for the two of us, the door in between the toilet and the room itself was broken but that’s not a real issue, the view was great overlooking the river, and the breakfast was great, there was plenty of choice, full English or continental! Even though it’s in an office block you really don’t hear any noise and the entrances are separate you wouldn’t know when you get there!
negative_comment: It was not close to Vienna centre, we had to get the metro which was super easy to do but it’s around 8-10 stops on the metro!

positive_comment: Huge comfortable beds, great rain shower, beautiful view, great temperature in the room
negative_comment: No netflix, carpet had stains, one of the shutters didnt work so couldn't black-out the room, garage is expensive

title: Great value for money, with some improvements needed
positive_comment: Beautiful building, one of the tallest skyscrapers in the VIC neighborhood. The room is very spacious and modern.
negative_comment:
Rainfall shower: It is impossible to turn on the shower without first being hit by a burst of very cold water, as the showerhead is mounted on the ceiling and positioned between the user and the control handle.
Room furniture: The room lacks a standard chair suitable for working at the small round table. Instead, there is an armchair, which results in the table being positioned at chest height, making it impractical for work or dining.

title: In exception of breakfast and restorante/bar, not worth the money.
positive_comment: Location is excellente. Breakfast is great, staff also, very kind and helpfull.
negative_comment: It is totally overpriced, compering to other hotels in the same category. Spa is mediocre, room quite small for three persons, facillites basic

title: Good hotel, just avoid a couple of things...
positive_comment: Great size on the room for us three (two adults and a two-year-old), very comfortable bed, spacious bathroom with a separate bathtub and shower, decent selection at breakfast, very close to the U1 subway line, nice standard on the room. Quiet.
negative_comment:
A bit odd that there's a glass wall between the room and the toilet, not a nice experience for your travelling companions. The bathroom is quite dark due to the black interior. I'd also like to warn about asking the hotel staff to order a taxi for you. I thought they'd provide a serious taxi service but we ended up getting scammed, being charged €72 for a 20min drive to the airport at 5am. I was in shock when I heard his price. Also, avoid asking for a breakfast box if you're leaving early, they give you a gigantic cardboard box (per person) containing only a couple of fruits and a sandwich made out of very old, dry bread without butter. They were so dry that we had to throw them away. 

Finally, a little bit annoying that the sky bar is only open from 4pm and that you need to pre-book your drink several days ahead. We were unfortunately not able to go up there as a result as I noticed too late and no info was given at the check-in.

title: nice and cosy
positive_comment: good parking possibilities, nice and cosy rooms, professional staff, nice view , good location and mass transportation possibilities too.
The staff was super helpful, kind and accommodating. I had some special requests that were fulfilled without question. Great experience.

title: A really restful stay in a beautiful place.
positive_comment: The staff were extremely friendly and helpful. The hotel is centrally located in a beautiful part of the city.

title: Great location and pleasant hotel
positive_comment: Much better value than Bonvoi offers - and quiet with a great bar.
negative_comment: Breakfast room a bit crowded, but nice breakfast nevertheless.

title: Everything is perfect.
positive_comment:
Room size is great. Comfortable beds.
Perfect location.
Great service

title: Sleepless in Vienna
positive_comment: The hotels location was excellent. The staff was outstanding especially mr bastion kaizer who went out of his way to change our room for a higher floor..the room was great...but the heater was on and not the Aircon and it was 22 degrees outside...the hotel would have been great if we had some cooling....
negative_comment: The europeon five star hotels charging u full price ....have the heater on...no air-conditioning...the temp was 22 degrees outside....we had to sleep with the windows open...there was so much noise outside that we couldn't sleep all three nights...should have hired a great apartment for less and with Aircon....Europe get ur act together...

positive_comment: Thank you for your service and everything provided from the hotel. I enjoyed my stayed with you guys. Perfect location and clean facilities.

title: One of the best hotel experiences ever.
positive_comment: The location is perfect. It is so easy to get to anywhere in Vienna from there and a wonderful place to return to each evening after a full-day sightseeing.

Après 3 téléphones depuis la Belgique ( non, ce n’était pas que le jour férié..ils avaient oublié qu’on était en train de payer ..2x

Ceci dit, ça a été un petit séjour tout simplement inoubliable !

Die Ausstattung in den Zimmern war sehr gut und die Bäder modern.
