Nunca tive uma situação igual em nenhum hotel. Quando tal acontece, o valor do pequeno almoço é creditado no quarto (tal como.os restantes consumos) e pago no check out. Foi uma atitude de enorme deselegância, e falta de profissionalismo, especialmente neste tipo de Hotel. A melhorar esta regra e o comportamento da funcionária.

title: Hotel confortável com uma Localização excelente
positive_comment:
Localização Óptima. Muito central e perto de todas as atracções turisticas.
Pequeno-almoço muito bom 
Funcionários muito simpáticos e atenciosos.
negative_comment:
Para um hotel de 5* acho que a decoração deveria ser mais luxuosa.
Achei o Lobby muito "pobre".

title: Good
positive_comment: The staff, they are nice and helpful, and the hotel itself is very good.
negative_comment: The beds are too soft

title: Hôtel sans charme mais gym et piscine au top.
positive_comment: Bon emplacement. Très bonne gym pour un hôtel et belle piscine. Salon lounge petit mais agréable.
negative_comment: L’accueil ! Froid et peu plaisant. J’avais demandé une chambre avec vue rue et on me donne une vue sur cour intérieure avec voisins visibles en face. A l’accueil, on ne cherche qu’à vous faire dépenser plus alors que les prix sont déjà exorbitants pour un hôtel moderne et sans charme.

title: Un séjour exceptionnel à  vienne
positive_comment: le petit déjeuné exceptionnel. l’emplacement parfait pour visiter Vienne. Très proche du centre et du Stephansdom. L’hôtel est très confortable et le personnel très accueillant. Les équipements piscine et salle de sport à la hauteur des attente. On reviendra
negative_comment: rien

title: Super découverte
positive_comment:
La chambre
Propre simple efficace
Super petit-déjeuner 
Localisation top
Le professionnalisme et la réactivité de Maelle à la réception

title: Nous recommandons cet hôtel pour une visite de Vienne
positive_comment: Hôtel très bien placé et très à l'écoute. Room service varié et très bien servi. Petit déjeuner extra et diversifié. Rien à redire
negative_comment: RIEN

title: bien
positive_comment: le SPA, la taille de la chambre, le buffet du petit dej au top
negative_comment: lit afaisé, oreiller pas confortables

title: Je recommanderai cet hôtel
positive_comment:
Excellent accueil de Dominique au check-in
Tout le personnel était très aimable.
Emplacement central génial ! Literie très confortable ! restaurant et bar agréable. Petit déjeuner varié et bon

Personnel agréable.  Très bon.petit déjeuner. 
Je recommande

title: Conhecer Viena perto de tudo
positive_comment: O pequeno almoço é mesmo do melhor, os funcionários são muito atenciosos e disponiveis. O quarto é muito limpo e os serviços estão todos disponiveis. A localização tambem é muito boa e recomendamos.
negative_comment: O quarto é pequeno e as camas são mesmo muito pequenas, e não achámos que fossem muito confortáveis. A casa de banho era mesmo muito pequena. Para familias deviam ter recomendado quartos maiores ou comunicantes.

positive_comment: Do concierge, do pequeno almoço, do bar no lounge...
negative_comment: Não poder usar o frigorífico para coisas pessoais.

positive_comment:
Começado pelo staff que era muito simpático, quantos limpos e o hotel era muito bonito. 
A localização era perfeita, ficava mesmo no centro, se voltar a Viena sem dúvida que voltarei para o Marriot
negative_comment: Nada apontar gostei de tudo.

title: Foi uma experiencia muito agradavel e quando voltar a Viena não vou para outro hotel
positive_comment: pequeno almoço muito simpatico e numa sala grande cheia de luz

Da localização do Hotel. 
Excelente pequeno almoço com funcionários muito simpáticos e muito profissionais.
negative_comment: Para uma suite junior, era um espaço de reduzidas dimensões.

title: Maravilhosa escapadinha.
positive_comment:
Gostámos dos vário espaços que o hotel proporciona. Para o nosso filho a piscina foi o ponto alto de um final de dia sempre muito cansativo.
O pequeno almoço muito bom e o staff muito prestável.
Excelente localização.
negative_comment: Nada a registar.

title: Ótimo Hotel!
positive_comment: Quarto silencioso, confortável, cama grande, boa. Banheiro bom. Apesar do hotel ser bem grande, não houve demora na utilização dos elevadores. Tomamos o café da manhã sempre na sala Club Vip a  qual tínhamos direito. O local era agradável, tranquilo e o café bom, produtos de qualidade mas sem nada de extraordinário. Pessoal do hotel bem gentil. A localização é ótima, no centro mas sem ser dentro do miolo central. Dava para ir à pé a muitos lugares. Tram (ônibus/ bonde) e táxi na frente.
negative_comment: Demora do atendimento no restaurante. O fato de ser um hotel bem grande.

title: In exception of breakfast and restorante/bar, not worth the money.
positive_comment: Location is excellente. Breakfast is great, staff also, very kind and helpfull.
negative_comment: It is totally overpriced, compering to other hotels in the same category. Spa is mediocre, room quite small for three persons, facillites basic

positive_comment: Great location, a beautiful hotel, and very professional service. A special thanks to Julie at the concierge desk, she was incredibly helpful and made our stay even more enjoyable. Staff like her are the reason we would happily come back to this hotel again

title: An excellent  5 stars hotel.
positive_comment: Newly renovated. The staff were all friendly and attentive. Breakfast was so grand.
negative_comment: Nothing.

title: Excellent hotel and great value for money
positive_comment: Excellent location near synagogues and kosher restaurants. Beautiful room
Great location, very clean, very friendly and helpful stuff, especially Mr. Boris, he was so polite, so helpful, so friendly and kind!
negative_comment: When we arrived they hadn't prepared an extra bed for our daughter, but they were quick to fix that when we told them.

title: Great location, friendly staff and really good breakfast with extraordinary view.
positive_comment:
Great location with walking distance to Kohlmarkt. 
Friendly staff who respond promptly to any issues and provide satisfactory solutions. 
A really good breakfast on 18th floor with extraordinary views. Highly recommend book a room with breakfast.

title: Very nice hotel room with great views
positive_comment: Very great hotel, with friendly staff, amazing bed & great views :)

title: Fantastic Hotel
positive_comment: Modern clean great location friendly staff and superb restaurant with panoramic views.
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment: Localização excelente!  Conforto e limpeza! Quarto excelente.
negative_comment:
Alguma desorganização no check in. Chegamos tarde, perto da meia noite. Receção sem funcionários... esperamos cerca de 15m até que aparecesse alguem. Quarto não estava preparado (houve necessidade de troca de quarto por razões que desconheço). Tivemos que esperar mais 20m apos o check in de forma a que preparassem o quarto. 
Já no quarto,  este não tinha a cama extra preparada... tivemos que voltar à recepção oara solicitar a cama necessária à acomodação de uma criança conforme solicitado na reserva.

title: Excelente para visitar a cidade a pé! A repetir
positive_comment:
A localização do hotel é perfeita! Fomos visitar a cidade em 4 dias e todos os pontos que queríamos visitar eram pertíssimo do hotel. Andamos sempre a pé para todos os monumentos, museus e salas de espetáculos. É perfeita!
A cama é a verdadeira cama de hotel 5 estrelas. Foi das camas mais confortáveis em que já dormi.
negative_comment:
O quarto era muito mais pequeno do que a expectativa que tínhamos. 
O preço do pequeno almoço é também exorbitante (32€ por pessoa por dia) mas existem inúmeras opções ao lado do hotel por isso não compensa comprar tarifa com pequeno almoço incluído.

title: A really restful stay in a beautiful place.
positive_comment: The staff were extremely friendly and helpful. The hotel is centrally located in a beautiful part of the city.

title: Great location and pleasant hotel
positive_comment: Much better value than Bonvoi offers - and quiet with a great bar.
negative_comment: Breakfast room a bit crowded, but nice breakfast nevertheless.

title: Everything is perfect.
positive_comment:
Room size is great. Comfortable beds.
Perfect location.
Great service

title: Sleepless in Vienna
positive_comment: The hotels location was excellent. The staff was outstanding especially mr bastion kaizer who went out of his way to change our room for a higher floor..the room was great...but the heater was on and not the Aircon and it was 22 degrees outside...the hotel would have been great if we had some cooling....
negative_comment: The europeon five star hotels charging u full price ....have the heater on...no air-conditioning...the temp was 22 degrees outside....we had to sleep with the windows open...there was so much noise outside that we couldn't sleep all three nights...should have hired a great apartment for less and with Aircon....Europe get ur act together...

title: Great location.
positive_comment:
Excellent location for sight seeing historic attractions. 
Knowledgeable attentive staff.
Rooms sufficient.
negative_comment: Nothing .

title: great location and comfortable to stay in
positive_comment: we like the location and the facilities. we enjoyed the breakfast. we meg a maintenance guy when we were lost on out first day, he was apologetic because our room is too far where it should be.
negative_comment: The lifts are too dom. we struggled to see the numbers. we needed to use our mobile’s torch to see the numbers. we had a hard time to see our room at 6th floor. our room is not in chronological order.  no rooms sign posted outside or near lifts.  and two steps stairs before our room.

title: Everything was perfect
positive_comment: Great location, very nice staff, all the facilities you need, everything was perfect

title: I'm a regular guest and I recommend this hotel to everybody.
positive_comment: Service is excellent, breakfast too, the room was clean and big enough and it was very quiet, although the hotel is near the traffic.

title: Great location and reasonably priced style hotel
positive_comment: Great location reasonably priced boutique styled hotel
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Absolutely the best place to stay in Innere Stadt if Vienna. The location is central to all the major sites to see. Simp
positive_comment: Loved the location. Every staff member was exceptional in what they did. Service was amazing. So attentive to our needs and told us all about Vienna and sights to see. Food was magnificent in the restaurant and cafe. The bar and talents of the bar man were excellent. Reception staff were so welcoming and always happy. Best place to stay in Vienna in my opinion.
negative_comment: There was nothing to not like.

positive_comment: Very helpful staff. Location is the best you can have, very close to Opera and museum quarter

title: Great 😊
positive_comment: Everything -rooms, staff, great variety at breakfast

title: Lovely hotel in an excellent location
positive_comment: Excellent location - a very short walk to the main attractions Fantastic rooms. Pool and gym.
negative_comment: Breakfast was expensive but there are plenty of options locally.

title: If you can afford it  the Meridien is.a great place to stay.
positive_comment: The size of the room, the breakfast   and the thoughtful treat I was given for my birthday. Brilliant location. Friendly staff.
negative_comment: Bit noisy outside from revellers.  Also didn't like seeing dog owners using patch of green outside as a dog toilet, although cleaned up afterwards. Probably outside hotel's control.

title: Great stay at Le Meridien
positive_comment: Great central location and easy walking distance to most of city locations or transport.  Team were super friendly and helpful.  We asked and were given inter-connecting rooms which was great with the children.  Pool facilities were also excellent.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: il mio weekend a Vienna
positive_comment: la location moderna, in una posizione ottimale per girare in città e visitare tutti i punti d'interesse. la nostra stanA era situata al 17° piano con una bellissima vista sua ruota pamorica del Prater. per me un weekend indimenticabile
negative_comment: la.colazione,.poca scelta di dolci. Non era presente la cioccolata spalmabile,ma solo marmellate. Molto più ampia la varietà salata.

title: Stupendo ed intenso
positive_comment: Atmosfera cibo servizi e personale ! ringrazio Vito del ristorante e la splendida Roxana alla reception per consigli e professionalità!

title: Albergo spettacolare
positive_comment: Struttura moderna con una vista spettacolare. Staff molto gentile, in particolare ci siamo trovate molto bene al front office con Joebelle.
negative_comment: Niente

title: Loved everything! Highly recommended!
positive_comment:
Loved everything!

We travelled as a family of 4 (2 adults and 2 small children (2,4) and we had a room on a 15th floor, with the most beautiful view!
We arrived before check in hours and they did their best to accomodate us right away. Hotel is clean, neat and perfectly located, city center well within walking distance so is Prater, metro...
Reception staff aswell as the cleaning ladies and busboy were perfect, stowed our luggage until our flight, very polite and organised.
Definitely our pick for the next visit!

title: Good hotel with excellent staff and location.
positive_comment: Great location, within walking distance of most things we wanted to see and with nearby public transport links. Staff were excellent, always polite and helpful. Great breakfast with spectacular views. Room was light and airy and not too warm!
negative_comment: Spa facilities (jacuzzi, steam room) are modest for size of the hotel. There is a DJ playing (loud) music in the top floor bar area Wednesday to Saturday nights from 8/9pm so it isn’t  really a relaxing place to have a drink and enjoy the views, which was a disappointment. On Saturday night there was a large queue of people waiting to get into the hotel to go to the bar so it’s not really a space for guests in the evenings.

positive_comment: Amazing stay! Room was very spacious, clean and with outstanding view. Also have to mention great additions like whirpool, sauna and the bar/restaurant at the top of the building which was really unique experience. We were very satisfied.

title: Wien
positive_comment: Grosses, sauberes Zimmer. Top Lage, gleich gegenüber Schwedenplatz und an der Donau.
negative_comment: Teure Preise für das Frühstück

title: Hotel absolut lohnenswert. Immer wieder
positive_comment: Die schönste Aussicht über ganz Wien. Frühstücksbuffet und Nähe zum ÖV sind unschlagbar.
negative_comment: Dass wir teilweise vergessen wurden am Tisch um Essen/Trinken bestellen zu können.

title: ideales Hotel für Städtetrip nach Wien
positive_comment:
Freundlichkeit und Effizienz des Personals
schönes, grosses Eckzimmer mit Aussicht
praktisches Badezimmer mit begehbarer Dusche
genereller Stil der Unterkunft
Super Frühstück auf 18. Etage mit Blick über die Stadt
Die Lage ist für Ausflüge in die Innenstadt hervorragend und die Aussicht fantastisch
negative_comment: Der Lärm der Klimaanlage

title: War ein besseres Stadthotel mit bester Lage. Gerne mal wieder.
positive_comment: Die Aufteilung vom Zimmer war super. Der offene Badezimmerbereich ist ein Highlight . Schade das die Fenster mit Milchglas ausgestattet sind denn so ist einem die Sicht über die Dächer von Wien verwehrt. Auch die gefüllte und inkudierte Minibar ist eine gute Sache. Am meisten gefallen hat der Bar und Restaurantbereich im obersten Stockwerk.
negative_comment: Die Betten. Nicht nur vom liegen sondern vor allem muss das Ding stabil am Boden stehen und darf sich nicht so bewegen wenn man sich dreht. Das Ding ist einfach billig und eines 5 Stern Hotels unwürdig. Liegen tut man da nicht gut. Was am meisten aufgefallen ist das das Duschgel und das Shampoo nicht vorhanden waren. Sowas hab ich in einem 5 Stern Hotel noch nie erlebt. Und in der Tiefgarage müffelt es nach Kanal. Absolutes NO GO - egal von wo das kommt.

positive_comment: Mega tolles Personal. Sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend
negative_comment: Qualität der betten

positive_comment: Der faszinierende Ausblick. Das wertschätzende freundliche Personal. Das hervorragende Frühstück.

Tolle Lage, toller Service und sehr Kulant. Wir hatten uns zusätzlich für das Brunch im Loft entschieden. Auch wenn dort nicht alles perfekt war, hat man sich sehr kulant gezeigt. Wir kommen gerne wieder.

title: Perfektes City Hotel
positive_comment: Super Lage, besonders freundliches Personal, absolut traumhafte Aussicht

title: einfach grandios, wir müssen wiederkommen!!!!
positive_comment: Einfach großartig, Einrichtung, Variantenreichung der Zimmermodification, Verarbeitung der Möbel, Ausleuchtung, traumhafte Betten und unglaublich aufmerksamer Service, phantastisches Frühstück, grandiose Lage zum Zentrum, traumhafter Blick vom Rooftop. Wir müssen nächstes Jahr wiederkommen. Tiefgaragenservice perfekt. Es gibt nur Superlative.
negative_comment: es gibt gar keine Mängel

positive_comment: The staff did everything they can to make us comfortable especially Herr Wagner.

title: Beautiful hotel with history and attention to detail
positive_comment: The rooms were large and beautifully decorated, interior is stunning
negative_comment: I liked everything- if I had to find a criticism it would be that there seemed to be too few front door staff as there was noone there to help us with bags on arrival or on another 2 occasions. Perhaps just bad timing on our part but it was just very notable compared with the other 5 star hotel we stayed in futing our trip in Vienna

title: Delightful and memorable
positive_comment: A beautiful former palace, the staff were delightful, the room lovely, the food great all within walking distance of many city highlights
negative_comment: We could only stay for five nights

title: Iconic hotel with amazing service and premier location
positive_comment: We loved the history and sense of tradition and the welcoming staff! Staff would go over and above to ensure that our requests or needs, were not only met but in some cases, anticipated.
negative_comment: Line of tourists at hotel cafes.

title: A very special place to stay.
positive_comment: Beautiful, luxurious property in central location.  Excellent breakfast.  Loved the blue cocktail lounge.  This was a great place to begin the evening with friends.
negative_comment: Nothing not to like.

positive_comment: Great hotel for unforgettable experience in Vienna. It was a great journey

title: Very good and attentive service staff during breakfast.
positive_comment: Very well appointed. Lovely room with a direct view of the Albertina. Very convenient distance to the main shopping strip.
negative_comment: Very poor first impression when doorman slammed our luggage against the door.

title: Muy buen hotel
positive_comment: Ubicación junto al río. A pocos minutos del centro.  Hotel muy bueno. No desayunamos xq nos pareció caro 42 euros x persona.
negative_comment: En general , todo muy bien

title: Un recuerdo magnífico de Viena
positive_comment:
El restaurante es espectacular. Una visión panorámica de Viena maravillosa.
El desayuno a pesar de ser caro merece la pena. 
El Spa y la piscina muy buenas también
Las habitaciones muy cómodas, funcionales y modernas
Moderno, bien ubicado, habitación amplia, cómodo y sin ruidos.
negative_comment: El desayuno tiene un precio elevado.

title: volvere sin duda y lo recomiendo tambien
positive_comment: ubicacion perefecta para mi, vistas y comida TOP restaurante estaba lleno pero comi en la zona del bar piqueos muy buenos
negative_comment: bueno el precio pero todo genial

positive_comment: Eatuvimos mi esposo y yo, no comimos en el restoran del sitio porque la habitación tiene cocina. El zimer es muy lindo y cómodo y fueron muy amables. En la noche se pueden ver las estrellas. Para descansar y caminar fue ideal.

title: Muy buena ubicación
positive_comment: Es un hotel es muy nuevo, la habitación bien y la cama estupenda, el spa gratuito y el gimnasio están muy bien para aprovecharlos. Lo mejor es la ubicación.
negative_comment: La calefacción tenía limitación de máximo 25 grados y hacía mucho frío en Febrero. Lo peor que el restaurante es carísimo y va por menú degustación y no hay otras opciones para comer o cenar algo dentro del hotel si llegas cansado.

positive_comment: Gran hotel, elegante, moderno, excelente ubicación, genies vistas, gran desayuno en el piso 18 con vistas a todo Viena!
negative_comment: El servicio en el desayuno puede ser un poco lento.

title: Buen hotel con excelente ubicación y roof top.
positive_comment: Buen desayuno buffet con excelente vista a la ciudad desde su roof top.
negative_comment: Solo podías cenar en el restaurante del hotel pidiendo un menu de degustación caro.

positive_comment: La ubicación es muy conveniente, el hotel es bonito y el bar tiene drinks muy buenos .

title: EXCELENTE HOTEL!!!
positive_comment:
Un hotel precioso.   La habitación super amplia, limpia, y bien decorada.  Todo funcional como corresponde.
El personal 10/10.
Ubicación perfecta!.
negative_comment: Nos gustó todo!.

title: Completa
positive_comment: Muy bueno y la zona fantástica cerca de todo ubicación perfecta
La ubicación y silencio de la habitación. La amabilidad del personal de restaurante y recepción. Facilidades para todo.
negative_comment: El desayuno podría ser mas variado y ordenado.

positive_comment: Ubicación es excelente y el tamaño de kahabitacion
negative_comment: No era cómodo el lugar del frigo y café.

title: Espectacular ubicación y comodidad
positive_comment: La ubicación es fantástica, al igual que el espacio de la habitación. El desayuno también muy bueno y la atención excelente. Hizo muy grata la estadía en Viena.

title: Elegante hotel cerca de la ópera en Viena
positive_comment: Hotel elegante. Limpio, buen servicio, habitaciones cómodas. Baño grande y dotado, buffet variado, cerca catedral, ópera, museos y centro. Estación de metro muy cerca Karlplatz.
negative_comment: Nada

positive_comment:
Buena ubicación 
Hotel muy cómodo, buen desayuno, lujoso

title: Un buen hotel en una muy buena ubicación.
positive_comment: La ubicación. Fui por la música y está a un paso de la Statsoper, del Theatre an der Wien y del Konzerthaus. La plaza Schiller al lado es encantadora. El desayuno muy bueno y con muchas opciones.
negative_comment: El bar en sí bien, pero funcionando como lugar para cenar no es tan adecuado. La limpieza regular.

positive_comment: La ubicación excepcional y el personal del desayuno muy amable .

title: Hotel historique sublime comme un musée
positive_comment: Un hôtel sublime digne d'un musée. Ca change des palaces impersonnels.  Le personnel est exceptionnel tout comme le service. Petit déjeuner excellent. L'emplacement est  idéal à la jonction de tous les quartiers à visiter.
negative_comment: La literie et les oreillers pourraient être améliorés.

positive_comment: Toutes les attentions dignes d'un palace ! Le lieu chargé d'histoire, la décoration authentique, l'ambiance chaleureuse et tellement cosy. Le service impeccable.
negative_comment: Le lit composé de 2 matelas.

title: c'est plus qu'un hotel, c'est une expérience fantastique!
positive_comment: localisation, efficacité et gentillesse du personnel, qualité de l'hebergement et surtout la beauté de cet immeuble de légende.
Bel endroit, rempli d’histoire, personnel attentionné et sympathique, position idéale.
negative_comment: Aucun concierge, aucun réceptionniste ne parle français. Une seule chaîne de télévision française (en 71eme position, il faut bien la chercher). Aucun menu en français. La clientèle française n’est clairement pas la priorité. C’est certainement révélateur d’une réalité économique mais c’est frustrant, en tant que français.

title: Établissement globalement exceptionnel
positive_comment: Service très attentionné et petit déjeuner exceptionnel
negative_comment: Prestation de massage ( moyen)

positive_comment: Alles war großartig, ausser der unten geschilderten Situation mit der Lobby.
negative_comment: Der Eingangsbereich des Hotels ist nicht die Lobby. Man wird sehr nett und umsichtig von der Security begrüsst, aber der Concierge und die Anmeldung sind im 1. Stock. Hier muss man auf dem Weg in die Zimmer nicht vorbei. Daher bleibt der Gesamteindruck leider sehr unpersönlich, auch wenn sich die Mitarbeiter große Mühe geben.

positive_comment:
ristorante e colazione al top
posizione ottima
personale gentilissimo

title: Buon soggiorno ma un po’ troppo caro per quello che offre
positive_comment: Hotel molto bello con camere luminose e spaziose. Ottima colazione e vicinanza al centro città
negative_comment: Materasso del letto matrimoniale non all’altezza di un 5 stelle

title: Week end super piacevole

Ottima attenzione al cliente, ci hanno fatto fare il check in anticipato vedendo dai documenti che fosse il compleanno del mio compagno, inoltre il giorno dopo una piacevole sorpresa: dolce con gli auguri sopra e un biglietto dallo staff ( estremamente apprezzato non avendolo chiesto ). Stanza ampia e molto pulita. Tutti i comfort possibili! Assolutamente consigliato
negative_comment: Nulla, tutto perfetto

positive_comment: tutto molto. Posizione camera confort. Colazione super. Personale molto gentile. Fruibilità della palestra e della SPA
negative_comment:
nulla. Forse disponibilità del ristorante al 18mo piano per il capodanno ma ci siamo mossi molto tardi nella prenotazione.
Per il resto nulla

positive_comment: Il lounge bar e ristorante all’ultimo piano del palazzo
negative_comment: Stanza rumorosa a causa del sistema di aerazione

positive_comment: vista fantastica sia dalla camera che dal rooftop. ottima posizione vicina al centro.

title: Hotel spettacolare
positive_comment:
Camera con grande doccia e vasca e vista spettacolare .
Colazione super e ottima la posizione vicino al centro
negative_comment: Dico la verità nulla nulla!!!!!!!

title: Sehr schönes Hotel in toller Lage. Ich würde es wieder buchen.
positive_comment: Super Lage als Ausgangspunkt zu den Sehenswürdigkeiten. Freundliches Personal. Tolle Bar. Gutes Essen. Wasser und Kaffee auf dem Zimmer inklusive. Es war kein Problem, zusätzliche Wasserflaschen an der Rezeption zu bekommen. Zimmer zur Elisabethstraße war sehr ruhig trotz der zentralen Lage.
negative_comment: Mir fehlte Vollkornbrot beim Frühstück. Sonst war alles super.

title: Einfach fantastisch
positive_comment: Das Hotel ist fantastisch und sehr zentral. Das Personal sehr hilfsbereit und freundlich.

title: Top-Hotel in zentraler Lage Wiens
positive_comment: Die Lage des Hotels ist exzellent. Fußläufig kann man die vielen Highlights der großartigen Stadt sehr gut erreichen. Die Nähe zur U-Bahnstation am Karlsplatz macht es auch leicht, entferntere Stadtteile schnell zu besuchen. Das Zimmer war sehr geräumig, ruhig; die Ausstattung sehr komfortabel. Das Hotel verfügt über einen Spa-Bereich mit Fitness. Auch das Frühstück war ebenso ansprechend wie das Restaurant.
negative_comment: Es gab nichts zu bemängeln.

positive_comment: freundliche Mitarbeiter | saubere große Zimmer | tolle Bar |
negative_comment: Badezimmer sind passen nicht zu einem 5* Hotel

title: Tolles City Hotel!
positive_comment: Wir hatten einen großartigen Aufenthalt für unser 10 jähriges Jubiläum! Haben ein tolles Upgrade bekommen und das Personal war unglaublich bemüht. Das Zimmer war super sauber und das Frühstücksbuffet sehr gut! Auch das Abendessen im Restaurant war köstlich.
negative_comment: Der Spa/Fitness wird von einer externen Fitnesscenter-Kette betrieben. Es könnte etwas gemütlicher sein. Richtiges Spa Feeling kommt nicht auf.

title: Schönes, bequemes Hotel mit ansprechendem Wellness und Fitness
positive_comment: Die Lage ist ganz toll, zentral zu allem, was wir sehen wollten

positive_comment: Das Hotel, die Aufmerksamkeit und Höflichkeit des Personals und der Standort sind optimal. Falls man auf Aussicht verzichten kann sind die Zimmer in den Innenhof  komplett frei von Straßen u.- Stadtlärm. Die Tiefgarage direkt unter dem Hotel runden das Toppaket noch ab. Glatte 10/10.

positive_comment: Staff gentile e sempre sorridente. La posizione è ottima per girare la città. La colazione abbondante. La stanza era abbastanza ampia.

Per essere un 5 stelle mancavano un po’ di servizi che si c’erano a richiesta, ma dovrebbero già esserci di default. Il contenitore del bagnoschiuma era vuoto e nonostante abbia chiesto alla signora che si occupava delle pulizie della stanza di riempirlo, non è stato fatto. 
Il passaggio dall’ascensore verso la stanza comprendeva delle scale, che con il bagaglio non risulta essere proprio il massimo della comodità. Consiglio di rivedere le tende oscuranti, che purtroppo facevano entrare abbastanza luce.

title: Solução perfeita para quem visita Viena e quer ficar bem instalado e localizado.Localização perfeita
positive_comment: Gostei de tudo no hotel menos da desorganização do restaurante ao pequeno almoço. Por duas vezes o pedido a la carte demorou mais de 20 min a vir e só depois de muita insistencia nossa. Não gostamos de alguns, apenas alguns empregados do restaurante, tentámos ir, fizemos uma reserva para jantar e pedimos uma mesa à janela, que foi confirmada sem problema. Quando fomos jantar não nos quiseram dar mesa à janela e foram grosseiros e desagradáveis  no trato e não nos deram a mesa sem qualquer justificação. Dado o tratamento recebido achamos melhor não jantar ali e fomos embora jantar a outro restaurante fora do hotel. Quando ao resto e aos empregados da receção, tudo impecável e ao nivel de um verdadeiro 5 estrelas. Foi pena os episódios do restaurante, caso contrário seria uma nota 10, sem dúvida em tudo o resto.
negative_comment: Da organização (desorganização9 do restaurante aos pequenos almoços, com enganos e demoras excessivas nos pedidos a la carte.

positive_comment: Hier hat uns wirklich ALLES gefallen! Wir waren begeistert! Die Lage ist perfekt, das Hotel sieht super edel aus. So sauber, so schön eingerichtet, einfach nur toll! Ich würde es jedem weiterempfehlen!

Die Koffer können bei früher Anreise und später Abreise im Hotel sicher deponiert werden. Zu unserem Hochzeitstag wurden wir vom Hotel mit einer sehr schönen und aufwendigen Zimmer-Dekoration und einer eisgekühlten Flasche Wein überrascht.

positive_comment:
We stayed in the Lamee building. Our suite was gorgeous- much bigger than we expected. Our beds were super comfortable, and we loved the robes that were left for us to use. 
The bathroom had dual sinks, a bath and a really great shower. We also appreciated the external blinds that can be put down to totally block the light from the large windows. 
The hotel staff we met when checking in/out at Topazz were all lovely.
negative_comment:
We thought that the €33 charge for breakfast was very high, so went to get breakfast elsewhere. 
We went for a drink on the Lamee rooftop but found service very slow. We stood for a long time before being shown to a table, and it then took around 10 or 15 minutes for us to be served. We also thought that €17 for a cocktail was pretty expensive- higher than most places in London, where we live.

title: I would recommend this hotel happily as ticked all our boxes

negative_comment: The shower mixer valve was broken and couldn’t be adjusted to the right temperature but it was sufferable. The staff was overall disengaged and  apathetic and some members of the staff were  a bit rude.. except the cleaning ladies who were very polite.

positive_comment: It was very nice. Staff was very helpful, when we had issues with lock, they fixed within minutes.

title: Great location but make sure you get the room you booked
positive_comment: Excellent location and when we eventually got into our booked room the view was fantastic. Loved the shutters on the floor to ceiling windows that offered privacy and darkness for sleeping and it had a very nice bathroom. The porter was lovely, so friendly and helpful.
negative_comment:
•When we arrived we were given the wrong room and was told they were overbooked and our room was gone and the new room was an upgrade - it was not. When I complained, in near tears as we wanted the specific room we booked and paid extra for, magically the room I booked was now available to me.
•The air conditioning pumped in cooking smells from early morning until late evening, it filled the room and made us nauseous.

positive_comment: Brilliant hotel in a perfect Central location, service was great, space was spotlessly clean. I would definitely revisit.

negative_comment: Our room was so hot. We mentioned it to reception and they checked and said the air conditioning wouldn’t work because we had our window open… next night we made sure the window was closed properly but the air conditioning only made a noise but nothing was coming out. We could only turn the room temp down to 19 degrees. Would have also liked a streaming service on our TV.

positive_comment: The location was stellar and the breakfast was very good. There was an issue with my booking and the staff was very helpful about it. They upgraded me to a suite which was very nice and had a fantastic view of the cathedral.

I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude for the wonderful experience I had at your hotel. Your location is absolutely perfect, and I was deeply touched by the attentive and caring staff. I also want to extend a special thank you to everyone who sent gifts for our anniversary. It made our stay truly unforgettable.

title: Delightful stay in a beautiful hotel in the heart of Vienna, just next to the Opera.

The gym is fairly small, but the sauna and steam room are excellent and very luxurious.  The breakfast is extensive and delicious.  Staff are super friendly and helpful.  Would highly recommend, although it isn't cheap so needs to either be a treat (or on expenses!)

positive_comment: Tutto, hotel moderno, pulito, le ragazze alla reception gentilissime. Posizione super, eravamo praticamente in centro, per la prossima visita a vienna ci ritornerò sicuramente

title: Soggiorno molto piacevole in una posizione perfetta, con qualche piccolo dettaglio migliorabile ma assolutamente consigl
positive_comment: Struttura molto bella e curata, in pieno centro quindi comodissima per visitare la città a piedi. Le foto rispecchiano perfettamente la realtà, cosa non sempre scontata. La stanza era spaziosa, accogliente e ben arredata, dotata di tutti i comfort necessari per un soggiorno piacevole. Ottima anche la pulizia e l’atmosfera generale della struttura, moderna ma allo stesso tempo elegante.
negative_comment: L’hotel è diviso in due strutture: noi alloggiavamo nella parte Lamée, dove si trova anche il rooftop. Questo comportava la condivisione dell’ascensore con i clienti della terrazza, che non era sempre immediatamente disponibile. Inoltre, all’ingresso si percepiva a tratti odore di cibo proveniente dai locali interni: per un 5 stelle forse è un aspetto migliorabile. In ogni caso, nulla che abbia rovinato il soggiorno.

title: Ci tornerei

title: Ottimo albergo peccato per la gestione rumorosa dell’aria condizionata riscaldamento.
positive_comment: Hotel in ottima posizione per visitare Vienna. Un mese fa ero al Leo Grande, altro ottimo albergo della stessa proprietà e , sebbene in tono minore anche il Topazz Lamee ne rispecchia la gestione. Devo fare un appunto alla gestione dell’A/C che è rumorosa e non si riesce d esautorare con notevole fastidio di notte. Per il resto nulla da dire e per il Lamee bellissima la terrazza sia della stanza che sopra all’albergo.
negative_comment: La gestione dell’aria condizionata e riscaldamento: troppo rumorosa di notte al limite del fastidio e non esautorabile. Mancavano indicazioni scritte per la gestione delle tapparelle e dei servizi.

positive_comment:
El personal era muy atento y agradable, nos ayudaron con absolutamente todo, incluyendo un desayuno para llevar y gestión del taxi al aeropuerto 

El desayuno era excelente, con muchísima variedad y platos calientes recién hechos.

La habitación, increíble.

Si volvemos a Viena, repetiremos seguro.

Por poner algo, ojalá tuvieran Smart tv

positive_comment: Hemos pasado 6 días y el hotel es maravilloso, limpio, con todas las comodidades y la atención perfecta. Tuvimos un problema con el parking pero lo resolvieron el problema rápido y sencillo. Destacar la ubicación, puedes ir andando a la mayoría de los sitios importantes. También quiero resaltar la profesionalidad y cariño con las que nos ha atendido Cristian (camarero en el desayuno) hablaba español, cosa que se agradece y nos ha ayudado con muchisimo cariño en toda la estancia. Es un gran profesional y maravilloso persona.
negative_comment: La distancia al parking asociado al hotel

title: Buena situación y cosas que mejorar
positive_comment: Su situación pues está muy céntrico y cerca de la catedral, una buena habitación y sobre todo el personal tanto de recepción como de desayuno, destacando en recepción a Aisha que al ser de origen italiano nos entendimos muy bien con ella y en desayuno un hombre que al haber vivido 10 años en España hablaba un español perfecto y resultó muy amable con nosotros. Buen y variado desayuno
negative_comment: Estuvimos cuatro noches y una vez pasada la primera la limpieza fue muy rápida pero los dos días siguientes al llegar por la tarde al hotel no habían hecho la limpieza de la habitación algo que al reclamar en recepción se hizo de inmediato pero muy por encima sin que fuese a fondo. Las almohadas son terribles e incómodas y la verdad es que son detalles que en un hotel de esta categoría y pagando 400€ la noche no deberían de darse

title: Un hotel ideal para hacer turismo en Viena.
positive_comment: Precioso edificio histórico en la zona histórica de Viena, a metros de los museos, los palacios, la Ópera y el Musikverein, y la zona de tiendas. Todo a pocos minutos.
negative_comment: En algunas cosas necesita un repaso. Pero las habitaciones son muy cómodas y silenciosas.

title: Vacaciones en Viena!
positive_comment:
El hotel es muy lindo se quedan cortas las fotografías en el página de Booking, es otro nivel.

La ubicación es perfecta cerca de todos los puntos más importantes de Viena, lo mejor a un costado de la Ópera para quienes hemos reservado alguna función durante nuestra estancia.

El desayuno del restaurante es de lo mejores que he probado en cualquier hotel de Europa, muy completo y con una amplia variedad para todos los gustos de verdad
que vale muchísimo la pena que lo incluyan en su reserva, estoy seguro que no se arrepentirán. 

Todo el personal del hotel desde la recepción, botones, camareros, servicio de limpieza todos con una excelente atención al cliente.

Definitivamente cuando regresemos a Viena volveremos a hospedarnos aquí!
negative_comment:
Ningún comentario negativo.  

La única recomendación es que el horario de room service fuera más amplio, tratamos de pedir algo de comer a las 10:30pm y nos indicaron que por la hora ya solo nos podían ofrecer bebidas.

title: Muy buena experiencia en Viena
positive_comment:
Ubicado justo en el centro. A distancia caminable de lo más importante de Viena.
El hotel tiene estilo antiguo como la ciudad pero es muy moderno igualmente.
El personal siempre fue muy amable.
Incluso fue el cumpleaños de mi hermano y le regalaron un pastel! También nos ayudaron con las reservas en restaurantes y espectáculos buenos.

title: Bienveillance, gentillesse dans un cadre magnifique, dans le centre de Vienne. Nous recommandons !
positive_comment:
Le choix de cet hôtel était lié à son emplacement central, avec un accès direct au centre historique et au transport en commun pour accéder aux différents sites touristiques à l'extérieur du centre ville.
Le personnel était bienveillant et très réactif. 
La chambre, y compris la salle de bain, étaient totalement comme sur les photos. Notre espace était très propre et très agréable.
Le petit-déjeuner, chouette moment de la journée, avec aussi un très bon accueil.
Nous avons aussi profité du bar rooftop de l'hôtel, averc une décoration hivernale très cocoon.
Bref, nous nous sommes sentis très bien accueillis.  Le service et nos demandes de bons "tuyaux" étaient vraiment au top.

title: Das Hotel versprüht den Wiener Charm. Wir fühlten uns bestens aufgehoben.
positive_comment: Die Zimmer sind gross und die Betten bequem. Die Lage ist ausgezeichnet. Das Personal sehr zuvorkommend. Das Frühstück ist sehr vielseitig.
negative_comment: Die Zimmer sind schon etwas in die Jahre gekommen und könnten eine leichte Auffrischung brauchen. Die Storen waren defekt.

positive_comment: Wir kommen gerne in das Hotel, nicht zuletzt aufgrund der phantastischen Lage direkt im Zentrum. Auch ist das Frühstück mit seinen umfangreichen Wahlmöglichkeiten weit überdurchschnittlich.
negative_comment: Manchmal wünscht man sich etwas mehr persönliche Betreuung betreffend Einchecken Fragen oder ähnlicher Anliegen.Ein Hotel dieser Klasse darf hier nicht unter das gewünschte und bezahlte Niveau sinken.

title: Wir haben unser Hotel gefunden i ganz besonderen Dank an Fr Vanessa speziellen Dank an Fr. Va
positive_comment:
Die Meschlicheit, bringt dieses altehrwürdige Gebäude zum Strahlen!

Ich habe Parkinson und bin im AKH zur 
DBS Operation in ca. Einem Jahr vorgesehen. Eine starke Beeinträchtigung ist unübersehbar. Zum Frühstück kamen wir durch einen Komplett Ausfall von mir zu spät. Wir wurden hervorragend bedient und von den Herren wurde ich am Buffet gestürzt und begleitet und das unauffällig und unaufgefordert. Wir haben. Wir hatten  noch etwas am Zimmer tun fuhren mit einer  neuen Schlüssel Karte nochmal rauf wo ich in aller Ruhe mit meiner lieben Frau auf unseren Wagen warte den ein freundlicher junger Mann brachte.

Meine Damen und Herren   Respekt!
Mit freundlichen Grüßen 
Friedrich Laimighofer
negative_comment: Nichts

title: Nicht alles was Gold ist, glänzt.

title: Sicher ein Hotel wo man wieder besuchen kann.
positive_comment: Sehr gutes Frühstück. Sehr gutes Bett. Freundliches Person. Gute Lage. Das Hotel ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen.
negative_comment: Die Getränkepreise sind etwas hoch. Deswegen sucht man sich etwas anderes in der Stadt.

title: Die Atmosphäre im ganzen Hotel ist einfach wunderschön.
positive_comment: Klimaanlage funktionierte bei der Anreise nicht. Sehr netter Techniker hat das Problem umgehend behoben. Service beim Frühstück ist perfekt. Auch bei großem Andrang behält das Personal die Ruhe und verliert nie den Überblick. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist hervorragend und sieht auch bei starkem Andrang immer ordentlich aus. Wir waren schon in mehreren Hotels der gleichen Kategorie in Wien, aber hier gefällt es uns am besten.
negative_comment: Ich verstehe, dass der Föhn im Bad in die Schublade beim Waschtisch passen soll. Jedoch sollte er trotzdem seine Funktion erfüllen. Wir hatten einen eigenen Föhn dabei, und so war das nicht so schlimm für uns. Falls einmal neue Geräte erforderlich sind, sollte man sich Gedanken darüber machen.

title: Wer klassische Grand Hotels mag, kommt voll auf seine Kosten.

title: Wunderbar entspannt

negative_comment: Gefehlt hat mir das Frischluftschnappen nach der Sauna (Jammern auf sehr hohem Niveau…)

title: Wunderbar
positive_comment: Es war ein sehr schöne Hotel. İn der Nähe der  Stadtzentrum. Ich würde wieder hier bleiben wenn ich züruck im Wien komme :) Vielen Dank.

Localização, cama muito confortável, pequeno-almoço excelente. Uma palavra especial pelo funcionário do pequeno-almoço, não fiquei com o seu nome, mas realmente uma lufada de ar fresco. Um obrigado especial a ele.
negative_comment: Entendo que seria um edifício antigo que foi recuperado, então só tem um elevador. Nada de mais e que em nada afetou a nossa estadia.

title: A surpresa de Viena
positive_comment: A localização do hotel é excelente. Os funcionários são muito simpáticos e proporcionaram um ambiente fantástico em todas as interações. O rooftop do Lamée é excecional. Ótimas bebidas e atendimento muito simpático. O restaurante que faz parte do grupo, também é muito bom. Quando voltar um dia, certamente repito a experiência de ficar aqui hospedada.
negative_comment: Não tenho criticas negativas a fazer, apenas uma observação, o quarto poderia ter estores, mas os blackout funcionam bem.

title: Excelente localização para conhecer Viena
positive_comment: Quarto de tamanho generoso. Camas confortáveis. O pequeno-almoço é bom.
negative_comment: O facto de o hotel funcionar em 2 edifícios é estranho. No Topazz há quartos, a recepção e o pequeno-almoço. No edifício em frente (Lamée) há quartos e um rooftop. Por causa do rooftop a porta da rua do Lamée está aberta e é normal entrarem clientes do rooftop para o elevador que dá acesso aos quartos e que funciona sem cartão. O acesso ao corredor dos quartos só ocorre com cartão. A casa de banho é aberta.

title: Excelente estadia
positive_comment: Quarto confortável. Bom pequeno almoço. Boa localização. Funcionários super simpáticos

title: Excelente localização.
positive_comment: A excelente localização é pequeno almoço dentro do esperado. Bons quartos e limpeza.
negative_comment: O facto de no último dia não nos terem mudado as toalhas de banho e o RoofTop apesar de indicarem que ia reabrir no verão maninha-se fechado.

positive_comment: Very central to U1. Clean towels every day. Provided iron and board when asked
negative_comment: No extra pillows when asked

positive_comment:
We stayed in the Lamee building. Our suite was gorgeous- much bigger than we expected. Our beds were super comfortable, and we loved the robes that were left for us to use. 
The bathroom had dual sinks, a bath and a really great shower. We also appreciated the external blinds that can be put down to totally block the light from the large windows. 
The hotel staff we met when checking in/out at Topazz were all lovely.
negative_comment:
We thought that the €33 charge for breakfast was very high, so went to get breakfast elsewhere. 
We went for a drink on the Lamee rooftop but found service very slow. We stood for a long time before being shown to a table, and it then took around 10 or 15 minutes for us to be served. We also thought that €17 for a cocktail was pretty expensive- higher than most places in London, where we live.

title: I would recommend this hotel happily as ticked all our boxes
positive_comment: Very central location, handy for sights, restaurants and local transport. The breakfast was excellent, good quality and cooked to order. Pleasant staff and comfortable, spacious room.

title: Location is Superb.
positive_comment: The room gives a posh vibes. Location is superb. The staff upon check-in was very nice. That I can leave the luggage’s for sometime. Breakfast staff were so attentive.Thankful.
negative_comment:
Noise from neighbors doors during day time. 
Upon check-out, some unfriendly energy from the receptionist. Perhaps They’re already tired.

title: Great stay! Great location! Photogenic room!
positive_comment: Great location, very comfy! Felt like home and very clean! We loved the circle windows and the sound proofed rooms! They also provided very good coffee and a complementary wine and chocolate! The shower products were exceptional and they restocked everyday!
negative_comment: The shower mixer valve was broken and couldn’t be adjusted to the right temperature but it was sufferable. The staff was overall disengaged and  apathetic and some members of the staff were  a bit rude.. except the cleaning ladies who were very polite.

title: fabuleux et inoubliable
positive_comment:
L'hôtel est magnifique, le personnel à votre écoute, le concierge d'excellents conseils pour des visites, des sorties, des restaurants, le petit-déjeuner fabuleux, l'emplacement au centre de la vieille ville, proche de tous les points historiques, de la grande rue commerçante, des stations de métro et de taxi devant l'hôtel.
Bref, rien n'a redire.
De plus, j'ai été surclassé... cela restera un souvenir inoubliable... et si je dois revenir à Wienn, je n'irai qu'au Grand Hôtel

title: Un séjour parfait et exceptionnel dans un hôtel d une très grande qualité
positive_comment: Tout était exceptionnel. J’y ai fêté mes 50 ans , nous avons été surclassés dans une suite grandiose, cela m a fait énormément plaisir. Le personnel est très sympathique et très professionnel, a l ´écoute et aux petits soins . Nous avons mangé dans tous les restaurants de l’hôtel qui sont d’une très grande qualité surtout le 1870 , incroyable ! Et le Japonais excellent ! Le sushi bar aussi ouvert toute la journée, très bon et très pratique.. nous remercions tous le personnel et particulièrement notre femme de chambre , le serveur Dénis de la brasserie, le chef et serveur du restaurant 1870 , le cuisinier du sushi bar , le masseur Léon , les pianistes , la conciergerie et les bagagistes Dragan et Srecko , les réceptionnistes et Vanessa .. pour nous avoir fait passer un séjour merveilleux… Le petit déjeuner est extraordinaire, tout est frais et énormément de choix ! Nous avons hâte de revenir …

title: Exceptionnel

title: Delightful stay in a beautiful hotel in the heart of Vienna, just next to the Opera.
positive_comment: This is a beautiful hotel, in particular the larger rooms facing the Ringstrasse.  No issues with noise as the double glazing is very effective. Would highly recommend, although it isn't cheap so needs to either be a treat (or on expenses!)

title: Highly Recommended – Central, Elegant and Comfortable
positive_comment:
We had a wonderful stay at the hotel. The location is absolutely perfect, right in the heart of the city and within walking distance to all major attractions.

We were pleasantly surprised to receive a room upgrade, which made our stay even more special. The hotel itself is very elegant and stylish, and the rooms are thoughtfully designed and extremely comfortable.

The staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay. Cleanliness was impeccable, and everything was very well maintained.

Breakfast is à la carte and truly excellent — a great way to start the day.

Overall, we were extremely satisfied and would definitely stay here again. Highly recommended!

title: A gem.
positive_comment:
An elegant, beautiful and comfortable base for a visit to Vienna.
Without exception, every staff member was efficient, helpful, friendly: true hospitality professionals.
I liked sitting in the bar, listening to the piano, the breakfast was superb as well as dinner. And I especially loved ascending the grand staircase to access our room.
And our room was spacious and quiet: a lovely retreat after a day of sightseeing.
And so well located.
Everything was just excellent.

positive_comment: Eindrucksvolles Ambiente, schnelle Fahrstühle, guter Service, gutes Frühstücksbuffet bezogen auf die Speisen
negative_comment:
Keine Selbstbedienung bei Kaffee,der dann dünn, lauwarm mit kalter Milch serviert wurde. Auf Nachfrage wurde mir besserer Kaffee mit heißer Milch gebracht. Keine echten Säfte. Nur Fruchtsaftgetränke aus dem Automaten. 
Zimmer:
Schön anzusehen mit zahlreichen Mängeln. Der lose Duschkopf im Bad und der kaputte Sessel im Zimmer wurden zügig ausgetauscht bzw repariert. Im Badezimmer unterschiedliche Leuchtstärken der Lampen, bemalte billige Pressspannplatte als Verkleidung unter dem Waschbecken, was bei 5 Sternen ein No go ist. Antiquierte Klimaregulierung und am schlechtesten waren die beiden Einzelbetten, die auf Rollen waren, welche trotz Fixierung nicht gehalten haben und man vorsichtig mit den Betten umgehen musste, damit diese nicht durch den Raum wandern. Die Kopfkissen ohne wirkliches Füllmaterial und die Matratze zu weich.
Der Hocker im Zimmer war auch durchgesessen. Keine Steckdosen am Bett. Nur unten hinter dem Schrank für die Lampen. 
Das Bad ist sehr klein. Duschen nur über eine abgesenkte Badewanne möglich. In diesem 5 Sterne Hotel gibt es keine separate Dusche in dem 35 qm Zimmer. 
In der Pflege und Wartung ausbaufähig, dann wäre es auch für uns eine Option, dahin wiederzukommen.

positive_comment:
Die Lage und die Freundlichkeit des Personals.

negative_comment: Die Zimmereinrichtung inkl. Bad ist schon was in die Zeit gekommen....

title: Monarchisch verwöhnen lassen
positive_comment: Geschmackvoll zuckersüß hochwertig ausgestattet mit einem durchdachten, zuvorkommendem Gesamtkonzept. Hier fühlte ich mich tatsächlich wie eine Königin, denn ich wurde bei Ankunft im Zimmer mit handgemachten Süßigkeiten und dem Hauswein begrüßt. Die Lage ist atemberaubende 200 vom Stephansdom und ebenso von der "Instituion" Café Korb". Phänomenal!

title: Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und kommen bei Bedarf gerne wieder!!
positive_comment: Die Lage ist top! Die Freundlichkeit des Personals, ebenso! Der Frühstücks- bzw. Aufenthaltsraum wunderschön und fein dass man sich Kleinigkeiten ohne Aufpreis nehmen kann! Die Größe der Suite und der Ausblick, perfekt! So nett dass man im Zimmer mit einem persönlichem Schreiben, Macarons und einer Flasche Wein begrüßt wird!!! Die Einrichtung hat mir extrem gut gefallen, der Teppich ist farbentechnisch etwas gewöhnungsbedürftig. Die Riesenfenster wahnsinnig sauber!! Bei geschlossenen Fenstern, extrem ruhig!
negative_comment: Man könnte vor der Couch noch einen Wohnzimmertisch anbringen. Vielleicht ein paar Bügel mehr zum Aufhängen, das Licht im Bad beim Spiegel könnte heller sein (zum Schminken). Oder ein beleuchteter Schminkspiegel wäre auch toll!

title: Top Hotel, Top Personal, top Lage
positive_comment:
Du Lage ist top alles zu Fuß erreichbar. 
Zimmer absolut genial! Sauberkeit 10/10, Bad 10/10. technisch hochmodern und doch ganz im Wiener jugend Stil. Liebe zum Detail 12/10. überall nette Aufmerksamkeiten für den Gast. 
Im Restaurant stehen tagsüber Getränke, Wein und Gebäck/ Kuchen kostenfrei zur Verfügung. 
Es wird ein jeder Wunsch von den Augen abgelesen. 
Das Personal is Erstklassig und weiss wie man Gäste behandelt.
Wie kommen wieder
negative_comment: Alles hat gefallen

positive_comment: Frühstück war 10 Sterne! A-la-Card-Frühstück macht einfach vieles entspannter, es war köstlich.
negative_comment: Teppichboden in den Zimmer und teilweise nicht ganz sauber.

title: Wunderbar
positive_comment:
Unser Aufenthalt im Hotel The Leo Grand war in jeder Hinsicht außergewöhnlich. Wir haben uns vom ersten Moment an rundum wohlgefühlt. Das Interieur wurde mit außergewöhnlich viel Liebe zum Detail gestaltet – jedes Element wirkt sorgfältig ausgewählt und harmonisch aufeinander abgestimmt. Wunderbar.
Das Personal ist überaus zuvorkommend, herzlich und professionell, sodass man sich als Gast wirklich geschätzt fühlt. Besonders beeindruckt hat uns die einzigartige Lage sowie die faszinierende, traditionsreiche Geschichte des Hauses. 
Wir sind positiv überrascht und kommen sehr gerne wieder.

title: Ein wunderbares Boutique Hotel im Herzen Wiens
positive_comment:
Ein wunderbares Boutique-Hotel in bester Innenstadtlage. Viele Sehenswürdigkeiten sind bequem zu Fuß erreichbar.
Die Einrichtung ist stilvoll, gehoben und sehr geschmackvoll mit Liebe zum Detail, man fühlt sich sofort wohl.
Das Frühstück war ausgezeichnet: hochwertige Auswahl, frisch und liebevoll präsentiert.
Besonders positiv ist uns das sehr zuvorkommende und freundliche Personal aufgefallen – aufmerksam, professionell und herzlich.
Insgesamt ein rundum gelungener Aufenthalt. Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen.
negative_comment: Nur die Raumdüfte waren für unser persönliches Empfinden teilweise etwas intensiv.

positive_comment: Perfekte Lage und ideale Grösse. Wunderbares Beispiel um typisches Wien zu erleben. Wunderschönes Zimmer geschmackvoll eingerichtet und hochwertiges Bett. Was will man mehr?
negative_comment: Wirklich nichts zu bemängeln…

positive_comment: Posizione stupenda davanti alla fermata della metro e ideale per fare qualunque tipo di escursione. Personale super gentile e disponibile, con camere funzionali ed eleganti. Dotate di ogni confort, anche in bagno.

La stanza era impeccabile: pulita, elegante e confortevole, con ogni dettaglio curato per garantire il massimo del relax.
La vista sulla città di Vienna era mozzafiato. Un soggiorno perfetto che consiglio vivamente a chiunque voglia scoprire il cuore di Vienna con il massimo del comfort e della qualità.

positive_comment:
Siamo stati coccolati, il check in non è il solito luogo chiassoso ma un salottino confortevole.

La camera è meravigliosa e tutti gli accessori sono proprio da 5 stelle.

Anche la sala per la colazione sembra un giardino d'inverno , dove i caldi colori della tappezzeria ti rilassano .

Infine la sua posizione, ottima perché ci troviamo in zona centralissima e non abbiamo avuto bisogno dell'auto per spostarci.
Pulizia e attenzione di tutto il personale, la posizione é speciale

In addition to the timing, there were also oversights and shortages of products to serve at the table. This feedback is not a criticism in itself, but a suggestion to improve a truly weak point of this wonderful hotel.
