negative_comment: Otelin her alanına erişim yoktu. Örneğin bahçe kısmına erişim maalesef ki bir çalışanın eşlik etmesiyle çok kısa şekilde mümkündü. Restoran alanı yılbaşı öncesi dolayısıyla mı bilmiyorum ama çok dar ve küçük bir alandı. Odaya sıkışmış hissettim. Kaldığımız oda Victoria idi ve bir de yatak bir çift için elverişli değil. yorgan ebatı yeterli gelmiyordu. 2 ayrı yorgan ile uyuduk ve doğrusunu söylemek gerekirse uykumuz rahat değildi.

positive_comment: Straßenbahn gleich in der Nähe und das man in ca 20 Minuten im Zentrum ist.
negative_comment: Parkplatz sehr teuer. Frühstücksrsum  sehr eng. Habe 70 Prozent Behinderung. In fast jedem Hotel muss ich keine Tourismus Abgabe nicht bezahlen. Habe nachgefragt und bekam als Antwort nein. Gibt es bei uns nicht.Wss mich auch gestört hat das ich vorher das Zimmer bezahlen muss bevor wir es benutzen könnten.

title: Für einen Städtetrip sehr zu empfehlen
positive_comment: Direkt beim Hauptbahnhof gelegen. Überaus freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal. Modernes und sauberes Hotel.

title: Angenehmer Zwischenstopp auf einer 1. Klasse-Interrailreise
positive_comment: Modernes, den Maßstäben entsprechendes 4-Sterne-Hotel schräg gegenüber des Grazer Hauptbahnhofs. Trotz der großen Kreuzung war das Zimmer (zur Kreuzung) ruhig. Alles schön sauber und komfortabel eingerichtet. Großes Frühstücksbuffet.
negative_comment: Es fehlte Rührei mit Speck. Gegenüber Hotels dieser Kategorie, die in historischen Gebäuden untergebracht sind, fehlt in modernen Gebäuden wie hier ein gewisser Esprit, auch wenn alles komfortabel gestaltet ist.

title: Es hat gepasst. Wir würden wiederkommen.
positive_comment: Lage war spitze, Frühstücksbuffet ausreichend und vielfältig.
negative_comment: Aussicht in einen kleinen Innenhof.

title: Sehr gutes Hotel für einen Grazaufenthalz
positive_comment: Ausgezeichnetes Frühstück, sehr bemühtes Personal, sehr gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis.
Das Hotel ist sehr schön und Frühstück auch super 👍
Posizione ottima, praticamente di fronte alla stazione ferroviaria e con un negozio di noleggio bici attaccato

title: Graz ok

positive_comment: Tutto perfetto come sempre. Ottima posizione, camere non grandissime, ma con tutto il necessario e sopratutto silenziosissime anche se danno direttamente su una delle strade più trafficate della città. Ricca colazione a buffet e personale gentile. Ottimo qualità prezzo.

Excellent breakfast every day and we ate dinner in the restaurant one evening which was delicisious.

title: Soggiorno nel comfort e relax!
positive_comment: Posizione centrale, noleggio biciclette dietro l'hotel. Colazione a ala carta eccellente di qualità. Servizio e staff gentili ed efficienti. Avessimo in Italia dipendenti così che onorano il loro lavoro. Pulizia 10 e lode. Il cambio asciugamani la sera. Spa piccola ma molto riservata e soprattutto aperta fino alle 22 è un ottimo servizio per i clienti. La camera era superlativa, arredi nuovi, di stile e pulitissima. Prodotti Top al bagno Acqua di Parma. Booking ci ha dato l'upgrade gratuito per la stanza che aveva la vista proprio sulla via principale ed era molto luminosa. Abbiamo provato anche il ristorante, direi meritevole, cucina raffinata e buona. L'hotel ha fatto la differenza nel rendere piacevole a vacanza a Vienna.

title: una bellissima struttura in pieno centro
positive_comment: Struttura molto bella e confortevole in ottima posizione a pochi passi dal teatro dell’Opera e dalla zona pedonale che porta a Santo Stefano. Tram e metro a pochi passi. Camera molto confortevole, con ampia doccia e molti accessori.  La SPA è piccolina ma confortevole ed efficiente. La colazione, servita al tavolo nell’annesso ristorante con ampio e prelibato menu, è davvero un “must”. Personale molto gentile. Il ristorante per la cena serve piatti ricercati e molto elaborati nella presentazione ma … a prezzi “importanti”. È attivo però anche un servizio in stanza con menu diurno e menu notturno.
negative_comment: Il menu del ristorante (dove si propone un menu degustazione a 7 portate a €.190/persona bevande escluse) non è visibile in stanza e lo si scopre solo una volta seduti a tavola. Stanti i prezzi potrebbe risultare una sgradevole sorpresa. Il cibo poi, creativo e molto elaborato, non è esaltante. Il bar la sera (dopo teatro ad esempio) offre solo da bere con qualche oliva. Sarebbe stato gradito almeno qualche snack …

title: Loved the hotel, the location, the service.
positive_comment:
We had a lovely four night stay at the Amauris.
Really lovely hotel. We had three rooms to accommodate our family. Each of the rooms were wonderful. Plenty of room and the hotel had put us in rooms close together on the same floor.  We could not fault the rooms. They were spotlessly clean and housekeeping was excellent. 
We found all the staff to be very pleasant and very attentive. 
Breakfast was excellent with plenty of choice and made fresh when ordered. We could not fault the choice and quality of the food at breakfast.
negative_comment:
We were staying as a family - six adults, one child and one infant. 
Unfortunately, we found the dining options to be a bit limited and therefore only had breakfast in the hotel which was a shame. 
Anyone considering a stay at the hotel should check the dinner menu to check it meets with your tastes.

positive_comment:
To each member of the wonderful Amauris team I wanted to express my sincere gratitude for your outstanding service during our stay.
The attention to detail and friendly demeanor of your team members exceeded my expectations. I was especially impressed with how you 
surprised our daughter with a celebration of her birthday with a cake and a beautiful singing by the staff members.
The food was amazing. 
The beds are comfortable. 
The location is perfect. 
Your hotel will definitely be the destination on our next visit to Vienna. 
Thank you for making our experience so memorable.
Sincerely
M. Alterki

title: Great stay in a perfect location
positive_comment: The location was excellent, and the hotel itself was modern and very well maintained. Both the facilities and the room were clean. It was a nice bonus to relax with a drink at the bar. The staff were friendly and happy to accommodate extra requests.
negative_comment: The room layout felt a bit too intimate. The shower door was see-through, and the toilet only had an obscure glass door rather than a solid one, which reduced privacy.

title: I definetly recomend The Amauris Hotel
positive_comment: As a frequent traveller to Vienna, I have been truly impressed with The Amauris Hotel. I spent two nights at the property, and thanks to the excellent service and professionalism received, they were for sure memorable and relaxing. Upon arrival, I got an amazing upgrade to a beautiful room. Attention to detail in this hotel is for sure on another level. The stylish and yet cosy design, ultra-comfortable bed, exceptional cleanliness level, relaxing spa and atmosphere, delicious and high-quality food, and highly trained staff members definitely left a positive impact on me. I was really able to relax in the best possible way during my 3-day gateway to Vienna. I definitely recommend The Amauris Hotel and for sure will come back again soon.

title: Great modern hotel with excellent rooms, but overpriced parking and a very small sauna.
positive_comment:
The hotel is brand new, very stylish, modern, and beautifully designed.
Everything feels exceptionally clean and well maintained.
The staff is friendly, attentive, and genuinely pleasant.
Free minibar in the room — a very nice touch.
The room itself is extremely spacious and comfortable.
Heated bathroom floors are a huge plus — incredibly cozy and practical.
negative_comment:
The pillows were not comfortable at all.
The fridge is far too small. For such a large and upscale hotel, the sauna is surprisingly tiny and feels cramped.
The location is good if you plan to walk to the center or travel by car, but hotel parking is outrageously priced — 40 EUR per day, which is honestly unreasonable. I strongly recommend using the Payuca app instead: you can park in the same building, level –2, for half the price. On weekends (Saturday/Sunday), parking costs only 14 EUR per day.

title: Komfortabler Kurztrip mit Parkplatz
positive_comment: Die Lage war hervorragend. Das Zimmer war zwar klein, aber für einen kurzen Aufenthalt von ein bis zwei Tagen völlig ausreichend. Auch die Parkmöglichkeiten in der Parkgarage direkt unter dem Hotel sind hervorragend und mit 15 € pro Tag sehr günstig. Falls man länger als 24 Stunden parkt, bezahlt man die zusätzlichen Stunden anschließend direkt am Automaten in der Garage. Das wurde zwar nicht ganz verständlich erklärt, die Mitarbeiterin war jedoch sehr freundlich und meinte, dass wir bei Problemen jederzeit wieder zur Rezeption kommen können, damit wir gemeinsam eine Lösung finden.

Très bien situé en ligne droite depuis la gare, à l'entrée du centre-ville. Personnel aimable et serviable. Locaux paisibles. C'est un peu moins confortable qu'un Ibis standard mais ça va parfaitement pour ce que nous étions venus faire : dormir.
negative_comment:
Aucun problème digne de ce nom à signaler. Je pourrais juste dire qu'au vu de la place disponible dans la chambre, il pourrait y avoir un peu plus de chaises notamment (en fait il n'y en a pas du tout, juste une sorte de tabouret), et aussi que je ne compris pas comment ménager une obscurité complète, c'est-à-dire comment fermer le store intégralement, il y avait quelques centimètres de fenêtre qui demeuraient forcément découverts. 
Je dois aussi signaler que le lit du dessus, pour l'éventuelle troisième personne, est réservé aux enfants de 6 à 12 ans, donc cette chambre ne convient pas à toutes les personnes voyageant à trois.

title: Gute Lage, super Frühstück
positive_comment:
Die Lage ist absolut perfekt für einen Kurztrip nach Graz. Alles ist zu Fuss gut erreichbar z.B. Innenstadt und Schlossberg.
Das Frühstück ist sehr gut und das gesamte Personal war ausgesprochen freundlich und hilfsbereit.
negative_comment: Die nicht so gute Bewertung beim Komfort liegt daran, dass die Zimmer leider keine Klimaanlage haben, daher ist es, wenn es draußen warm ist, auch im Zimmer und v.a. im Bad doch sehr warm. Und da das Hotel in einer Fussgängerzone mit vielen Lokalen liegt, ist es bei offenem Fenster auch ein wenig laut.

positive_comment:
Die Lage direkt in der Altstadt , mit Blick auf den Uhrenturm ,die Kunsthalle und die kurzen Wege zum Bahnhof und Tram , machten uns die Besichtigungen sehr leicht.Die Touristeninfo ist auch sehr gut ausgestattet und so waren Wanderungen durch die Klam und an dem wunderschönen Fluss entlang auch problemlos, obwohl wir mit der DB angereist sind.
Das Hotel ist schon sehr alt und so sollte man nicht mit neuen Leitungen im Bad rechnen.
negative_comment: Siehe oben Bad, aber das ist nebensächlich. Ich habe die Badewanne sehr genossen und wusste,dass es kein Neubau ist.

positive_comment: Die Lage ist top! Personal sehr freundlich. Frühstück war ganz gut :-)
negative_comment: Der Lärmpegel von draußen war ein Wahnsinn! Hat unsere Nachtruhe leider sehr beeinträchtigt.

title: Hotel in linea con le aspettative
positive_comment: Essendo un hotel della catena IBIS Budget, nel complesso è risultato essere in linea con altri hotel della stessa catena che ho frequentato: camera essenziale, pulita, assolutamente confacente ad un uso di breve durata. Posizione centrale, possibilità di usufruire di un garage (a pagamento) in una zona dove non è possibile trovare pacheggio agevolmente.
negative_comment: L'accoglienza: la persona che ci ha accolto era tutt'altro che empatica, poco disponibile a fornire informazioni. Fortunatamente ha rimediato abbondantemente la collega al ceck-out con i suoi sorrisi e aiiutandoci all'uscita quando il tagliando del garage non funzionava: ha raggiunto il garage e prontamente contattato l'assistenza remota per farci uscire.

title: Graz è sempre bella, accogliente, ha una grazia che ti fa sentire a casa!
positive_comment: Posizione centralissima, personale disponibile e simpatico, prezzo ottimo!

title: Hotel molto basico
positive_comment: Prezzo. Posizione non centrale, ma a 10 minuti a piedi dal centro. Garage a 15 euro al giorno sotto l'hotel.
negative_comment: Hotel molto basico. Pulizia buona, ma non eccelsa. Colazione scarsa.

positive_comment: Ottimo il parcheggio in convenzione a €15,00 per 24h

title: OTTIMO
positive_comment: posizione vicino al centro. Parcheggio prossimo al hotel (costa 15 euro, per fortuna nelle zone IL parcheggio con linea blue da sabato pomeriggio e domenica/festivo è gratis. ( Ho approfittato),
negative_comment: Quello che vedi nella foto, è quello che ce. Non mobili in più. Manca il bidè. Mancava asciugamano per le mano.

title: Tutto bello ma il garage...
positive_comment: Stanza pulita e accogliente, struttura centralissima alle spalle della vivace Lendplatz
negative_comment: Avevamo richiesto il garage per parcheggiare la moto e ci avevano confermato la disponibilità. All'arrivo ci hanno comunicato che non era adatto per le moto e rischiavamo una multa. Abbiamo dovuto parcheggiare in strada, dove è permessa solo la sosta temporanea a pagamento, gratis il parcheggio sulle strisce blu dalle 20,00 alle 9,00. Davvero poco piacevole per chi arriva con la moto carica da un viaggio lungo, malgrado la zona tranquilla.

title: hotel smart in pieno centro
positive_comment: Camera piccola ma molto pratica perfetta per una famiglia di genitori con un bambino, ottima accoglienza con possibilità di mettere le bici con cui stavamo viaggiando attraverso l'austria in una stanza sicura vicino alla reception.
negative_comment: Colazione migliorabile per varietà e per disponibilità di alimenti anche oltre l'orario di inizio pasto. verso le 10 c'erano già meno cose.

positive_comment:
Hotel direi centrale, posizione strategica fra stazione dei treni e centro storico.
La camera decorosa e pulita per lo standard che propone.
Da migliorare l'intensità delle luci (un po' troppo basse).

title: Ibis c'è!!!
positive_comment: La ragazza dell' accoglienza veramente gentile, la posizione ottima.

title: Buon compromesso se ci si adatta agli spazi stretti
positive_comment: A 10 minuti a piedi dal centro e 15 dalla stazione, appartamento funzionale per una sosta di pochi giorni in città, prezzo contenuto
negative_comment: Stanza un po' piccola per 3 persone anche per un budget hotel

title: Boa qualidade preço
positive_comment:
Atendimento bom e antecipado
Boa localização
Seguro
Bom quarto e arrumação
Bom pequeno almoço
negative_comment: Nada a apontar

title: Aconchegante
positive_comment: O hotel encontra-se entre a estação de comboio/autocarro e o centro turístico o que para mim foi uma boa localização. (10 min entre ambos). O staff foi simpático e deixou-nos pousar mochilas antes da horas do check-in.
negative_comment: A televisão era muito pequena.

title: Room for one night
positive_comment:
Overall, everything was good for a short stay. Check-in was quick, and the staff were very friendly. The hotel was quiet and suitable for families with children. Parking cost 22 euros per day.
We liked the breakfast, and there was a small selection of fruits and cold snacks.
negative_comment: There was no hairdryer, and there were only two towels even though three people were staying.

title: Clean and excellent price.
positive_comment: It was everything clean, the receptionist was nice and helpful.
negative_comment: I was not so happy with breakfast, I missed sweets and fruits.

positive_comment: Simple accommodation with a parking option near the city centre. For the parking, park in one of the lower floors as the first is reserved for the Bila supermarket, take you ticket to reception and pay the reduced rate which will give you a full 24 hours of parking with a ticket you can use the enter and exit multiple times.
Regular breakfast for a budget hotel. Good coffee, fewer choices of fruits/veggies, but will perfectly keep you going throught the day.
negative_comment: Excellent price/quality ratio. The room feels more like a dorm, but it is very clean.

positive_comment: It was near the centet and clean...the staff was great...great value for the location

title: Value
positive_comment:
Breakfast is good
Value for money, room is great
Staff is lovely
Great spot if you are looking to book cheaper, okay hotel.
negative_comment: Pillows and bed are a bit uncomfortable

title: Good budget stay with easy parking, but Wi-Fi could be better.
positive_comment: Great value for a one-night transit stay. The price was fair, the room had everything I needed, and the parking was easy to access. The €15 parking fee also felt reasonable.
negative_comment: The only real downside was the slow Wi-Fi — it was difficult to use for anything more than basic browsing.

title: Custo benefício bom. Good cost-benefit.
positive_comment:
Prático, funcional e simplificado.
It’s all practical, and easy.
negative_comment:
O quarto é bem pequeno.
The small room. That is the only bad part. All the rest are pretty good.

positive_comment: Ubicación muy buena, prácticamente en el centro, con un ambiente divertido. Desayuno muy correcto y personal muy amable y agradable.
Location, staff and everything at this place was awsome

title: Tolles Hotel am Hbf mit Rooftopbar
positive_comment: Freundliches Personal, unkomplizierter Check-in & -out, saubere und großzügige Zimmer, top Lage, bequemes, großes Bett, stylish und USP Rooftopbar Aurora.
negative_comment: Wasserdruck in der Dusche ziemlich mies, das geht besser. Zwar eine Kleinigkeit, nervt aber und muss bei der Hotel-Kategorie nicht sein.

title: Wenn man die Dame an der Rooftopbar ausblendet dann war das ein sehr angenehmer, komfortabler und feiner Aufenthalt!
positive_comment: Ein wunderschönes Interieur,  sehr durchdacht in der Ausstattung im Hotelzimmer (Bügeleisen Schuh Service Cafe Hygieneartikel…) wunderbares Frühstück( vielfältig, frisch, schmackhaft)
negative_comment: Lediglich in der Rooftopbar hat an diesem Tag die Empfangschefin wenig Freundlichkeit übrig gehabt, und hat hinter der Bar sich bei ihren Kollegen über Gäste gelästert , das fand ich unpassend) … und ist besonders deshalb auch aufgefallen weil das gesamte restliche Personal Rezeption Servicepersonal unten etc. ausgesprochen höflich, freundlich und zuvorkommend war!

positive_comment: Top Lage mit guter Verkehrsanbindung. Ganz tolles Fitnessstudio mit qualitativ hochwertigen Geräten. Schöne Skybar.
negative_comment: Dass die Skybar bereits um 24 Uhr schliesst.

positive_comment: Vor allem die sehr stilvoll abgestimmte Innenausstattung, die Architektur und das Personal. Frühstück ebenfalls sehr gut.
negative_comment: Die Matratzenhärte ist ein sehr subjektiver Punkt, den wohl jeder selbst beurteilen muss. Für mich waren die Matratzen etwas zu hart.

title: Toller Aufenthalt in einer tollen Stadt.
positive_comment: Reichhaltiges Frühstücksbuffet, das immer wieder aufgefüllt wurde mit sehr aufmerksamen Personal.
negative_comment: Zimmertemperatur war meist etwas kühl, obwohl Thermostat schon auf 24 Grad eingestellt war?!

title: Wir kommen wieder
positive_comment: Die Zimmer sind ausreichend groß, eigenes WC, im Bad sehr große Dusche, Kaffee, und Mini-Bar inklusive, das Frühstück ist üppig und erfüllt fast jeden Wunsch
negative_comment: Das Frühstück ist zwar sehr gut, wir haben 27, Euro bezahlt, für meine Tochter, welche wir zum Frühstück eingeladen haben musste ich 33 Euro bezahlen, was für ein Frühstück relativ teuer ist

positive_comment:
Es war von A - Z mega. Wir waren extrem überrascht.  SpaBereich dürfte größer sein, war aber ok. 

Frühstück ist seine 33 Euro wert

Lage ist nahe Bahnhof. Bushaltestelle für Hop-On-Hop-Off ist direkt vor dem Hotel,
Wir wurden erheblich vor der Checkin-Time ins Zimmer gelassen.....

title: Kommen gerne wiedee
positive_comment:
Tolles Personal, sehr aufmerksam und zu Kindern total freundlich. 
Zimmer ist super gemütlich und sehr gross.
negative_comment: Am Anfang der Woche war der Service etwas schwach.

title: Sehr angenehmes Hotel, riesen Auswahl beim Frühstück, angehm ruhig!
positive_comment: Es herrscht eine entspannte Stimmung in der Hotellobby was auch zum verweilen einlädt. Man fühlt sich wie in einem Wohnzimmer.
negative_comment: Das Personal an der Bar war leider nicht sehr bewandt bezüglich Auskünften über Sekt und Wein.

positive_comment: location excellent, room excellent for the price, breakfast could be better but it's fine

title: Very nice hotel for  exploring landmarks and business travelers
positive_comment: Very comfortable, exceptional location, very good breakfast, very helpful staff

Everything! 
From the most beautiful welcome at reception, to a lovely breakfast spread and a location that made all Graz easily accessible by foot or tram, this hotel is great.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Exceptional!
positive_comment:
Absolutely wonderful! Excellent location in the city centre - just next to Kunsthaus, near Hauptplatz, near Schlossberg, not far from railway station, next to tram stop. 
Amazing breakfast! So rich, anything you can imagine - they offer it.
Very kind staff - especially elderly receptionist and waitress with Eastern European accent.
Spacious rooms, very tidy and clean. Practically equipped.
At booking.com I read about noise from the street, so I asked for room directed to inner court and everything was fine.
To sum up, I was so satisfied here! I will surely recommend this hotel to my colleagues.
negative_comment: I used to come to breakfast between 7:00 - 7:30. Once I came at 8:00, some food was ran out and was not refilled.

title: A hotel with fantastic staff
positive_comment: A three star hotel with 6 star staff. Clean, nice, and excellent breakfast

title: I really liked Graz. a very nice city.
positive_comment: A lovely unspoilt hotel with a very friendly lady on reception. Lovely city and hotel is close to the River Mur where a series of bridges link to the old city and park.
negative_comment: Sadly, on the morning of my departure I had a problem with the fixture which converts from bath to shower waterflow. I had just take part in the local Graz parkrun so a shower would have been nice instead of climbing in and out of a bath with aching limbs. These things happen

positive_comment: The staff was absolutely wonderful and my only regret was that I didn't get to know their names so I could thank them personally.
negative_comment: The showers could use a renovation - bigger showers with new tile grout and silicone caulk, but everything else was great.

title: We loved our stay at the charming Hotel Mariahilf. The staff really enhanced our stay in Graz by how friendly and helpfu
positive_comment: The hotel Mariahilf exceeded our expectations. The staff were delightful. So professional and so friendly. The location was perfect. The rooms were very clean and tidy and the breakfast was delicious
negative_comment: The floors were a little bit creaky but we were happy to look past that as the building was built in the 1600’s!

positive_comment: Great hotel on great location. Very nice, quiet and clean rooms. Great breakfast. Staff is perfect! Great value for money. For sure I will back at this hotel again.
Ubicación y muy buen desayuno,  con muchas opciones....
negative_comment: Sería ideal poder elegir habitaciones con bañera incluida, no solo ducha

title: Un 5 stelle che a volte se lo scorda
positive_comment: Albergo moderno, nella parte nuova della città, vicino alla stazione. Camere molto ampie e belle, modernamente arredate con ricercatezza e stile, bagno confortevole con set di cortesia di Byredo. Ampia scelta di bar e ristoranti per mangiare o semplicemente prendere un caffè o un aperitivo. Garage a disposizione degli ospiti.
negative_comment: Il servizio non è all'altezza di un 5 stelle. Personale abbastanza scortese, soprattutto al check-in, le stanze vengono rifatte in fretta (e si vede) e non le preparano per la notte. Avremmo voluto prendere un aperitivo al roof garden, ma il forte odore di cibo (pesce) non era molto invitante. Peccato perché con un po' di attenzione sarebbe un ottimo albergo.

positive_comment: Struttura molto accogliente con personale sempre disponibile. Camere grandi e molto belle. Hotel vicino ai servizi pubblici che ti collegano alle maggiori attrazioni.

title: Weekend a Vienna
positive_comment: La stanza è ampia e silenziosa, i mobili sono di stile e le decorazioni della struttura sono bellissime, e c’è un grande spazio a lobby si può quindi rilassare e stare comodi. Poi abbiamo provato i ristoranti ed erano molto carini. Molto vicino dalla stazione ferrovia.
negative_comment:
La zona è un po’ deserta. 
La seconda notte non abbiamo dormito bene perché l’allarme dell’orologio nella stanza suonava alle 3:30 am, (noi non abbiamo mai toccato l’orologio) forse la persona di pulizia ha lasciato acceso perché ci siamo dimenticati di lasciare la mancia la mattina.

title: Exceptional hotel and stay.
positive_comment: Everything! Staff were lovely and very professional, room was amazing, breakfast was the best I’ve had in a hotel. Perfect location for us.  Rooftop bar is a must.

title: Very good. We are coming again.
positive_comment:
The room - size of the bed The location is good. There are always taxi's available in the front of the hotel.
The breakfast is ok.
Very good restaurant for dinner.
negative_comment: The restaurant closes at 10pm in the evening.

positive_comment: Everything was excellent, great room, wonderful staff and amazing restaurant
negative_comment: Nothing- it was amazing

title: Modern Hotel
positive_comment: Very modern decoration, nice artwork, and amazing view from the Aurora Bar. We didn't use the spa or gym but that is available in the hotel.
negative_comment: The mattress is more to the soft side rather than proper firm and the pillows as well. For me it was slightly uncomfortable. The room was also very warm and the thermostat could not be set to go below 18°C.

title: Perfect stay
positive_comment: After a long delayed time in the airport, this was a much needed respite. Staff were great for our young family, suite was very comfortable, breakfast was great.

title: Great modern hotel with excellent rooms, but overpriced parking and a very small sauna.
positive_comment:
The hotel is brand new, very stylish, modern, and beautifully designed.
Everything feels exceptionally clean and well maintained.
The staff is friendly, attentive, and genuinely pleasant.
Free minibar in the room — a very nice touch.
The room itself is extremely spacious and comfortable.
Heated bathroom floors are a huge plus — incredibly cozy and practical.
negative_comment:
The pillows were not comfortable at all.
The fridge is far too small. For such a large and upscale hotel, the sauna is surprisingly tiny and feels cramped.
The location is good if you plan to walk to the center or travel by car, but hotel parking is outrageously priced — 40 EUR per day, which is honestly unreasonable. I strongly recommend using the Payuca app instead: you can park in the same building, level –2, for half the price. On weekends (Saturday/Sunday), parking costs only 14 EUR per day.

title: Fantastic stay!
positive_comment: What a fantastic hotel! Everything was simply superb! The room, the food, the breakfast, the SPA, the cleanliness, and the staff. Simply fantastic.
negative_comment: The fact we didn't get to know that hotel prior :)

title: Magnifique, l’hôtel est incroyable
positive_comment: Excellente chambre, énorme et magnifique bien équipée, extrêmement confortable.
negative_comment: Peut être un jacuzzi en plus du sauna

title: Hôtel exceptionnel
positive_comment:
Un hôtel flambant neuf à deux pas du Belvédère, des chambres spacieuses et très bien équipées.
Le petit déjeuner est l'un des meilleurs qu'on a pu rencontrer lors de nos voyages.
Un personnel compétent et d'une gentillesse exceptionnelle. Bravo!!!

title: Hôtel confortable et luxueux
positive_comment: Très bel hôtel avec de grande chambre. Services a la hauteur  (spa, rooftop, restaurant)
negative_comment:
Le processus de check in n’est pas au top. On ne vous explique pas grand chose, notamment personne ne nous a dit que le Menage était fait un jour sur 2, il faut scanner un QR code dans l’ascenseur pour le savoir … 

L’hôtel n’est pas dans l’hyper centre de la ville

title: Great stay in a perfect location
positive_comment: The location was excellent, and the hotel itself was modern and very well maintained. Both the facilities and the room were clean. It was a nice bonus to relax with a drink at the bar. The staff were friendly and happy to accommodate extra requests.
negative_comment: The room layout felt a bit too intimate. The shower door was see-through, and the toilet only had an obscure glass door rather than a solid one, which reduced privacy.

title: Novo e confortável.
positive_comment: Quartos novos e excelentes, como seria de esperar de um Hotel Radisson. A preço razoável. Estacionamento na rua muito mais acessível.
negative_comment: Estacionamento cheio e caro. Na rua é muito mais barato.

positive_comment:
Dimensão do quarto.
Muito confortável.
Tudo limpo.
Simpatia dos funcionários.
De tudo . Da simpatia a limpeza o conforto . Bom pequeno almoço e bom jantar .
Proximidade do centro, pequeno almoço e conforto do quarto.
negative_comment: Nada a referir

title: Great short stay
positive_comment:
Great location for the station. 

The gym was in top condition and had a good selection of dumbbells and a cable gym. It was spotless. The gym was the highlight of my visit.  

The breakfast was plentiful and of good quality and was well manned with staff. They were trialling a new breakfast concept but I'm not sure what it was like before.

The room was comfortable and had lots of features. It appeared to be very new and recently refurbished. I was given a disabled room which had lots of accessibility features.

Despite some limited negative points my stay was really good.
negative_comment:
There were a few points for why I don't want to give a top score. 

The staff interactions were pleasant but not overly helpful.

I asked for an iron as there was none in the room - I was told housekeeping would deliver it but this did not happen so I gave up on ironing.

There were tea making facilities in the room but these had clearly been missed off the housekeeping check before I took up the room, as there was no coffee or sugar, only tea, milk and sweetener.

The TV in the room was huge and a recent Samsung model, but try as I might I could not get Chromecast to work despite it saying this was offered - I think the TV was not connected to the wi-fi but I couldn't sort this myself from the settings page.

The bar was closed during my visit which was a shame but this was advertised before arrival.

title: Enjoyable  and relaxing.
positive_comment: Comfortable bed, fitness centre, water and fruits ready at the reception.
negative_comment: The absence of alternative pillows for comfort.

positive_comment: Very good location within walking distance to Old town/Graz castle & a lot of amenities nearby
negative_comment: Very narrow entry & exit to the underground parking, Parking fee of EUR 24 per night

title: Excellent hotel and location
positive_comment: Excellent location for the station, very comfortable bed, very peaceful. Would have liked to be there for longer.
negative_comment: N/A

positive_comment:
Location right at the central station (but a good 20min walk (or else public transport ride) to the center through not the nicest part of town).

Sevice, design and comfort very consistent as this is part of a chain. Clean, nice and effecient. 

Very good breakfast.

title: Good stay in Graz
positive_comment: Very good location, almost in the centre of the Graz. Close to the main attractions as Main Square or Castle.
negative_comment: Nothing particular. In room was no kettel and fridge, but it is not necessary. Maybe the wardrobe in my room was old, but I saw in others that was the new one for example.

positive_comment: Very modern, good breakfast and close to the centre.

title: Una decision PERFECTA!!
positive_comment: El hotel reune todas las cualidades de un sitio en el que no te vas a arrepentir nunca. Desde que llegas y hasta que sales eres atendido con una calidad y un servicio de primera clase. Sus instalaciones son y estan perfectamente cuidadas, el personal (todo) se desvive por uno, la atencion, el cuidado y los detalles que tienen no son normales, la calidad y variedad de sus platos son excepcionales.  La ubicacion no puede ser mejor ya que esta justo en el medio de la zona antigua y la nueva.  Las vistas desde el hotel son unicas e inolvidables.
negative_comment: El haberme ido.

title: Una belleza de hotel
positive_comment: Todo!!!! Cuidan cada detalle y el personal muy amable
negative_comment: Nada

title: Acogedor hotel en el corazón de Salzburgo
positive_comment: Amplia y muy comfortable habitación con preciosas vistas al río Salzach (reservamos el suite). El desayuno fue muy variado y riquísimo. Atención y amabilidad de personal insuperable. El hotel, su diseño y aura encantador. Volvería :)
negative_comment: Todo estuvo muy bien.

title: Beautiful hotel in a beautiful city in a great location
positive_comment: Loved this hotel , location was great , it was traditional yet  up to date quality fittings , exceptional bathroom and decorations . Staff were great .
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Fab-u-lus
positive_comment: Superb in everyday you will not find better. Excellent location, professional staff and superior service with charm and elegance .
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment:

positive_comment:

Es gab einige sehr hochnäsige Gäste die auch unfreundlich mit dem Personal umgegangen sind. Das fanden wir sehr traurig. 
Für ein 5* hotel, wäre vielleicht ein kleiner Wellnessbereich schön gewesen aber aufgrund des Gebäudes und der Geschichte auch verständlich das sowas nicht immer gegeben ist

title: Ein perfekter Aufenthalt.
positive_comment:

Das Personal war sehr zuvorkommend, wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Wir kommen gern wieder.

title: Exceptional stay in Salzburg's best hotel.
positive_comment: Magnificent 5 star hotel in an outstanding location. Staff and service were exceptional and attentive throughout the stay. Room was beautifully finished and comfortable, ours had a balcony and view over the river to the old town and castle. The bar is absolutely top tier with an interesting range of cocktails. We had breakfast in the Sacher Cafe which was excellent, and dinner on our first night in the Sacher Grill - which was even better. I would happily stay again, and look forward to a time when I can return.

title: A perfect stay in a slice of Salzburg history with a real personal touch

title: Tolles Hotel
positive_comment:
Mir hat besonders das freundliche und aufmerksame Personal gefallen. Auch das Frühstücksbuffet war ansprechend, abwechslungsreich in einem Raum mit angenehmer Atmosphäre und sehr gutem Service 

Die Lage und damit auch Anbindung an den ÖPNV und die Sehenswürdigkeiten ist sehr gut.
negative_comment:
Ich war in einem Dachgeschosszimmer untergebracht.. Das Zimmer an sich war gut, aber die eingebaute Duschkabine war extrem klein/eng (gefühlte 50 bis 60 cm Schenkellänge).

Wofür das Hotel nichts kann, ist der nächtliche Lärm, eventuell nur am Wochenende (ging bis ca 4 Uhr früh) durch "Partyszene"
Bei geöffnetem Fenster war Schlafen daher absolut unmöglich.. Bei  geschlossenem Fenster kam es zu "Hitzestau" im Zimmer, was Schlafen auch verunmöglichte bzw. nur unter starker (körperlicher) Belastung ging.. Nun war es mit ca 5 Grad Celsius Außentemperatur noch kühl. Im Sommer halte ich diese Zimmer im Dachgeschoss, da keine Klimaanlage vorhanden, für nicht funktionsgerecht. Da würde ich nach Zimmern in den beiden  unteren Etagen und eventuell nach Zimmern Richtung Innenhof, falls es diese gibt, fragen. Der Lärm war extrem auf beiden Straßen (Kosaken und Mariahilfstr.). Mir tut das für das Hotel schrecklich leid, dass dessen Eindruck unter der Einwirkung lärmender Menschen in der Nacht leidet. Das hat das Hotel nicht verdient..

title: Très bel hôtel au cœur de la magnifique ville de Graz
positive_comment:
Nous avons tout aimé à commencer par l’emplacement de l’hôtel que nous n’imaginions pas si central ! La visite du centre de Graz commence dès que l’on sort de l’hôtel et tout se fait facilement à pied. Pour autant nous n’avons pas été importunés par le bruit de la rue. Les chambres sont spacieuses et les lits confortables. Le verre offert à l’arrivée est un petit plus que nous avons beaucoup apprécié. 
Le parking proposé à proximité de l’hôtel était un peu cher à notre goût et nous lui avons préféré un parking relais gratuit accessible en transport en commun (P+R Weinzödl).

La chambre était grande. L'emplacement parfait pour visiter Graz. Il n'y a eu aucun problème pour parquer la voiture dans le garage souterrain et l'hôtel avait un local pour mettre le vélo en sécurité. Le petit déjeuner était dans une jolie salle, il était copieux.

La iluminación me parecía muy pobre. Para utilizarla como habitación de turismo es suficiente, pero para trabajar unos días es una habitación que no es muy acogedora.

Ho apprezzato l’eleganza della struttura, l’arredamento della camera (con bollitore e minibar) e soprattutto il letto molto comodo. Il bagno era pulito e funzionale, con una bella doccia spaziosa. Possibilità di lasciare i bagagli dopo il check out, per un ultimo giro prima di partire. Alla reception lo staff è stato molto disponibile a fornire informazioni sulle mete da visitare.
negative_comment: Essendo un palazzo storico, probabilmente i serramenti delle finestre andrebbero rivisti, ma comunque si chiudevano molto bene e in camera c’era una clima adatto alla stagione.

The location was perfect.

title: Hôtel de charme !
positive_comment: Hôtel de charme très confortable et très bien situé au coeur de la vieille ville !

title: Beau Palais au centre de Graz

Personnel à l'accueil très sympathique.
Les équipements (Sauna et salle de sport) sont très bien.
Le petit-déjeuner est excellent et de bonne qualité.
negative_comment: L'hôtel est très difficile d'accès en voiture. L'adresse indique l'entrée du parking du centre commercial (qui doit être utilisé par les clients de l'hôtel) mais ce n'est pas clairement indiqué.

We loved our room as it was spacious with a great bathroom. 3) The staff is friendly, welcoming, and engaging.
negative_comment: We loved everything about the property. We would definitely return.

positive_comment:
Proximité 
Parking couvert moto gratuit (très rare)
negative_comment: Rien

title: Tout s'est bien passé
positive_comment: Tout s'est bien passé. Tout est comme décrit.  Je recommande.

title: Hôtel confortable bien situé pour visiter Graz
positive_comment:
Hôtel confortable situé à 10 minutes à pied du centre historique. Chambre très spacieuse et propre. Très bon petit petit déjeuner sous forme de buffet varié dans une salle agréable. Il y a même une terrasse pour les beaux jours.
Quelques places de parking sur réservation.
negative_comment: Mauvaise insonorisation, on entendait la télé du voisin. Ascenseur HS, ça arrive. Parking payant 15€ par jour.

positive_comment: Très agréable, avec possibilité de prendre le petit déjeuner sur la terrasse à l'extérieur. Présence d'un garage à vélo fermé à clé, ce qui est appréciable en ville.
negative_comment: L'ascenseur en panne, mais ce sont des choses qui arrivent.

title: Très bon hôtel de transistor pour motard
positive_comment:
Chambre très correct. Excellent accueil. Possibilité de garer une moto en parking sous terrain en toute sécurité.
Proche du centre ville.
Petit déjeuner de grande qualité.

title: Overall very good
positive_comment: Everything what I needed was there. The bed was comfortable and the room was clean and tidy.
negative_comment: Their was nothing what I didn't like.

positive_comment: L'accueil a été correct, la chambre correspondait aux critères mentionnés sur le site et sur Booking.  Le petit-déjeuner était varié, du choix pour tous les goûts. Nous sommes arrivés un dimanche, le réceptionniste nous a suggéré de nous garer à l'exterieur (gratuit jusque 9h), sympa.

positive_comment:
position de l'hôtel est top entre la gare et la vieille ville 
Accueil super à la réception, chambre spacieuse pour 3

title: bon séjour dans une ville bien agréable

negative_comment: rien à signaler

A 15min andando de la estación y a 7 minutos del centro..

I wanted to heat the bathroom and though the heating did not work, the personnel did not know what to do, then my boyfriend realised that the heater was working but only if the thermometer was on. I would recommend the manager to explain these things to the personnel, so that they can help the guests

positive_comment: Fantastic location between the train station and the old city. You can walk everywhere. Great supermarket nearby. Very clean. Fast internet. Friendly staff who let me check in early. I slept very well.
negative_comment: My only issue was that there was no kettle in the room to make a cup of tea. I was very jetlagged and wanted to make a cup of tea at 3am when I was wide awake. The night before I had asked the staff how to use the coffee machine downstairs to make boiling water but it was a hassle having to walk downstairs to make it and carry it back up. The machine also wasn't working so I had to come back upstairs to get my phone and use Google translate to figure out what was wrong (the coffee grind drawer wasn't properly inserted or something). I finally got my boiling water, which was a relief but it would be much more comfortable just to have a kettle in the room. Otherwise, no complaints! I would happily stay here again.

title: War ok
positive_comment: Check in lief unkompliziert. Zimmer 115 (mit Balkon zum Hof) ist gut gewesen.
negative_comment:
Die Betten sind sehr hart und telefonisch war kein Personal erreichbar. Jedoch war sofort jemand via Booking Chat erreichbar. 

Ich musste zwei mal das Personal kontaktieren. 
1. Keine freien Parkflächen im Aussenbereich. Liegt auch daran dass 5 (!) Fahrzeuge von Facility Management dort abgestellt sind und auch während meinem Aufenthalt nicht bewegt wurden (Freitag bis Sonntag). Mein Auto konnte ich auch nicht vor Ort aufladen, da das Facility Management Auto die ganze Zeit die Ladestation blockiert hat 🤦🏼‍♀️

Jedoch kann man sich nebenan am Schotterparkplatz parken. Das wusste ich nicht, da es nicht ausgeschildert war. 

2. Ich wurde von einem anderen Gast zugeparkt. Das war etwas mühsam.

title: Alles bestens

title: Un bel hôtel historique dans le centre de Salzbourg
positive_comment: Cet hôtel historique bénéficie de nombreux points forts. Les chambres sont belles et ont une vue éblouissante (surtout quand on est logé, comme nous l'étions, au quatrième étage) sur Salzbourg et ses montagnes. Il est très bien situé, à deux pas des principaux monuments de Salzbourg. La décoration intérieure est dans l'ensemble de bon goût (avec certaines pièces historiques, comme une très belle tapisserie dans le grand escalier). Le personnel est attentif. Les chambres sont bien équipées, avec une offre de quelques boissons gratuites (eau, jus d'orange, coca cola, schwepps) dans le minibar élégante. Le prix est cher, mais c'est attendu à Salzbourg, et le rapport qualité-prix reste bien meilleur que dans des villes comme Londres ou Venise.
negative_comment: L'insonorisation pour l'extérieur pourrait être améliorée, car la façade donne sur une place avec pas mal de circulation. Cela reste toutefois contenu. Une belle bouilloire se trouvait dans la chambre, mais pas de sachets d'infusion pour le soir, ce qui était un peu frustrant. Le seul point faible sérieux de l'hôtel est selon nous le petit-déjeuner, un buffet assez moyen et avec très peu de choix pour le sucré, un peu en dessous des standards attendus pour un cinq étoiles.

title: Un des plus beaux souvenirs de vacances de notre vie.
positive_comment: Tout était vraiment très bien que ce soit l'accueil, la qualité du personnel, le service, le petit déjeuner, la chambre, la localisation géographique. Quasiment rien à redire. Les équipes se mettent en quatre pour vous satisfaire.
negative_comment: Pas grand chose : le restaurant était complet le jour de notre arrivée et hélas nous n'avions pas réservé à l'avance. J'aurais apprécié d'être prévenu à l'avance qu'il vaut mieux réserver à l'avance.

Zentral gelegen, sehr freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal. Einfach alles Top

title: Hotel mit geschmackvollem Flohmarktcharm
positive_comment: Die Steirerstube'n hat ein ganz besonderes Flair.....viele alte Dinge geschmackvoll miteinander kombiniert....es ist sehr gemütlich und man fühlt sich gleich wohl....die Lage ist sehr gut....es ist sehr sauber und das Personal freundlich.
negative_comment: Die Dusche war sehr klein und das Bett etwas weich und knarrig

title: Wunderbar und empfehlenswert
positive_comment: Sehr freundliches und engagiertes Personal, originelle Dekorationen, Essen (Abendessen und Frühstück) war sehr toll angerichtet und hat gut geschmeckt.
negative_comment: Das Haus ist etwas hellhörig.

title: Atmosphäre, Küche und Personal sind top
positive_comment: Freundliches Personal, heimelige Atmosphäre, sehr gute zentrale Lage, ausgezeichnete Küche

title: 🇦🇹 schön war's!
positive_comment:
Man kommt einfach immer wieder gerne hierher.  Das Appartement ist sehr schön und geräumig - toll ist die Dachterasse!
Man ist mittendrin und doch ist es entspannt. 

Danke für die Leihfahrräder!
negative_comment: Das Frühstück ist gut - leider wird nicht zügig nachgefüllt.

title: Would recommend to anyone.
positive_comment:
The staff went above and beyond. Every member of staff were so knowledgeable helpful and courteous. The breakfast staff remembered everything from our previous day’s orders. 
The rooms were spacious and very clean with a comfy bed. 
The location was perfect. 
The breakfast was exceptional.

title: Incredible hotel in the heart of Salzburg
positive_comment: Historical building right across from where Mozart lived. In walking distance from everything. The staff is so friendly and accommodating. The room was spotless and comfortable. We got a welcome drink from the bar, and you can pretty much choose any drink. Breakfast buffet is rich, fresh and tasty.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Utterly fantastic
positive_comment:
It was a wonderful stay, location was excellent. Plenty to do on 2 days and the sound of music tour is a must.
Lots of walking
negative_comment: Only downside was being so close to the church. 7am bells was a little disturbing but we managed to align about it and I’d didn’t deter how lovely our trip was.

title: This hotel feels like a warm hug
positive_comment: We were made to feel so welcome and looked after. Nothing was too much trouble.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Lovely, relaxing stay in a beautiful city.
positive_comment:
This was our second stay at Bristol and we absolutely loved it. Everything was perfectly clean, the room was large and comfortable, water in the room in glass bottles, the view of the fortress is breathtaking.
We also needed to change our reservation on the day of due to the weather, and Gabriele was were very understanding and lovely.
negative_comment: No complaints.

title: Excellent location, friendly staff, large rooms, very clean.
positive_comment: Excellent selection at breakfast eg lots of fresh fruit, different breads etc

title: Habitación cómoda y espaciosa en una genial ubicación. Recomendable!
positive_comment: He estado en este alojamiento varias veces. Habitación limpia, espaciosa, y en una ubicación excelente. El restaurante sirve comida típica austríaca de buena calidad. Repetiré.
negative_comment: En verano hace calor en las habitaciones y no hay aire acondicionado.

title: Hogareño.
positive_comment: La chica que trabaja en recepción fue muy amable y preocupada, ese día llegué con una reacción alérgica muy fuerte e hizo todo lo posible por ayudarme. El hotel estaba en una excelente ubicación, muy cerca de todo caminando. La habitación era enorme y muy linda! Si vuelvo a la ciudad, definitivamente quiero volver a hospedarme allí. El desayuno estaba muy bien, era bastante variado.
negative_comment: Por decir algo, quizás el horario de recepción podría ser hasta más tarde, a las 19:30 hrs es aún un poco temprano por si algún huésped llega a necesitar algo. Si bien hay un mensaje que dice que hay que comunicarse con el personal del restaurante, al tocar la puerta interior nadie acudió a atender.

positive_comment: Bien ubicado. Habitación espaciosa . Con restaurante con buena comida y a precios razonables.
negative_comment: Escaleras para llegar a habitación. Pocos enchufes al lado de la cama. Falta alargue.o trifásico. No tiene ventilador.

title: Good stay
positive_comment: Central location, bar downstairs with good range of beers. Very friendky and efficient receptionist. Clean hotel with good hot water, comfortable bed.

The location, the room, the restaurant, the breakfast, the staff are amazing. Close to the city center, the train station. I recommend it to everyone, next time I go to Graz, I will definitely stay there again. I also loved the ladder shelves. Thank you for everything! 🙏

Accoglienza cortese ed efficace, disponibilità, informazioni utili sulla mobilità urbana
Parcheggio molto comodo a vista

title: Ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo/staff disponibile
positive_comment:
Receptionist gentile e professionale! 
Posiziona comoda! 
Ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo..
negative_comment: I letti non sono super comodi, il materasso é da rivedere leggermente!

title: Soluzione ideale per visitare Graz (città deliziosa).
positive_comment: Stanza molto ampia, nel complesso ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo. Ottima pulizia. Bagno di buone dimensioni con vasca tipo idromassaggio. Staff cortese e professionale, zona parcheggio di fianco all'albergo a prezzo contenuto gestita da loro direttamente. Buona e abbondante colazione (tra l'altro è stato applicato un robusto sconto alla colazione considerando mio figlio 17enne come "bambino"). Ottima posizione per arrivare in centro a piedi in pochi minuti.
negative_comment: Qualche elemento di arredo un po' datato ma si tratta di minuzie.

title: Tutto ok, tranne il letto
positive_comment: Posizione, possibilità parcheggio (a pagamento), buona colazione, gentilezza dello staff.
negative_comment: Ci sono stato due volte nel giro di una settimana, due camere diverse, entrambe non particolarmente spaziose e, soprattutto, letti piuttosto scomodi.

title: Ottimo per visitare la città
positive_comment:
Posizione, in 15min a piedi so raggiunge il centro. 
Disponibilità dello staff, la ragazza alla reception ci ha aiutati a trovare un ristorante dove mangiare a capodanno.
negative_comment: Abbiamo avuto problemi con il letto (da un lato si sono staccate alcune viti) e abbiamo dovuto ugualmente dormire due notti in quella stanza.

title: Buon compromesso prezzo qualità
positive_comment: Staff molto cordiale, servizio bar, possibilità di parcheggio gratuito
negative_comment: Pulizia in camera da migliorare, poche alternative dolci per colazione

positive_comment: La colazione inclusa,ottima e abbondante, la posizione e la cordialità dello staff
negative_comment: Niente

positive_comment: posizione comoda per i mezzi pubblici, bus e tramvia, colazione ricca e abbondante. Camera e letto confortevole, con bagno grande e finestrato, ero in una singola.

title: Zona Gries stazione
positive_comment:
Gran bel hotel con molte camere e bar all'entrata, vicino la stazione e con una posizione buona anche per raggiungere il centro
Camera piccola ma ben igienizzata con tutto ciò che serviva
Prezzo della camera non esagerato
Staff gentile e veloce
negative_comment:
Posto auto lo credevo migliore visto che non è affatto gratis
Letto attaccato alla grande finestra e per chiuderla ed aver un po' di privacy, solo una sottile tendina nera
Non consiglio né la colazione per il prezzo è né di prender un caffè al bar che non lo sanno fare

positive_comment: posizione ideale, staff gentilissimo e garage adiacente alla struttura che per un motociclista è tanta roba
negative_comment: tutto ok

positive_comment: tutto personale accogliente, gentile e premuroso con il mio bimbo di 3 anni. Consiglio vivamente
Struttura famigliare accoglienza super posizione perfetta

Stanza comoda e rinnovata, ho molto apprezzato la gentilezza del personale (sia del BB che del ristorante sottostante). Ottimi anche i pasti, inoltre ho molto apprezzato la posizione tranquilla ma centrale della struttura nel centro storico di Graz. Consigliatissimo.

Caratteristica pensione in posizione ottima, si raggiunge facilmente, si può parcheggiare l'auto in strada, si trova in un quartiere carino pieno di piccoli negozi e locali, e con una passeggiata di dieci minuti, attraversando il fiume, si è in pieno centro città. Sotto gli alloggi c'è un ristorante molto frequentato dove si mangia bene a prezzi interessanti. Direi tutto ottimo.
negative_comment: La nostra stanza era al secondo piano senza ascensore, e credo che la cosa andrebbe segnalata, ma per stare in una struttura tipica penso che le scale  siano inevitabile.

positive_comment: L'appartamento è molto carino e coccolo. E pulizie ottime.  Tornerei🤩

Personale accogliente 
Appartamento molto bello curato e pulito

title: Ottima pensione familiare ed accogliente in posizione strategica.
positive_comment: Siamo già stati qualche anno fa in questa struttura, trovandoci già allora molto bene, e siamo tornati molto volentieri. Ambiente familiare ed accogliente. Gentilissimo e collaborativo lo staff. Ampia e pulita la camera, nella zona più nuova della pensione. Ottimo letto, ottima doccia. - Colazione adeguata. - Al piano terra un ottimo e comodissimo ristorantino, con possibilità di mangiare alla carta od optare per la mezza o intera pensione, dove abbiamo mangiato sempre molto bene. - La posizione è assolutamente strategica, e le zone salienti del centro sono tutte rapidamente raggiungibili a piedi. - Nelle vicinanze c'è un garage convenzionato, che viene offerto gratuitamente. - Ottima l'organizzazione per il carico/scarico dei bagagli in un'area immediatamente adiacente usufruibile con apposito permesso. - Ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo. Abbiamo già prenotato nuovamente per un altro prossimo soggiorno.
negative_comment: L'unico problema rilevato è stato il segnale del WiFi che purtroppo nella posizione della nostra stanza, pur essendoci campo anche pieno, non riusciva ad agganciare Internet, ed al quale abbiamo dovuto alfine rinunciare.

positive_comment: Abbiamo passato tre giorni bellissimi a Graz, complice il periodo dell'Avvento con i mercatini, l'Hotel proprio come desideravamo, centrale, a 10 minuti dall'Hauptplaz e dall'Uhrturm. Un'atmosfera e un ottima cucina che rispetta la tradizione stiriana. Il personale gentilissimo. Ci torneremo🤗

Posizione non centrale ma facilmente raggiungibile il centro storico a piedi.
Colazione variegata e di buona qualità, in particolare il salato.
Abbiamo cenato presso la struttura e abbiamo mangiato molto bene i piatti locali, con cortesia e disponibilità del personale  al top.
negative_comment: La struttura purtroppo non dispone di ascensore.

title: Molto confortevole
positive_comment: Tutto l’arredo era comodo e confortevole, lo staf gentilissimo il cibo ottimo e ben porzionato, peccato che ero di passaggio saremmo rimasti di più, ottima zona, parcheggio auto in zona e il fine settimana non appagamento tutto perfetto.
negative_comment: Forse per il ristorante un seggiolino per il bambino sarebbe stato comodo, ma ringrazio comunque della culla per il bambino anche se non l’avevo richiesta era già pronta in stanza molto gentile da parte dello staf.

title: Top!
positive_comment: La gentillesse du gérant, le confort, la bouilloire dans la chambre avec thé et café, le petit déjeuner, le parking
A côté de la gare, personnel très sympathique, j'ai eu droit a un surclassement gratuit à  mon arrivée, j'ai pu laisser mes bagages à la réception pour la journée de visite dans la ville.
Tout était super accueil chambre spacieuse petit déjeuner au top et emplacement proche des transports en commun

title: Excellente étape
positive_comment: Accueil. agréable et personnel serviable . Très bon petit-déjeuner. Emplacement a proximité du centre de Graz (5 mn en velo).  Facilité de parking pour la voiture et nos vélos
negative_comment: Rien

positive_comment:
Le personnel est sympathique et réactif. 
Le lit est confortable.
Le petit déjeuner est copieux.
Proche de la gare et à 15mn du centre ville.

Dans l'ensemble l'hôtel est très bien et le buffet des petits déjeuners est excellent il y en a pour tous les goûts. Le personnel est aimable accueillant, souriant et à l'écoute. De plus l'hôtel se situe à 3 minutes à pied de la station de bus et de tram ce qui facilite l'accès au centre-ville
negative_comment: Comme souvent dans les hôtels en Autriche, il n'y a pas de volets .   juste quelques stores et rideaux occultant qui laissent passer la lumière le matin. Heureusement le triple vitrage corrige le bruit important qu'il peut y avoir sur le boulevard.

title: Tient ses promesses
positive_comment: La localisation et la réactivité du personnel. Le petit déjeuner est bien.
La gentillesse du personnel. La propreté et le confort des chambres. La gare est juste à côté.
negative_comment: L'éloignement du Centre ville (20 min à pied env)

title: J'ai bien aimé
positive_comment: La salle de bain avec douche etait pratique et jolie
negative_comment: La vu et les travaux a proximité

positive_comment: La proximité de la gare, la chambre sur la cour intérieure donc moins bruyante que sur la rue et la propreté !
negative_comment: Chambre très petite et petit déjeuner trop cher .

title: La pension est un établissement de caractère très bien tenu où il est agréable d'y séjourner
positive_comment:
J'ai apprécié le charme un peu ancien du lieu 
J'ai aimé la possibilité de se restaurer sur place, en terrasse.
negative_comment: RAS

positive_comment:
L'emplacement est proche à pied du centre historique.
L'hôtel est très confortable et propre. La décoration est très jolie et drôle.
La chambre est confortable et fonctionnelle.
La cuisine du restaurant est délicieuse et le rapport qualité/prix est exceptionnelle. On mange très bien et les prix sont très abordables.
negative_comment: La chambre sous les toits sans climatisation en pleine canicule ne nous a pas permis d'avoir des nuits reposantes.

title: Très chouette pension typiquement autrichienne dans un quartier vivant et authentique de Graz et moi
positive_comment:
Très chouette pension typiquement autrichienne dans un quartier vivant et authentique de Graz et moins touristique que le centre.
Logement simple et sobre de même que la nourriture du restaurant

title: Hôtel à proximité du centre et un rapport qualité prix très correct
positive_comment:
Localisation de l’hôtel 
Bon accueil .
Petit déjeuner copieux et repas correct (qualité /prix)
Charme un peu désuet et attachant.
Chambre grand volume et bon lit.

Superbe endroit 
Nous avions l’appartement car nous étions 6 et il était vraiment agréable avec son balcon et sa vue sur les hauteur de graz 
Tres bien situé à 5 min du centre
Location , location!!! The sauna with swim in the lake!
Tout a été parfait, accueil très convivial, appartement juste parfait très bonne literie, un superbe terasse avec une belle vue ! On est  très proche du centre ville !
negative_comment: Le petit bémol à 6 le toilette avec la douche...mais on a survécu

title: Très bien!
positive_comment: Petit déjeuner copieux, charmante demoiselle, très jolie salle à manger!
negative_comment: L’oreiller était trop mou

positive_comment: Le charme et le petit déjeuner très sain et delicieux

title: Bonne expérience
positive_comment: Bon accueil, restaurant correct sur place, bon emplacement avec plein de commerces autour, place de marché avec restaurations Je recommande
Très bonne gasthaus à 2 pas du centre. Très propre et petit déjeuner vraiment parfait.
negative_comment: Le wifi avait des ratés.

title: Perfect location, outstanding costvalue ratio.
positive_comment: Perfect. This place is in the heart of the city. The staff is very kind and helpful in every issue arisen. The rooms were modern and clean, nicely designed. It definitely well above avarage considering the costvalue ratio.
negative_comment: Maybe the door of the toilet and the bathroom, if I am forced to mention one. It was privacy glass, I do not really like it, but this can be a personal thing.

title: comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location
positive_comment: Very comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location

title: Decent hotel with good location.
positive_comment: Nice hotel and spacious, clean rooms. Good location with short walk to center and some nice restaurants near by. Morning staff was very friendly. Breakfast was ok.
negative_comment: Bed is a bit too firm for my taste and pillows not very comfortable. Air conditioner made odd popping noises a few times overnight. Last day Sunday there was only staff until 15:00 which means leaving luggage beyond then was not possible. In my case that was ok but had I planned to stay longer this would have been an issue. Breakfast was ok but nothing spectacular.

title: Overall it was ok
positive_comment: The lady at the reception was very nice. The location suits us perfectly. We stayed there before. Although there were some construction works going on, it was quiet. But we would prefer if we would be informed about the construction works and no parking in front of the hotel prior to booking. The room itself was clean, we liked the sign on the wall. It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.

positive_comment:
Bright comfortable spacious room.
Nice area and short walk to city centre.
Staff helpful and pleasant and allowed us to store our bags on checkout. 
Graz is a great town, we hope to return. We would stay here again.
negative_comment: Liked everything

positive_comment:
Great location to explore Graz. 
Nearby parking available for 15eur if booked throught reception (otherwise 40eur per 24 hours!! )
Good breakfast.

title: Excellent value and very positive experience
positive_comment: Very well located, close to main attractions without being in the middle of the crowds. Staff was great and helpful. Looks like the rooms have been recently refurbished and everything looks fresh and pleasing. Breakfast was great. Would stay again for sure.
negative_comment: For the kind of value the hotel delivers I can't really pick anything.

positive_comment: Perfect location, great personnel, tasty breakfast. No dedicated hotel parking, but this issue was solved instantly by providing ticket to the nearest public garage.
negative_comment: Some may be surprised by the interesting interior decision (shower cabin and sink right in front of a bed) with no door between bathroom and bedroom zones. Not a problem for an individual traveller, but might be an inconvenience for some cases.

title: Excellent
positive_comment: Everything was great. The hotel is on the nice location in the center of Graz, the staff was friendly, rooms were modern,cosy and clean..parking garage is near the hotel (100m) and everything else is near..

title: The loveliest hotel in Graz
positive_comment: This is the most charming hotel. We felt like home. It is close to literally everything and there are a couple of great restaurants and cute shops around. The parking is right in front of the hotel. Breakfast is amazing. The staff is always smiling and nice. I can’t reccomend this hotel enough. We fell in love with Graz and when we come back,we’ll stay in this hotel. Thank you for everything.
negative_comment: Everything was great

title: Excelente desayuno y ubicación
positive_comment: Excelente ubicación,  y el desayuno mejor aún. Habitaciones amplias y cómodas. Puedes arrimar el vehículo para descargar y cargar las maletas.  Un estaciomiento cercano. Es una construcción antigua muy bien conservada.

title: Un acierro desde luego
positive_comment: Un acierto, situacion inmejorable, facil de llegar, personal amable y todo facilidades, parking cerca a buen precio y el mejor chuleton que me he comido en mucho tiempo en wl restaurante del hotel. Ah, y un pub Irlandes a 100 metros muy chulo para tomar un Jameson despues del chuleton. Una maravilla vamos!
negative_comment: Todo fenomemal!

title: Estupenda
positive_comment:
Buena localización
Habitación muy amplia
Cama muy cómoda
negative_comment: Nada

title: Quick stay in Graz
positive_comment:
It was well located. Great reception staff and was very clean. The bec and bedding was very comfy

 

Represents good value for the money .
negative_comment:
The room we had was very dark...it was a design choice and there wasn't any light to speak of.

It was difficult to regulate the temperature of the room as we were missing the remote. I'm sure the hotel would have corrected this had we pursued it.

title: We had a very pleasant stay and would happily come back again.
positive_comment: The room was clean and comfortable, the breakfast had a good variety, and the location was very convenient. The staff were also very friendly and helpful throughout our stay. Overall, the hotel met all our expectations and offered great value for the price.
Good location and decent breakfast. The staff was friendly and helpful.
negative_comment: The toilet had an unpleasant smell, which made the stay less comfortable. Cleanliness could be improved.

title: Recommended
positive_comment: The reception staff was extremely kind and helpful, the room was much bigger than expected, clean and comfortable. We had a good night's sleep, and breakfast was absolutely amazing

Great location near the train station — not far from the old town.
The breakfasts are tasty. 
Many thanks to the reception staff member, who was always helpful and in a great mood.
negative_comment:
The pillows are uncomfortable, but the bed is very good.
At breakfast, it would be nice to have some vegetables — at least a couple of options.

positive_comment: Nice clean well located hotel near to train stations and bus etc
negative_comment: Nothing really good value hotel

title: City trip
positive_comment:
Nice hotel approx. 5 minutes walk from the main railway station & even though near main road couldn't hear any noise
Friendly helpful staff
Good size comfy room with kettle/tea/coffee/cream in the room
Good WIFI
negative_comment:
Cold water from taps in sink was coming out as warm (not good when needing to brush teeth)
Furniture a bit tired

title: Clean hotel, friendly staff, brilliant breakfast. We really enjoyed our stay.
positive_comment: Breakfast was delicious and plenty of it. The bar in Reception was well stocked and reasonably priced. The bar area was comfortable and inviting. Rooms were clean and we had everything we needed.
negative_comment: Only thing that could make it better would be if evening meals were available

title: Overall, everything was great and I really enjoyed my one night stay at the hotel.
positive_comment: Breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of fresh and tasty options. The staff were very supportive, attentive, and genuinely engaged, which made the stay even more pleasant.
negative_comment: The only minor downside was that the mattress was a bit too soft for my personal preference, but this did not significantly affect the overall positive experience.

title: great quality price ratio hotel close to the main train station. A cozy place.
positive_comment: I liked the cosy little hotel bar. The service was excellent and I liked the company of the easily relatable compéres.
The staff were great location and for the price an absolute bargain.

title: Good stay
positive_comment: Central location, bar downstairs with good range of beers. Very friendky and efficient receptionist. Clean hotel with good hot water, comfortable bed.

The location, the room, the restaurant, the breakfast, the staff are amazing. Close to the city center, the train station. I recommend it to everyone, next time I go to Graz, I will definitely stay there again. I also loved the ladder shelves. Thank you for everything! 🙏
Great location. Good value for money. Amazing breakfast. Very cozy
Cute place, thematic property, good breakfast, located close to the centre.

title: In Austria for a football match in Graz. Stayed in Vienna also. Such a wonderful country.
positive_comment: Great location just outside main city centre. Lovely quaint property. Friendly and welcoming staff. Nice breakfast.
negative_comment: Pillows very soft.

title: Great location, lovely welcome and excellent rooms
positive_comment: Traditional Austrian Hotel with modern touch to rooms

title: Great location, helpful and friendly staff
positive_comment: Very helpful staff, I was travelling with heavy intercontinental luggage, and while there is no elevator, they helped me with the luggage. Very convenient location near the tourist spots for eating and sightseeing. The breakfast was diverse, and the restaurant was convenient for an easy local lunch/dinner. The housekeeping managed to complete their clean/tidy on my second day while I was having breakfast, very convenient.
negative_comment: There was no elevator and I was on the top floor, but the staff offered to help with my baggage.

positive_comment: Excellent breakfast. Super accommodating personnel
Excellent place, location not far from the city center, and very helpful and friendly staff. Absolutely recommended!
The location was good; a short walk from the station and a similarly short walk to the old city.

Lage in Zentrumnähe - sehr schöne Zimmer und auch alles sehr sauber. Kaffee aus Kaffeemaschine wurde im Foyer zur Verfügung gestellt. Dieser war auch sehr gut.
Sehr positiv habe ich empfunden, dass sich die Dame im Büro für die "Umstände" entschuldigt hat und extrem hilfsbereit war.
negative_comment: Online-Check in - dieser konnte nur dank einer sehr freundlichen Dame bewältigt werden (Tablett funktionierte nicht zu 100 %). Frühstück war in ein Partnerlokal ausgelagert und konnte nicht wie früher im Hotel konsumiert werden. Dies war uns vorher nicht bekannt. Beim Frühstück selbst, war das Personal zwar sehr freundlich - jedoch  überfordert. Angemerkt wird, dass das Lokal um 9:00 Uhr voll war. Semmeln waren aufgetaut und feucht und Wurst und Käse mussten immer wieder urgiert werden (sicher auch aufgrund der hohen Gästeanzahl geschuldet).

positive_comment: Très bon emplacement dans la vieille ville, belle chambre et petit déjeuner très bon!
Totaly worth the money.. its really calm and chill place..ill be back when visiting Graz

Represents good value for the money .

title: We will be back :)
positive_comment: Very nice location, friendly staff and nice apartments with vintage vibe.
negative_comment: All was good

title: A high quality traditional hotel with modern amenities.
positive_comment: Comfortable room with ensuite shower facility. High levels of cleanliness. Breakfast was a good mix of fruits, cereals, cold meats, cheeses, and eggs, with good tea/coffee facilities. Location is excellent: in the heart of the old town.
negative_comment: I expected breakfast to be included, but it was not. Even though the bed was a double bed, the two single duvets were not really big enough.

title: Excellent hotel in the middle of the city
positive_comment: Excellent location. Excellent staff. Lovely hotel. Comfortable room and bed with stylish decoration
negative_comment: Everything

title: Fabulous stay
positive_comment:

title: Muy acogedor.
positive_comment:
Ubicación: muy céntrico, en el corazón de una zona con ambiente y a menos de 20m, a pie, de la Catedral y el Mausoleo.
Habitación: amplia, luminosa, impoluta y, lo mejor que puedo decir, 'acogedora'. Cuarto de ducha amplio y separado del wc, también amplio. Magnífico colchón. Tiene un pequeño minibar y el wifi se coge bien.
Desayuno: tipo buffet. Hay donde elegir. Todo lo que probe bueno.
Personal: profesional y muy atento.
Parking: abierto, enfrente de la entrada del hotel. No dispone de muchas plazas.
negative_comment: Por poner un 'pero', si hubiera tenido una hervidora en la habitación sería perfecto.

title: CORRECTO

title: Habitaciones modernas y muy confortables
positive_comment: El hotel y las habitaciones eran muy lindos y confortables. La decoración es muy moderna y la habitación y el baño son muy espaciosos y bien decorados. La atención del personal es muy buena. De hecho fueron muy amables ya que el estacionamiento del hotel era pago pero como estaba casi vacío no me cobraron la tarifa.
negative_comment: En realidad estoy muy conforme con todo. El único detalle es que la cama estaba formada por 2 camas individuales juntas, lo cual no es cómodo. Hubiera sido un buen gesto que dejaran una botellita de agua de cortesía.

title: Nuestra primera opción en Graz
positive_comment:
Hemos estado varias veces alojados en este hotel. Nuestra hija vive en Graz y vamos cuando podemos. La primera vez que nos alojamos ahí fue en 2017, pero después de esa fecha renovaron el hotel y superó con creces nuestras expectativas. Intentamos ir cada año y siempre es nuestra primera opción. Seguiremos alojándonos en este hotel siempre que esté disponible.
El personal es encantador y muy dispuesto a ayudar en lo que puedan. La entrada y salida, en caso de ser en horario fuera de recepción, se hace sin problema. 
Muchas gracias.
negative_comment: Nada. Todo perfecto.

positive_comment: Todo, cuando entras a un hotel y todo esta perfecto solo queda darles las gracias y la 🎊🎉Enhorabuena
negative_comment: Nada

title: Decent hotel with good location.
positive_comment: Nice hotel and spacious, clean rooms. Good location with short walk to center and some nice restaurants near by. Morning staff was very friendly. Breakfast was ok.
negative_comment: Bed is a bit too firm for my taste and pillows not very comfortable. Air conditioner made odd popping noises a few times overnight. Breakfast was ok but nothing spectacular.

title: Overall it was ok
positive_comment: The lady at the reception was very nice. The location suits us perfectly. We stayed there before. Although there were some construction works going on, it was quiet. But we would prefer if we would be informed about the construction works and no parking in front of the hotel prior to booking. The room itself was clean, we liked the sign on the wall. It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.

Il ristorante consigliato si è rivelato ottimo (cucina tipica) e con tariffe molto convenienti. Nei pressi c'è anche un mercato.

positive_comment: Komfortable, geräumige Unterkunft in perfekter Lage. Das Badezimmer ist riesig und bietet sowohl eine Badewanne als auch eine Dusche. Zwischen dem luxuriösen Waschbecken auf der einen Seite und der nahezu separaten Toilette (mit Schiebetür) auf der anderen Seite ist sehr viel Platz. Vielleicht das beste Badezimmer, das wir je in einem Hotel gesehen haben. Der Preis ist für diese Lage und diesen Komfort sehr angemessen.
negative_comment: Es gibt nicht genügend Parkplätze in der Nähe des Hotels, sodass man sein Auto in einer öffentlichen Garage abstellen muss, die nicht direkt neben dem Hotel liegt und einige enge Passagen aufweist. Der Preis pro Tag (für Hotelgäste) ist jedoch sehr akzeptabel. Das Frühstück erschien uns zu teuer, weshalb wir es im Hotel nicht eingenommen haben. Ohne diese beiden Unannehmlichkeiten hätte die Bewertung 10 betragen können.

positive_comment:
Les chambres très modernes n'ont rien à voir avec l 'accueil et l espace petit-déjeuner plutôt vieillot. La chambre était super spacieuse, idem pour la salle de bain et les toilettes séparées. Le tout dans un décor très design.
Le parking privé est petit mais pratique et seulement à 7 euros la journée. L'hôtel est idéalement situé pour visiter Graz. Le petit-déjeuner est très correct.

Colazione ben fornita sia la parte dolce che salata. Ho apprezzato molto la varietà di tè in foglie, non solo le classiche bustine.

positive_comment: La habitación estaba bien, todo lo necesario para una semana de trabajo. Nos alojaron en una habitación con obras en la planta superior, y al día siguiente nos cambiaron a otra zona menos ruidosa.

positive_comment:
Desayuno  excelente .ubicación regular.
Atención bienvenida.
Excelente calidad-precio. Habitaciones amplias, muy cómodas, baños perfectos. Muy buena opción en Graz.
Instalaciones muy buenas, ducha, camas, etc. Personal agradable y parquing muy cómodo.
negative_comment: Un poco alejado del centro, pero se respira tranquilidad.

positive_comment:
Tipico hotel ibis, limpio, moderno. 
Como era fin de semana deje el auto gratis en la calle donde hay muchos lugares libres. A unos 200 mts, sobre una avenida, habia estacionamiento gratis todos los dias.
Esta retirado del centro.
La habitacion era muy amplia y limpieza 10 puntos.

La cosa davvero fastidiosa è l'impossibilità di spegnere la luce del bagno. Dormendo con animali ho dovuto lasciare la porta del bagno aperta ed è praticamente stata accesa la luce tutta la notte, perchè ad ogni ingresso restava accesa per più di 20 minuti, senza esagerare, e non c'era modo di spegnerla. Un asciugamano in più e delle lenzuola in più non guasterebbero, perchè se prendi il cuscino supplementare è senza biancheria, idem per il piumino. Una coperta più leggera del piumino sarebbe gradita come optional

title: Overall it was ok

It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.
