title: A stunningly luxurious winter retreat in Salzburg
positive_comment:
This was an incredible stay in a memorable and luxurious hotel. The staff, from the receptionist to the bar staff, restaurant servers and the chefs, were amazing; they were friendly, attentive and really knowledgeable about their work. Staying in a Superior Castle Room provided a refined and classic environment that felt very relaxing.

The Glass Garden restaurant was a particular highlight. The central glass sculpture by Dale Chihuly creates a beautiful atmosphere and the dining experience was incredible. It was certainly one of the most memorable meals we have ever had with course after course of exquisite tastes. Breakfast was also delightful, with staff who really added to our experience. The hilltop location gave us amazing views and the walk down into the streets was charming in the January snow. The spa was another highlight, and we thoroughly enjoyed the saunas and fitness room during our winter visit.

They’re very helpful and very welcoming.
The room’s space is excellent. 
They have bidet in the bathroom.

title: A relaxing and luxurious stay.
positive_comment: The hotel was one of the nicest I have stayed at, featuring beautiful rooms, comfortable beds, an amazing location, terrific food, and warm and caring staff. We particularly enjoyed our time in the pool, walking through the park near the hotel to the elevator which takes you down to the old town, and relaxing in our rooms.

Zimmer und Aufenthaltsräume sind geschmackvoll ausgestattet. Das Frühstück lässt keine Wünsche offen. Die Lage ist grandios, neben zum Stadtzentrum bzw. Straßenbahnhaltestelle vor dem Haus.

positive_comment:

Das Frühstücksbüffet war sehr abwechslungsreich, reichhaltig und von hoher Qualität. Das Personal im Frühstücksbereich wie aber auch das an der Rezeption trat freundlich und mit einer sehr hohen Professionalität auf.

Je lui ai demandé  gentiment de le faire faire, nous voulions dîner au restaurant , il était fermé, nous avons demandé de commander au alentour de 20h00 des snacks, il n'avait rien impossible !
Nous sommes alors aller passer une commande, extérieur à l'hôtel que nous avons reçu à 23h00, la cerise sur le gâteau, il manquait une serviette de bain, le réceptionniste nous à demander de venir nous même la chercher car il n'avait pas le temps, je suis descendu à la réception pour récupérer ma commande, il discuter avec son collègue !

positive_comment:
Amazing location and setting on the slope of the Schlossberg. Staff are attentive and friendly and do their best to make your stay as comfortable as possible. 
I’ll always choose the Schlossberghotel when coming to Graz.

positive_comment: It was lovely. Very comfortable and full of character. A perfect place to stay in Graz
negative_comment: It could have had a fireplace in the main lounge but that’s being very very picky! I am trying to find fault when there was none.

title: Marvellous, classy with a tint of luxury
positive_comment: Unbelievably comfortable bed, big bathroom with tub, lovely service, sauna 24h, stunning terrace. Whole hotel feels like an art gallery. To sum up perfect location to spend 2-3 days sightseeing Graz.
negative_comment: Expensive parking, only a few free city parking spots. One night from 6pm until 11am in paid parking spot below shopping center next door was 20€.

Wonderful friendly yet efficient service.

Fantastic breakfast. 
Beautiful room.

positive_comment: Very friendly staff, great location with excellent view, breakfast was very good
Great apartment with excellent view and good quality 👌

title: A good hotel, well run by an exceptionally polite and well trained staff, a joy

positive_comment: We had an apartment and it was extraordinary.. large living are with all the amenities, spacious bedroom and fabulous views over our riverside location.

title: An amazing location, superb views with wonderful staff that made our stay very memorable.
positive_comment: Excellent and attentive staff. We interacted a lot with Felix who was very helpful and gave great suggestions.
negative_comment: A bit more water in the room!

title: A stunningly luxurious winter retreat in Salzburg
positive_comment:
This was an incredible stay in a memorable and luxurious hotel. The staff, from the receptionist to the bar staff, restaurant servers and the chefs, were amazing; they were friendly, attentive and really knowledgeable about their work. Staying in a Superior Castle Room provided a refined and classic environment that felt very relaxing.

The Glass Garden restaurant was a particular highlight. The central glass sculpture by Dale Chihuly creates a beautiful atmosphere and the dining experience was incredible. It was certainly one of the most memorable meals we have ever had with course after course of exquisite tastes. Breakfast was also delightful, with staff who really added to our experience. The hilltop location gave us amazing views and the walk down into the streets was charming in the January snow. The spa was another highlight, and we thoroughly enjoyed the saunas and fitness room during our winter visit.

They’re very helpful and very welcoming.
The room’s space is excellent. 
They have bidet in the bathroom.

title: Sehr entspannte, angenehme Wohlfühltage!
positive_comment: Sehr gutes Frühstück. Es gab alles was das Herz begehrt, vor allem sehr gute Mehlspeisen.

Le personnel est tres gentil et tres serviable. Toute demande realisee rapidement  avec le sourire! Le buffet du petit dejeuner est varie et les produits excellents.
Le service parking est tres bien aussi.
** la proprete de l'etablissement
negative_comment: La literie... les coussins et le matelas (trop mous)

title: Excellent séjour à Graz au Schlossberg hôtel.
positive_comment:
L’établissement est idéalement situé à quelques dizaines de mètres de la place principale. La ville de Graz est absolument magique et le style de l’hôtel totalement dans le ton. La vue de la petite piscine terrasse est superbe. 
Le personnel est absolument remarquable de professionnalisme et de gentillesse, que ce soit à la réception ou bien au petit déjeuner lequel est par ailleurs incroyablement bon, avec des produits de grande qualité ! C’est vraiment un sans faute. 
Si vous venez en voiture votre véhicule sera pris en charge et garé au parking de l’hôtel moyennant 25€/jour ce qui n’est pas cadeau mais le prix de la tranquillité !
Bref nous avons adoré notre séjour.
negative_comment: Rien. Franchement aucune remarque négative à faire.

title: Un hôtel où nous nous sentions comme à la maison. Un séjour parfait. MERCI!
positive_comment: Nous sommes revenus! Pour ça il y a une raison. L'accueil est tellement chaleureux. Quelle gentillesse. La chambre était confortable, le lit aussi. Une jolie salle de bain. Et le petit déjeuner.... Juste magnifique!  Cet hôtel est calme et très bien situé. Nous aimons également le jardin avec ses multiples terrasses. Un séjour parfait!

title: Un hôtel magnifique dans une ville magnifique
positive_comment: Nous séjournons régulièrement dans cet hôtel splendide, et très bien conçu, aux portes du centre historique de Graz, ville magnifique. Petit-déjeuner superbe dans un espace magnifique, belles chambres (nous avons été très bien servi, dans une chambre spacieuse avec une belle vue), beaux équipements, personnel aux petits soins. Je conseille vivement !
negative_comment: Je ne vois vraiment pas de reproche à faire, tout était parfait.

title: Absolument parfait! Nous reviendrons!
positive_comment: La situation, la décoration, la maison historique bien transformée et la gentillesse du personnel en plus le petit déjeuner était excellent. Une adresse parfaite!
negative_comment: Nous avons TOUT AIMÉ!

title: retourne depuis beaucoup d'années dans cet hotel sympatique
positive_comment: Collection de tableaux extraordinaire, un vrai musée

title: Hôte super, personnel super, rapport qualité/prix super !
positive_comment:
Super hôtel avec un personnel vraiment parfait.
Un rapport qualité/prix extraordinaire : pour le prix d'une chambre, nous avons eu une suite !
Et les chiens sont très bien accueillis !
Nous reviendrons, c'est sûr !

title: Hôtel très agréable, lobby accueillant
positive_comment:
L’accueil très professionnel 
La chambre donnant sur la rue était grande, confortable 
La salle de bain un peu petite 
Le petit déjeuner de qualité
negative_comment: Il manque des explications pour l’accès à la piscine placée en haut de plusieurs escaliers

title: Parfait pour sejourner à Graz

Très central tout se fait à pieds ou en transports proches.

Service voiturier qui s’occupe de tout.
Quarto espaçoso e confortável, pessoal atencioso, varandas nos quartos, bom pequeno-almoço

positive_comment: Good hotel and friendly staff. Cosy room, close to the city centre.
negative_comment: I didn't have breakfast as it was far too expensive. Room misses some amenities (e.g. tea pot).

positive_comment: The room was very large and clean. The breakfast was perfect cool like a Turkish breakfast,in fact more than Turkish breakfast:)The staffs were friendly and very helpfull.
negative_comment: The location was the only negative thing for that hotel in Graz. İt takes about 30 minutes on foot to the city center. We took a tram to the city center. The tram stop was only 5 minutes walk to the hotel

title: Comfortable Room and Good Breakfast
positive_comment: The room was spacious, warm, and very comfortable, with a large bathroom. The breakfast catered to all dietary preferences, offering a wide variety of tasty options.

title: More than sure I will come again to the same hotel given the opportunity !!!
positive_comment: The breakfast was good value for money regarding it's price and with plenty of options and enough time given from 7:00-10:30. The receptionists made me feel like home and made the experience unforgettable!!! The room was being cleaned daily without me having to ask for it !!! Pretty close to the city center and with enough places for you to grab something you might have needed (Supermarkets etc.)

title: It was good for a one night stay.
positive_comment: The staff was very nice, the room was big and comfortable.
negative_comment: The water pressure in the shower was not really great, also the was water is very hot or very cold, no inbetween unfortunately.

positive_comment: helpful stuff, everything clean and nice looking design
negative_comment: they don't have kettles:(

positive_comment:
Excellent hotel a short distance away from the tram.

negative_comment: Breakfast is in the cafe (not included) but we didn't know we had to book a table, as the cafe is open to the public. There should be some seats automatically reserved for hotel guests.

title: Cosy modern, efficient and friendly hotel
positive_comment:
Very modern friendly and efficient 
Management and young staff were exceptionally efficient and friendly.
Loved the cafe, à la carte breakfast and opportunity to mix with locals.
negative_comment: Modernity, in some instances, was prioritised over practicality.”

title: Absolutely great stay!
positive_comment: We absolutely loved our stay here! We travelled with our dog and the hotel was super accomodating with everything. The room was spacious and the bed was amazing. The breakfast was an added bonus, lovely dishes and we both enjoyed it so much. The terrace on the roof was our favorite spot: with an elderflower soda we sat up here and watched the sunset. Absolutely would stay here again when we come back. Location wise it is right around the corner of the entrance to the Schlossberg, where you can take the elevator (small charge) or stairs up for lovely city views.

title: Fab location, top design and good value but above all, a great team. Thank you Kai 36!
positive_comment: Our stay in beautiful Graz was a joy and much of that was down to this beautiful and quirky boutique hotel and very buzzy cafe, which is run by a young, capable and charming crew. All is calm, nothing is too much trouble, everything is followed-up. The thought that went into the design is impressive, the art eclectic and the whole concept simply works really well. It's in a great location. Sadly our visit was too early for the pool but we did enjoy the sauna (which is actually in the next door hotel) The cafe has very good, modern breakfasts and smaller plates as well as great coffee and drinks.
negative_comment: Having to leave!

title: Would hightly recommend
positive_comment:
Stuff was great - location was great!

positive_comment:

The staff is exceptional & the location couldn’t be better.very good a la carte breakfast in its café frequented also by locals.
negative_comment: No safe or minibar in rooms, no mirror above bathroom sinks to do make up, or shaving!

title: Beautiful Hotel design and rooms, excellent location, lovely lounge cafe.
positive_comment:

The rooms are beautiful and cosy, the upper terraces have spectacular views over the city.
negative_comment:
One morning  we were only allowed to sit at the bar counter for breakfast which was 
a little uncomfortable but the coffee and food offerings were delicious.

title: Wonderful boutique hotel/modern art gallery in the heart of Graz
positive_comment: We had an absolutely wonderful stay at Kai 36. The hotel is beautiful, feels like a boutique art gallery, the modern art in amazing contrast to the historical feel of the building and the area. The location is ideal. Our room was spacious, well designed, and comfortable. The complimentary cosmetics and teas feel luxurious. It is also nice to have a good cafe/bistro in the house. But best of all was the staff - everyone was very professional, nice and helpful. We really felt welcome and taken care of.
negative_comment: The parking fee (26 euros per night) feels a bit too high. But the hotel let us park the car in the garage as long as we wished on the day of departure, which was very generous.

title: Great hotel , perfect location
positive_comment: One of the best and cosiest hotels I ever stayed at
negative_comment: Only negative point : there was no table available for breakfast before 11.. house guests should always have the option to have breakfast when the want.

positive_comment: Nice and friendly staff, great design and location.
Totaly worth the money.. its really calm and chill place..ill be back when visiting Graz

title: A perfect choice for a one-night stopover during a journey.
positive_comment: The check-in was easy and quick. The room was modern, fairly large and clean. The breakfast was plentiful, buffet-style. There was a free parking space for the car in the yard.  The Wi-Fi was stable, fast, and easy to use.
negative_comment: There was no air conditioning in the room, but there was a fan instead. The window did not open directly onto the main road, but the noise could still be heard through the window that was kept open because of the heat.

title: Ideal for a basic nights rest after long drive.
positive_comment: It is the second time that we've chosen a hotel that is annex to an asian restaurant to our full satisfaction. We experienced basic lodgings but exactly what we need for a nights rest after driving for about 1000km including a basic but full breakfast.

title: Top Lage, top Service, außergewöhnliches Ambiente!
positive_comment:
Die Lage des Hotels ist top-direkt in der Innenstadt/Altstadt; alles gut zu Fuß erreichbar!

Das Frühstück a la carte war sehr gut, sehr liebevoll zubereitet und das Service ist außergewöhnlich!
Wir wollten eine Kaffeemaschine aufs Zimmer-alles kein Problem!

Das Hotel ist sehr schön und sauber, auch das Zimmer hat uns überrascht!

title: Sehr empfehlenswert!
positive_comment: Es war alles perfekt. Das Personal sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Das Hotel sowie das Zimmer sehr sauber und sehr gut ausgestattet. Besonders gut hat uns der Pool und der schöne Ausblick gefallen. Das Frühstück war sehr gut und eine große Auswahl an verschiedenen Köstlichkeiten, besonders hervor zuheben das selbst gebackene Brot. Werden auf jeden Fall wieder in diesem Hotel übernachten. Sehr empfehlenswert.
Super Lage, tolles Frühstück (wenn auch etwas teurer) mit großer Auswahl. Wir haben ein gratis Upgrade bekommen, das Zimmer war sehr modern und das Bett total bequem!
negative_comment: Leider konnten wir die Temperatur im Zimmer nicht einstellen, da wir Ende April da waren und uns gesagt wurde, die Heizung sei noch aktiviert. Wir hätten es gerne kühler gehabt zum Schlafen und die Klimaanlage verwendet, das ging aber leider nicht. Leider ging auch die Lüftung in unserem Badezimmer nicht anschalten.

title: A stunningly luxurious winter retreat in Salzburg
positive_comment:
This was an incredible stay in a memorable and luxurious hotel. The staff, from the receptionist to the bar staff, restaurant servers and the chefs, were amazing; they were friendly, attentive and really knowledgeable about their work. Staying in a Superior Castle Room provided a refined and classic environment that felt very relaxing.

The Glass Garden restaurant was a particular highlight. The central glass sculpture by Dale Chihuly creates a beautiful atmosphere and the dining experience was incredible. It was certainly one of the most memorable meals we have ever had with course after course of exquisite tastes. Breakfast was also delightful, with staff who really added to our experience. The hilltop location gave us amazing views and the walk down into the streets was charming in the January snow. The spa was another highlight, and we thoroughly enjoyed the saunas and fitness room during our winter visit.

They’re very helpful and very welcoming.
The room’s space is excellent. 
They have bidet in the bathroom.

title: Wonderful boutique hotel/modern art gallery in the heart of Graz
positive_comment: We had an absolutely wonderful stay at Kai 36. The hotel is beautiful, feels like a boutique art gallery, the modern art in amazing contrast to the historical feel of the building and the area. The location is ideal. Our room was spacious, well designed, and comfortable. The complimentary cosmetics and teas feel luxurious. It is also nice to have a good cafe/bistro in the house. But best of all was the staff - everyone was very professional, nice and helpful. We really felt welcome and taken care of.
negative_comment: The parking fee (26 euros per night) feels a bit too high. But the hotel let us park the car in the garage as long as we wished on the day of departure, which was very generous.

title: Zentral, charmant, sehr freundlich, aber mit Hund überteuert
positive_comment: Patrick an der Bar und der Concierge waren ausgesprochen freundlich und aufmerksam. Man fühlte sich sofort gut aufgehoben. Das Zimmer war sehr charmant und die Lage wirklich einzigartig zentral.
negative_comment: Wir sind mit einem kleinen, ruhigen Hund angereist (Bolonka). Die Zusatzkosten von EUR 90 pro Nacht liegen fern jeder Verhältnismässigkeit. Wir reisen oft mit Hund, auch in hochwertigen Hotels, und haben nie einen solchen Betrag bezahlt. Wenn Hunde unerwünscht sind, soll das Hotel sie nicht zulassen. Sich jedoch als haustierfreundlich zu positionieren und dann einen derart hohen Preis zu verlangen, ist nicht vertretbar. Nach meiner Beschwerde wurde uns ein Frühstück angeboten, was wir anerkennen. Trotzdem sollte das Hotel die Preisgestaltung oder ein generelles Hundeverbot grundlegend prüfen.

title: Gediegenes und gemütliches Hotel
positive_comment:
Dieses historische Hotel, in perfekter Innenstadtlage, erfüllte alle unsere Anforderungen an ein 5* Hotel, einschl. Gepäck-/Room-/Turndown-/u. Parkservice. 
Die Juniorsuite verfügt über die neuesten technischen Standards in einem schönen historisch-rustikalem Interieur. 
Zum Erreichen des ruhigen, großen und sauberen Zimmers war es erforderlich, dass man trotz des vorhandenen Aufzugs, viele Treppen überwinden musste. Dies ist dem historischen Gebäude geschuldet und könnte u. U. älteren Personen Probleme bereiten, hierüber sollte man sich vor der Buchung informieren.
Das Personal im ganzen Haus war äußerst freundlich und gastorientiert.
Das Frühstück war ausgezeichnet. 
Die sehr guten Cocktails mit und ohne Alkohol sowie die kleine Speisekarte in der hauseigenen Bar, haben uns überzeugt, deshalb waren wir des Öfteren vor Ort.
Der Aufenthalt absolut schön und sehr empfehlenswert!
Wir kommen sehr gerne wieder in dieses gemütliche Wohlfühlhotel!

title: A stunningly luxurious winter retreat in Salzburg
positive_comment:
This was an incredible stay in a memorable and luxurious hotel. The staff, from the receptionist to the bar staff, restaurant servers and the chefs, were amazing; they were friendly, attentive and really knowledgeable about their work. Staying in a Superior Castle Room provided a refined and classic environment that felt very relaxing.

The Glass Garden restaurant was a particular highlight. The central glass sculpture by Dale Chihuly creates a beautiful atmosphere and the dining experience was incredible. It was certainly one of the most memorable meals we have ever had with course after course of exquisite tastes. Breakfast was also delightful, with staff who really added to our experience. The hilltop location gave us amazing views and the walk down into the streets was charming in the January snow. The spa was another highlight, and we thoroughly enjoyed the saunas and fitness room during our winter visit.

They’re very helpful and very welcoming.
The room’s space is excellent. 
They have bidet in the bathroom.

title: A relaxing and luxurious stay.

We particularly enjoyed our time in the pool, walking through the park near the hotel to the elevator which takes you down to the old town, and relaxing in our rooms.

I’d love to come in the spring/summer, the local ski resort was quite small for me but the hotel facilities/food made up for it.

title: Amazing weekend!
positive_comment:
We discovered this hotel and its location completely by chance — and it turned out to be an absolute gem. The entire setting is beautifully designed, with attention paid to every detail. Although the hotel is quite spacious, the way it’s laid out gives it a cozy, almost boutique feel.

The wellness area is truly exceptional. We especially appreciated the textile-free zone and were pleasantly surprised by how respectfully other guests behaved — it created a calm and relaxing atmosphere.

The food was excellent, the staff were friendly and professional, and the facilities cater equally well to those seeking an active holiday or pure relaxation. We loved that you can borrow bikes, trekking poles, and backpacks — we took advantage of the bike rental and everything was in perfect condition and super easy to arrange.

All in all, this is genuinely one of the best hotels we’ve ever stayed at — and we travel a lot. Highly recommended!

negative_comment: I would prefer less light I spa / relaxing areas, it was too bright - also the opening hrs could be earlier and later - eg gym could open 6am. Some spa areas open 11am others at 9am could open at 6am. People commenting that dinner stops at 8pm - actually is the kitchen not the dinner but even then I could order at 8:30pm.

Passt irgendwie nicht und hat unnötigerweise den sonst so guten Gesamteindruck belastet.

negative_comment: Am WC gab es tatsächlich mehrere Silberfischchen, beim Frühstücken auch eins gesichtet am Tisch. Schimmel außerhalb vom Pool aber hat mich persönlich nicht so gestört. Wir haben im zweiten Stock auch morgens und abends die anderen Gäste oben beim Essen, die Sessel bewegen gehört und das hat uns in der früh teilweise aus dem Schlaf gerissen (Wir sind Langschläfer). Sonst ist diesem Hotel nichts auszusetzen und wir würden es weiterempfehlen

Obwohl wir für Nebenleistungen ( war alles bestens ) mehr als den Zimmerpreis ausgegeben hatten, hat man uns für 30 min Fahrradbenutzung ( wollten diese am ersten Tag mal testen bevor wir sie dann am nächsten Tag für länger benutzten ) den vollen Preis für 4h berechnet und hat dann auch beim auschecken darauf bestanden. Der Betrag von 80 Euro war 4% der gekauften Nebenleistungen!!
Passt irgendwie nicht und hat unnötigerweise den sonst so guten Gesamteindruck belastet.
Sehr schade.

title: Das Hotel bietet sehr viel
positive_comment: Freundliche und aufmerksame Mitarbeiter. Leckeres Frühstück , entspannte Atmosphäre.
negative_comment:
Bin bereits mehrmals Gast gewesen und fühle mich sehr wohl in diesem Hotel. 
Ich muss aber leider anmerken die Qualität des Abendessens hat merklich nachgelassen seit 2 Jahren. 
Das Essen im Hauptgang war kaum gewürzt, wobei die Fischmenüs besser gelungen waren als die Fleisch Speisen, welche wie die Desserts fad im Geschmack waren. Zuvor waren die Speisen auf „Sterne“ Niveau, die Komposition der einzelnen Gänge hervorragend. So schade

title: Wenn Achensee, dann auf jeden Fall ins "Posthotel", zumindestens für Paare ohne Nachwuchs
positive_comment: Frühstück lässt keine Wünsche offen, verschiedene Müslis, Käse- und Wurstsorten, separater Raum für Säfte zum Selbstpressen, tolle Lage im Ort Achenkirch, Personal an der Rezeption, vor allem Stefanie sehr freundlich, hilfsbereit und "auf Zack", eigene kostenlose Tiefgarage mit Waschanlage und Staubsauger vorhanden, Achensee selbst mit dem Auto in ein paar Minuten erreichbar
negative_comment: Das Wetter, nein nur als Joke, dafür kann keiner etwas und die Eisheiligen waren superpünktlich und es wurde am 11. Mai nochmal richtig kalt und nass

positive_comment: Waren nun das dritte Mal da. Wie immer: sehr guter Service, sehr gastfreundlich und professionell, das Abendessen ist ein absoluter Traum, sowohl Menü an den Tisch oder gleichzeitig vom Buffet, sehr dekorativ und edel, hohe Qualität, tolle Weine, ein Highlight, die Saunalandschaft ist wunderbar, auch der Wellnessbereich. Großzügig, nicht überlaufen, tolle Ruhebereiche, wir kennen nichts Besseres. Das Hotel ist ein wenig verbaut, es wurde über die Jahre immer wieder erweitert, erneuert, renoviert, aber so ist das. Sehr gutes Frühstück, das Mittagessen ist im Bistro mit Salaten, Kuchen, Apfelstrudel, Kaffee, Suppe, Hauptgericht absolut ausreichend. Autowaschanlage kostenlos.
negative_comment: Unsere Suite im Schlössl war etwas abgewohnt, vollgestellt, Holzböden in die Jahre gekommen, beide Matratzen kaum 5 Sterne, in der Mitte durchgelegen, das Bad mit riesiger Badewanne, vielen Spiegeln und goldenen Armaturen aus der Zeit gefallen, überladen, am Heizkörper und einem Thermostat bekam meine Frau einen richtigen Stromschlag, weil eine Abdeckung fehlte, das ist kein Witz und das ist nicht zum Spaßen, geht gar nicht. Am ersten Abend war es richtig kalt im Bad. Beim Fahrradausleih gibt es ein wirklich mäßiges Rad oder für 40 Euro pro Halbtag ein E-Bike. Dritter Saunaaufguss entfiel, weil Ofen nicht mehr in Gang gebracht werden konnte. Die Hotelbar ist in die Jahre gekommen, einfach altmodisch, die beiden Barkeeper waren mit ihrem Handy beschäftigt und dann wieder aufmerksam.

negative_comment: Le parking sous terrain. L’accès et loin et on doit se débrouiller seul. Pas standing 5 étoiles dans la démarche. Mais c’est un détail.

positive_comment: Arrivare infreddoliti su un passo di montagna alpino e riscoprire un luogo dove potersi coccolare con piscina sauna e buon cibo Bhe! Qui lo puoi trovare. Personale gentile e disponibile
Fantastico! Camera spaziosa e pulita, colazione buonissima, staff molto gentile, location stupenda, letto comodissimo!!!

title: Luogo ideale per visitare l'abbazia di Admont, anche raggiungibile a piedi
positive_comment:
Camere confortevoli con ampia scelta di cuscini, mai visto un assortimento del genere.
Vista su abbazia e bosco con quercie secolari. Ampio parcheggio con ricarica per auto elettriche.
Piscina, sauna e bagno turco sono comprese.
Spettacolare la vista dalla sala pranzo/colazione all'ultimo piano.
negative_comment:
Sauna e bagno turco avevano una temperatura troppo elevata, bastava lasciare aperta la porta per un pò, solo è uno spreco di energia. Per la colazione migliorerei il caffè, non particolarmente buono. Consiglierei un cambio di fornitore.
Il ristorante ha un menu poco vario e non offre piatti particolamente pregiati, c'e' ampio spazio per un miglioramento e vista la location andrebbe fatto.

positive_comment: Struttura bellissima, comoda per visitare l’abbazia. Centro benessere piccolino ma bello e funzionale.

negative_comment: I didn't like... that I couldn't stay longer.

positive_comment: If you want a place to relax, go to the surrounding nature and also enjoy wellness, you will like this place. The room was clean and comfy. The SPA area is nice - three saunas and a colder pool for swimming and cooling down and nice resting area.

The whole hotel was just beautiful, the staff very helpful and accommodating. Breakfast was a wonderful selection of food and it all tasted delicious. The spa facilities were clean and well serviced. It was one of the best stays my fiancee and I have had ever. Thank you.

La salle de sport
negative_comment:

Le personne peut se montrer très froid et directif (petit déjeuner)

title: Endroit magnifique près du lac
positive_comment:
Superbe complexe,possibilité de faire plusieurs activités, calme.
Restaurant et buffet a volonté de très bonne qualité.
negative_comment: Aucun effort du personnel concernant la langue,donc difficile de s'exprimer et partager, certes anglais et bien sûr Allemand.

title: Un paradis en pleine montagne
positive_comment:
Nous n'avons pas les mots justes pour décrire la perfection de l'hôtel. Les petites attentions, la prise en compte des demandes au fil des jours, le professionnalisme général, la propreté, les infrastructures, les serveurs compétents et terriblement gentils, la qualité de la nourriture, les activités, l'esprit général du complexe... Ce 5 étoiles est dans notre top 3, sans aucun doute !

Peut-être que la basse saison nous a permis de profiter du plein potentiel de l'hôtel.
negative_comment:
Deux points :

- Le shift du personnel était un peu compliqué... la dernière femme de chambre s'est permise de changer nos affaires de place, de ranger le rasoir avec la brosse à dent, de prendre le tapis du chien sans le remettre, n'a pas remis du café et du sucre... et ne parlant pas anglais, elle n'avait pas l'air de comprendre ce qu'il en était...

- une vraie machine à café dans la chambre et pas du café soluble en sachet plastique serait davantage apprécié.

positive_comment: More than expected. Very clean, very good breakfast.

title: Wunderbares Haus - immer wieder einen Besuch wert
positive_comment: Mehr als ein Hotel - ein Kraftort voll positiver Energie bei dem ich mich immer wieder wie Zuhause fühle. Das Haus ist in so vielen Details sehr vielen teureren Hotels weltweit überlegen.
negative_comment: Anregung: Beim Vitalbuffet entspricht das Mittagsgericht nicht dem Niveau des Hauses. Das liegt nicht etwa an der Qualität der Zutaten - diese sind exzellent. Vegetarische, Vegane, grüne, gesunde Küche ist heute so kreativ und vielfältig in der Zubereitung. Hier wäre es absolut großartig wenn mehr Augenmerk auf die Zubereitung z.B. echter pan-asiatischer Küche gelegt wird. Hier merkt man deutlich dass dies zwar versucht wird, den Köchen aber die Skills fehlen.

title: Sehr empfehlenswert
positive_comment: Die Lage und das Angebot, sowie das Essen waren super.

title: Genial!
positive_comment: Es sind 5 Sterne, ohne dass es sich nach der Steifheit von 5 Sterne anfühlt.

title: Wellness Urlaub vom feinsten. Wir haben uns erholt und sehr wohlgefühlt. Wir kommen wieder :)
positive_comment: Das Einrichtungskonzept und Kulinarik. Wir hatten ein schönes geräumiges Zimmer. Alle Mitarbeiter waren sehr nett.  Wir haben uns erholt und sehr wohlgefühlt. Wir werden auf jeden Fall wiederkommen.
negative_comment: nichts

positive_comment: Als erstes muss man die Mitarbeiter loben. Man wird schon beim Frühstück mit guter Laune empfangen. Zu jeder Zeit habe ich mich willkommen gefühlt. title: Chambre avec vue
positive_comment: Très belle surprise! L'hotel est moderne et a tout ce dont nous avions besoin: calme, belle chambre avec balcon, équipements au top (piscine, sauna, hamam, salle de fitness, grande terrasse) et une belle vue sur la montagne et l'abbaye. Le petit déjeuner est copieux et varié.

Le petit-déjeuner, beaucoup de choix, très bon !
L'espace détente très agréable

title: Très bon séjour.
positive_comment:
Petit déjeuner somptueux.
Hôtel idéal pour venir visiter l’abbaye et sa magnifique bibliothèque.

- chambre moderne, propre
- Belle vue sur les montagnes
- Spa agréable
negative_comment:
- Oreillers repos durs. Très mal dormi et réveil avec nuque à demi bloquée
- odeur de fumier à l’extérieur. Certes c’est à la campagne mais pas très Agra ale quand on se pose au bord de la piscine ou qu’on aime dormir de être ouverte 
- Restaurant: serveur hautain, nourriture correct sans plus, et surtout attention à l’arnaque du menu: le prix du menu est plus cher que les plats pris séparément ! On a cru qu’il y avait peut être des boissons incluses dans le menu, mais que nenni. La serveuse a confirmé que sinon prenait la formule 3 plats, on paierait le pris du menu et non le prix des plats annoncé à l’unité. Du coup on a fait l’impasse sur l’entrée.

title: Hotel is excellent with great staff and facilities.
positive_comment:

The room was very well appointed and very clean. I could not fault the accommodation.
The Resturant and food was of a high quality with plenty of options at every meal.
Staff were great and very helpful and made my stay very enjoyable.
negative_comment: Location was a little isolated with not to many options or facilities local to the hotel and bus services were one an hour during February.  Which meant walking or a taxi to get around and taxis were expensive.

title: Lovely weekend for me time. I felt so relaxed
positive_comment: Beautiful. Amazing facilities. Great sauna area and loved the gym. The morning breakfast was amazing
negative_comment: Nothin really

title: Amazing weekend!
positive_comment:
We discovered this hotel and its location completely by chance — and it turned out to be an absolute gem. The entire setting is beautifully designed, with attention paid to every detail. Although the hotel is quite spacious, the way it’s laid out gives it a cozy, almost boutique feel.

The wellness area is truly exceptional. We especially appreciated the textile-free zone and were pleasantly surprised by how respectfully other guests behaved — it created a calm and relaxing atmosphere.

The food was excellent, the staff were friendly and professional, and the facilities cater equally well to those seeking an active holiday or pure relaxation. We loved that you can borrow bikes, trekking poles, and backpacks — we took advantage of the bike rental and everything was in perfect condition and super easy to arrange.

All in all, this is genuinely one of the best hotels we’ve ever stayed at — and we travel a lot. Highly recommended!

title: It was well worth it.
positive_comment: Wonderful location, great service, and amazing food.
negative_comment: I thought smoking should not be allowed near the pools.

title: I would definitely go back.
positive_comment: Coziness, excellent food, loved the concept of the smaller portions so food won’t be wasted - but there is plenty of food to refill
negative_comment: I would prefer less light I spa / relaxing areas, it was too bright - also the opening hrs could be earlier and later - eg gym could open 6am. Some spa areas open 11am others at 9am could open at 6am. People commenting that dinner stops at 8pm - actually is the kitchen not the dinner but even then I could order at 8:30pm.

Unbelievable spa and infinity pool, be prepared for nakedness if you are not used to this.
Barman Alex, Waiter Dejan were excellent company, hope they are there when I return. Markus also was friendly and helpful. Night staff cleaner very sorry cannot remember his name (began with S) was so so kind and funny.  
Food ok, nice 7-8/10. Great choice
Very happy with the location and immense views!

Not a very touristy place, not sure many English visit, even in the local town it was quite intimidating and I have visited and stayed here many times. This time especially was quite uncomfortable.

Excellentes Essen und sehr freundliches Personal. Der Panorama Pool und der Wellness Bereich ist beeindruckend.

negative_comment: Nichts - Alles bestens!

negative_comment: Dauerbelegung der Liegeplätze im Wellnessbereich (Kann das Hotel nur wenig dafür)

positive_comment: Die Lage des Hotels. Das vorzügliche Essen und der zuvorkommende Service.

title: Wir kommen wieder.

title: Ein 5Sterne Hotel mit echtem herrlichen Bergblick und Verwöhnen auf höchsten Niveau
positive_comment: Schon der Empfang im Hotel Bergblick war sehr freundlich... man fühlte sich sofort wohl! Gepäck wurde gleich auf das,Zimmer gebracht, wir konnten schon nit der erweiterten Halbpension starten... Das,Essen war wirklich exquisit, jeden Tag konnte man verschiedene Gerichte auswählen; vor allem das Galamenue war wirklich hervorragend! Auch die Zimmer waren sehr modern und ansprechend ausgestattet, in jedem Zimmer hat man den "Bergblick". Wir haben uns seeehr wohl gefühlt! Nicht zu vergessen der inzwischen wieder erweiterte Spabereich... 3 verschiedene Saunen, Dampfbad, Infrarot, Eisbad, Salzgrotte und wunderbare Ruheräume... keine Wünsche blieben offen! Auch die Behandlungen von Mara und Ludwig waren außergewöhnlich! Alles in allem ein Haus, das den 5 Sternen zurecht entspricht! Danke für diese tollen Tage!
negative_comment: Im Service waren fast ausschließlich Bedienungen aus dem Ausland, die immer sehr freundlich waren!. Manchmal kam es zu längeren Wartezeiten... aber das gibt es ja überall! Ehrlich gesagt,  ist dies kein wirklicher Makel... Das Personal war wirklich immer ausgesprochen nett und freundlich!

title: On se sent comme à la maison et le personnel et très avenant
positive_comment:
Les chambres sont très belles, modernes et calmes.
Le petit-déjeuner est excellent

title: Excellent séjour et nous reviendrons
positive_comment:
Excellent hotel, prestigieuse avec de très belles installations. 
Zone Spa fantastique et surtout très bien entretenue. Beaucoup de variété 
Partie gastronomique est absolument fabuleuse.
Personnel très accueillant et très poli.
negative_comment:
Qualité du lit ( chambre 014) insuffisante pour ce standard - lit ancien et matelas durs.
Présence dans l'hotel de chiens qui aboyaient régulièrement et qui n'ont rien à faire dans un hotel de ce style. 
Les chiens ne devraient pas rester seuls dans une chambre toute la journée

title: J'y suis retourné avec des amis car j'en avais gardé un excellent souvenir de notre séjour il y a 6
positive_comment: La disponibilité du personnel, sa gentillesse, sa serviabilité.Tout est fait pour que les hôtes se sentent bien. Les chambres sont nettoyées dès que nous partons petit déjeuner, les oreillers et les duvets ont chaque jour un pliage différent. C'est superbe.

Breakfast and gym staff were great.

I’d love to come in the spring/summer, the local ski resort was quite small for me but the hotel facilities/food made up for it.

negative_comment: The bathroom was very moldy, some lightning did not work, room did not have a nice view - parking, and the fitness is very small and not well equipped.

positive_comment:
The staff were friendly and helpful. The location was perfect for enjoying a relaxing time in Admont and to easily explore near by as well. The room was equipped with everything you would need and very comfortable. The mountain view was beautiful and lovely to enjoy. 
The breakfast was impressive and they accommodated gluten free diet due to allergies. 
Would recommend to stay and would consider to stay again!
negative_comment:
Everything was lovely but a couple things I would note would be: 
The patio room door was broken when we checked in, however, the staff was very helpful and timely with correcting the issue and providing us a new room. 
The spa are is a lot smaller than expected but still nice and enjoyable. 
Also unfortunate that for the price that parking and breakfast at least is not included but again still a lovely stay and would recommend!

positive_comment:
Everything was great!
Thank you so much for the lovely stay

title: Fab hotel for short stay.
positive_comment: Fab hotel for short stay, great setting surrounded by mountains, near monestary, beautifully set up and equipped inside. every room has a balcony. Comfortable beds, no noise from other rooms or corridor. May stay longer next time.
negative_comment: nothing.

title: einfach perfekt….
positive_comment:
man kann dort komplett abschalten…. 
die ruhe dort ist einfach beeindruckend… dies gilt für die gesamte anlage…. auch das personal ist stets zuvorkommend und immer bemüht es dem gast recht zu machen…. man kann sich dort nicht mehr wünschen…. 
für mich immer wieder das beste was österreich an Therme zu bieten hat

title: Perfekt zum Entspannen
positive_comment: Personal sehr freundlich, Frühstück sehr gut, perfekt zum entspannen.
negative_comment: Alles gut gewesen. Nichts zu bemängeln

title: Great fitness/spa/food
positive_comment:
I booked a junior suite- it was really spacious and bed super comfortable. 
Spa facilities and classes/gym equipment fabulous. 
Food was excellent, breakfast in particular offering a huge amount of choice. Loved the healthy options including juices. 
Breakfast and gym staff were great. 
Loved the WhatsApp service
negative_comment:
Spa treatments quite expensive and probably my fault from not understanding what they were. 
Two I didn’t feel were good value but the hot stone massage was brilliant. 

Room service menu would be good. Note, I did travel solo and felt more comfortable eating alone . A lot of guests were couples so probably not needed. 

I’d love to come in the spring/summer, the local ski resort was quite small for me but the hotel facilities/food made up for it.

title: Hotel is excellent with great staff and facilities.
positive_comment:
The hotel and spa were fantastic with plenty to do.
The room was very well appointed and very clean. I could not fault the accommodation.
The Resturant and food was of a high quality with plenty of options at every meal.
Staff were great and very helpful and made my stay very enjoyable.
negative_comment: Location was a little isolated with not to many options or facilities local to the hotel and bus services were one an hour during February.  Which meant walking or a taxi to get around and taxis were expensive.

title: Lovely weekend for me time. I felt so relaxed
positive_comment: Beautiful. Amazing facilities. Great sauna area and loved the gym. The morning breakfast was amazing
negative_comment: Nothin really

title: Amazing weekend!
positive_comment:
We discovered this hotel and its location completely by chance — and it turned out to be an absolute gem. The entire setting is beautifully designed, with attention paid to every detail. Although the hotel is quite spacious, the way it’s laid out gives it a cozy, almost boutique feel.

The wellness area is truly exceptional. We especially appreciated the textile-free zone and were pleasantly surprised by how respectfully other guests behaved — it created a calm and relaxing atmosphere.

The food was excellent, the staff were friendly and professional, and the facilities cater equally well to those seeking an active holiday or pure relaxation. We loved that you can borrow bikes, trekking poles, and backpacks — we took advantage of the bike rental and everything was in perfect condition and super easy to arrange.

All in all, this is genuinely one of the best hotels we’ve ever stayed at — and we travel a lot. Highly recommended!

title: It was well worth it.
positive_comment: Wonderful location, great service, and amazing food.
negative_comment: I thought smoking should not be allowed near the pools.

title: I would definitely go back.
positive_comment: Coziness, excellent food, loved the concept of the smaller portions so food won’t be wasted - but there is plenty of food to refill
negative_comment: I would prefer less light I spa / relaxing areas, it was too bright - also the opening hrs could be earlier and later - eg gym could open 6am. Some spa areas open 11am others at 9am could open at 6am. People commenting that dinner stops at 8pm - actually is the kitchen not the dinner but even then I could order at 8:30pm.

title: Practically perfect in every way!
positive_comment: This is the most perfect Hotel. So much to do, excellent food, just the nicest staff, super clean! I loved every second of my stay!

Tolle Anlage, up to date.
Gutes Preis/Leistungsverhältnis
negative_comment:
Obwohl wir für Nebenleistungen ( war alles bestens ) mehr als den Zimmerpreis ausgegeben hatten, hat man uns für 30 min Fahrradbenutzung ( wollten diese am ersten Tag mal testen bevor wir sie dann am nächsten Tag für länger benutzten ) den vollen Preis für 4h berechnet und hat dann auch beim auschecken darauf bestanden. Der Betrag von 80 Euro war 4% der gekauften Nebenleistungen!!
Passt irgendwie nicht und hat unnötigerweise den sonst so guten Gesamteindruck belastet.
Sehr schade.

title: Das Hotel bietet sehr viel
positive_comment: Freundliche und aufmerksame Mitarbeiter. Leckeres Frühstück , entspannte Atmosphäre.
negative_comment:
Bin bereits mehrmals Gast gewesen und fühle mich sehr wohl in diesem Hotel. 
Ich muss aber leider anmerken die Qualität des Abendessens hat merklich nachgelassen seit 2 Jahren. 
Das Essen im Hauptgang war kaum gewürzt, wobei die Fischmenüs besser gelungen waren als die Fleisch Speisen, welche wie die Desserts fad im Geschmack waren. Zuvor waren die Speisen auf „Sterne“ Niveau, die Komposition der einzelnen Gänge hervorragend. So schade

positive_comment:
Très bel établissement avec un très bon petit déjeuner. Très très grand espace de relaxation avec plusieurs piscine et sauna, hammam qui invite à flâner une demi journée. Bonne salle de sport. 
Chambre très confortable.
negative_comment: Le parking sous terrain. L’accès et loin et on doit se débrouiller seul. Pas standing 5 étoiles dans la démarche. Mais c’est un détail.

positive_comment: Alles hat uns gefallen. Die Angestellten sowie der Chef alle super freundlich und zuvorkommend. Und die Küche ist hervorragend. Es gibt nichts aber auch gar nichts zu beanstanden. In diesem Haus wird vieles richtig gemacht . Wir empfehlen zu 100 Prozent weiter
negative_comment: Wir waren leider nur eine Nacht aber wir kommen wieder

title: Tolles Alpenhotel auf sehr hohem Niveau.
positive_comment: Großzügiges Zimmer, sehr gutes Abendessen, großes Weinkarte, ausreichendes Frühstück, schöne und gepflegte Saunalandschaft
negative_comment: Massagetermine waren alle komplett ausgebucht, auch wenn Hotel nicht ausgebucht war. Hotelstil unterscheidet sich nicht von anderen Alpenhotels. Aber dies sind Kritikpunkte auf hohem Niveau.

title: Es ist ein sehr schönes und angenehmes Hotel mit perfekter Lage zum Skifahren! Gerne wieder einmal.
positive_comment: Lage, Essen, Wellnessbereich, Personal, Mischung aus traditionell und modern, Ambiente.
negative_comment: Der Regler der Heizung im Bad bzw. WC hat nicht funktioniert. Man konnte ihn aber einfach ausstecken, wenn es zu warm wurde.

title: Fantastisches Hotel für eine erholsame Auszeit
positive_comment:
Tolle Ausstattung: hochwertige Möbel, genügend Stauraum im Zimmer
Sehr sauberes Hotel
Abwechslungsreiches Abendessen, gutes Frühstück mit frisch zubereitete Eiergerichten und Säften.

title: Alles in allem,dank tollem Personal ganz gut
positive_comment: Badeteich war sehr schön,Pool auch schöne Liegen, Zimmer groß
negative_comment: Abendessen zwar mit toller Beschreibung aber kalt und wenig gewürzt, Frühstück sehr überschaubar ,Kaffeekapseln auf dem Zimmer 2€ finde eine Frechheit, kleines Cola aus Minibar 5,10€.

title: Für mich ein sehr behaglicher , erholsamer Aufenthalt , wenngleich für eine Einzelperson sehr teuer.
positive_comment: Das Frühstück war vielfältig, Pikantes und Süßes, verschiedene Bio-Säfte, Obst und auch Würstchen und Eierspeise. Sehr schön ist die Wiese mit Liegen direkt am See sowie die Terrasse mit Blick auf Trisslwand. Herrlich ist es auch im Indoorpool zu schwimmen.
negative_comment: Ein kleines Detail was mir aufgefallen: Am Pfingstmontag waren am Holzsteg zwei Fauteuils mit Polsterungen und auch zwei Liegen mit angenehmer roter Polsterung. Ich wartete am Dienstag auf die Polsterung der beiden Liegen, wurden aber nicht aufgelegt. Das hat mich verwundert.

title: Excellent over night stay
positive_comment: Great place, the staff are excellent and very welcoming, rooms were clean and comfortable.

title: Place that makes you feel like a royalty!!!
positive_comment: The hotel has a great view over Admont, and it has specific vibe. like transporting you back in time. We enjoyed the silence too, you really can hear you thoughts, and have a stroll in the woods nearby. The restaurant is great: we had dinner and breakfast, and there were quite a wide range of options, made out of local produce.
negative_comment: Nothing to mention.

title: Basic but nice
positive_comment: Located in an old castle above the little town of Admont, this place is quiet and very basic. The best part is the spacious garden and the small but comfortable sauna.
negative_comment: The breakfast is rather basic, as are the rooms.

positive_comment:
They where so accommodating to everything, specially since we got there a little late because of traffic through Germany, they made even made us a few pizzas we could eat. 

And I know it has nothing to do with the Hotel, but the Abbey down town made a very pleasant surprise for the stay. One of the most beautiful places to visit ever.
negative_comment: Nothing really.

title: Magical!
positive_comment:
Amazing location! Historic place, great views of the surrounding mountains and fields.
Comfortable beds.
Staff is very kind.
We would love to come back and enjoy again!

title: Lovely hotel on the hill with amazing views
positive_comment: Really pretty on top of a hill, amazing views, great for the dog, quiet and calm. The crew was also lovely, very nice, caring and it’s a GREAT hotel if you travel with your dog
negative_comment:
We have stayed in other JUFA’s where the food offer was bigger so we were expecting a bit more on that side, it was still delicious and lovely to wake up on Easter with some chocolate and snacks for our dog on our table 
The shower-head could be replaced for a new one

title: Great value for money
positive_comment:
Breakfast was okay.
We were visitng in the winter months, but the room and the dining room were nice and warm. Loved the view of Admont from our room. The room was clean.
negative_comment: Bathroom upstairs! The layout of the room was a bit strange. But that is what you get, when staying in a castle, I guess.

title: Really enjoyed the beautiful schloss
positive_comment: Beautiful surroundings, also the accommodation itself was exceptional with beautiful views, good breakfast and helpful staff. We were also with a dog who was more than welcome there. We enjoyed our stay very much and recommend it to everyone who wants to feel like in a castle.
negative_comment: The only thing we missed was the possibility of dinner directly at the accommodation

title: Unique experience
positive_comment: The location is beautiful. The palace is beautiful. The restaurant has good food. There is a playground for the kids.
negative_comment: Rooms are small

title: Stay in a Castle
positive_comment: The hotel staff were very friendly and helpful. Breakfast was excellent and extensive and staff were very friendly and helpful. Our room, in one of the round towers, was large with many windows to spectacular views of the countryside below and mountains beyond. The bathroom and room were very clean. The hot water took some time to come through. Would definitely recommend just on the scenic location and being able to stay in a castle!
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Une nuit au château
positive_comment:
- le cadre: château très beau avec une jolie chapelle
-  la chambre : spacieuse et propre 
- le petit déjeuner: beaucoup de choix et bon
- le personnel : accueillant et sympathique 
- l’emplacement: vue magnifique sur les montagnes 
- la gaufrette Mamer : une attention qui fait plaisir
negative_comment: - décoration des chambres très simples voire peut être trop simple en raison du contexte. On vient pour dormir dans un château et malheureusement, l’expérience n’est pas accompagnée jusqu’au bout (en dehors des serviettes de toilettes avec la fleur de lys). Il s’agit d’une décoration de chambre qui peut être retrouvée dans n’importe quel autre hôtel. Cela est dommage car tout le reste est génial.

title: Agréable
positive_comment: La situation et le charme de l'hôtel. Le petit déjeuner.
negative_comment: Les horaires du dîner  (que de 18h à 20h).

title: Correct
positive_comment:
C'est toujours agréable d'être dans un château.
La literie est bonne
negative_comment: La rénovation qui commence à vieillir.

title: Cadre et séjour exceptionnels
positive_comment:
Cadre exceptionnel, personnel sympathique et à votre écoute, dîner succulent.
La table à votre nom est un plus.
negative_comment: Pas pu profiter des extérieurs comme il pleuvait, dommage !

title: Soggiorno molto piacevole
positive_comment: Edificio molto bello e con un bellissimo panorama.

Ho soggiornato in questo hotel castello una notte con lo scopo di visitare la biblioteca monastica di Admont che si trova a circa 3 km. Il luogo è davvero incantevole, immerso nel verde e con vista sui monti circostanti. Lo staff gentile e disponibile. Possibilità di cenare in hotel con servizio a buffet.
negative_comment: Niente da segnalare.

positive_comment: Fantastic staff, very nice people. Amazing breakfast and cozy room.

Ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo in una location molto suggestiva e sicuramente ben tenuta - camere pulite, con letto comodo, spazi adeguati e doccia piacevolissima - molto apprezzata la colazione così come lo spazio a lei destinato - belle le stanze ed il giardino dove ritrovarsi con gli amici quando non si va in giro
negative_comment: Purtroppo in Austria in estate ed in inverno si usano i piumini ma si dovrebbe fare più attenzione alle temperature. Quando queste salgono di certo sarebbe più opportuno trovare una soluzione alternativa perché non si può dormire CON ma non si può dormire SENZA. Peccato

positive_comment: Bellissimo castello che mantiene il fascino della struttura d’epoca. Personale molto gentile, ottima la colazione e anche la cena.
negative_comment: Non può non piacere qualcosa… è tutto una favola

title: Splendida notte in un castello nel bosco

Location splendida
negative_comment: Niente, tutto perfetto.

positive_comment: La posizione all'interno di uno splendido castello con vista mozzafiato e l'ottima colazione

title: Relaxing hotel with a lot of potential
positive_comment: The view was amazing, the spa area was really nice and the swimming pond a great addition. The staff was friendly and helpful and the rooms are really big. Overall, we had a very relaxing stay.
negative_comment:
The hotel is marked as a 5-star hotel but on their own website and when we arrived, we could see that it was actually a 4-star hotel. 

The bathroom was weirdly cut and could have been utilised a better - making one room instead of a closed off shower room and a toilet room.
We were a bit disappointed with the food. The quality was really high and the food was delicious, but we had to queue for many things at breakfast and the dinner servings were very small (just remove the buffet and make the actual 3-course meal servings larger). Further, we had to pay for water (except breakfast) as well as coffee in the afternoon for the late lunch/ cake - which should be included. There is also no service at the swimming pond and very limited sun beds and umbrellas. The swimming pond also looked very different than on the pictures - it is probably a mock up before they built it. Finally, the gym was quite small and the ceiling low making it difficult to exercise on the cross trainer when you’re a bit taller. 

If these things were adjusted we would love to come back but it didn’t feel like good value for money as it is.

title: Cool and rainy outside..Very nice and comfortable inside
positive_comment: Cleanliness of all locations. Everyone spoke English and they were courteous and professional. The food was much better than the previous time I stayed there and the waitresses were very helpful with making my selection by explaining how the food was prepared.
negative_comment:
The lounge chairs by the pool are far too low and both difficult and unsafe to get in and out. I am 81 years old but I observed many 65+ senior citizens who had difficulty also. One had assistance getting down and up/out. There were a few higher chairs but were all fully occupied. 
The room was very nice but the water from the shower flowed into the other floor and did not drain and a towel had to be used to absorb the water and allow me to stand and brush my teeth etc. 
Two pillows were almost flat and unusable as pillows. When checking out, I told the receptionist and she made a note in the computer for future reference and hopefully this will resolve the problem. Thanks

title: Bester Thermenurlaub in Bad Blumau!
positive_comment: Perfekter Ort zum Wohlfühlen, Entspannung pur, beste Therme  und Hotel Österreichs.
negative_comment: Alles perfekt!

positive_comment: Alles war außergewöhnlich ansprechend,  sauber und super erholsam. Wunderbares essen,  tolles Ambiente und Service

title: Es war ein wirklich sehr gelungener Mutter-Tochter-Trip! Wir kommen wieder. :-)
positive_comment:
Zur Verpflegung:
Wir hatten unseren Aufenthalt mit Halbpension gebucht. Das Frühstück bietet eine große Auswahl an frischen Speisen – Eier, Aufschnitt, Joghurt, Müsli etc. – und entspricht einem typisch erweiterten kontinentalen Frühstücksbuffet. Das Abendbuffet hat uns ebenfalls positiv überrascht, sowohl durch die vielfältigen Optionen als auch durch die hohe Qualität der Speisen.

Außerhalb der Halbpension haben wir täglich am Nachmittag in einem der À-la-carte-Restaurants der Therme einen kleinen Snack zu uns genommen. Sowohl qualitativ als auch preislich absolut top.

Zum Zimmer:
Wir hatten ein Doppelzimmer im Ziegelhaus. Es war sehr schön eingerichtet, bot ausreichend Platz – auch für längere Aufenthalte von mehr als vier Nächten – und war durchweg sehr sauber. Das Bett war angenehm fest, also weder übermäßig weich, wie man es manchmal in anderen Hotels erlebt, noch zu hart.
negative_comment:
Der Aufenthalt war insgesamt wirklich sehr gelungen – wir hätten lediglich zwei kleine Anmerkungen:

1. Das Rührei am Frühstücksbuffet wirkte eher wie aus Vollei zubereitet und war recht stark gegart. Dadurch hatte es eine sehr feste, fast polentaartige Konsistenz und wirkte optisch ungewöhnlich hell, zudem blieb es geschmacklich etwas hinter den Erwartungen zurück.

2. Die Dusche im Zimmer: Der Wasserdruck war in unserem Fall leider recht gering. Möglicherweise war das nur in unserem Zimmer so – wir haben es vor Ort nicht angesprochen, da es für uns kein großes Problem darstellte. In einem Thermenhotel wäre ein etwas stärkerer Wasserdruck dennoch wünschenswert, um das Duscherlebnis noch angenehmer zu machen.

positive_comment:
Wenigstens noch eine Hotel-/Therme wo das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis noch sehr gut passt.
Es war unser erster Wellness-Urlaub mit Baby (7 Monate alt). Das Personal war sehr zuvorkommend und nett, die Zimmer schön (und nicht eckig) und sauber, das Essen sehr gut (auch das vegane Menü). Es ist kein Wunsch offen geblieben.
negative_comment: Das einzige ist, dass man das Elektroauto laden könnte (was ja super ideal wäre), aber die Preise sind so horrend, dass man sich's anders überlegt.

positive_comment: Die Robert Rogner Bad Blumau ist einfach einzigartig,  für uns Höchstpunktezahl mal 3.
Die Therme ist Top...das Essen ist sensationell !!

Sehr reichhaltiges Frühstücksbuffet und Abendbuffet, es gab immer etwas ohne Gluten, tolle Anlage, alles bestens, man kann sich an der außergewöhnlichen und schönen Architektur in den Innenräumen wie auch von außen gar nicht satt sehen, abwechslungsreiche Angebote.

Sehr schönes Hotel in ruhiger Aussichtslage. Alles sehr gepflegt. Das Personal war aufmerksam und die Qualität der Küche sensationell. Zu erwähnen ist auch der große und vielseitige SPA-Bereich. Hier kann man wunderbar entspannen. Wir kommen gerne wieder.

Excellentes Essen und sehr freundliches Personal. Der Panorama Pool und der Wellness Bereich ist beeindruckend.
Die Uhrensammlung ist überwältigend.
negative_comment: Nichts - Alles bestens!

positive_comment: Das Essen, das Hotel an sich, die Freundlichkeit und der außergewöhnliche Service
negative_comment: Dauerbelegung der Liegeplätze im Wellnessbereich (Kann das Hotel nur wenig dafür)

positive_comment: Die Lage des Hotels. Das vorzügliche Essen und der zuvorkommende Service.
negative_comment: Wenig Abendprogramm

title: Wir kommen wieder.
positive_comment: Generell war alles top. Herausheben wollen Pool und Wellnessbereich, Yoga, Massage, Essen, Musikprogramme am Abend.

title: Ein 5Sterne Hotel mit echtem herrlichen Bergblick und Verwöhnen auf höchsten Niveau
positive_comment: Schon der Empfang im Hotel Bergblick war sehr freundlich... man fühlte sich sofort wohl! Gepäck wurde gleich auf das,Zimmer gebracht, wir konnten schon nit der erweiterten Halbpension starten... Das,Essen war wirklich exquisit, jeden Tag konnte man verschiedene Gerichte auswählen; vor allem das Galamenue war wirklich hervorragend! Auch die Zimmer waren sehr modern und ansprechend ausgestattet, in jedem Zimmer hat man den "Bergblick". Wir haben uns seeehr wohl gefühlt! Nicht zu vergessen der inzwischen wieder erweiterte Spabereich... 3 verschiedene Saunen, Dampfbad, Infrarot, Eisbad, Salzgrotte und wunderbare Ruheräume... keine Wünsche blieben offen! Auch die Behandlungen von Mara und Ludwig waren außergewöhnlich! Alles in allem ein Haus, das den 5 Sternen zurecht entspricht! Danke für diese tollen Tage!
negative_comment: Im Service waren fast ausschließlich Bedienungen aus dem Ausland, die immer sehr freundlich waren!. Manchmal kam es zu längeren Wartezeiten... aber das gibt es ja überall! Ehrlich gesagt,  ist dies kein wirklicher Makel... Das Personal war wirklich immer ausgesprochen nett und freundlich!

positive_comment: Alles hat uns gefallen. Die Angestellten sowie der Chef alle super freundlich und zuvorkommend. Und die Küche ist hervorragend. Es gibt nichts aber auch gar nichts zu beanstanden. In diesem Haus wird vieles richtig gemacht . Wir empfehlen zu 100 Prozent weiter
negative_comment: Wir waren leider nur eine Nacht aber wir kommen wieder

positive_comment:
Sehr freundliche  Personal , super Bedienung,essen war lecker , spa -das beste , von allen , die wir schon erlebt haben!!!!!
Sauberkeit -überall !!!
Das Zimmer war sehr sympathisch!

Super Massage !!!

title: Super empfehlenswerte Hotel für eine intensive Erholung
positive_comment: Sehr schönes und interessantes Haus und immer sehr gutes Essen
negative_comment: Es war in der Nacht zu warm

title: Die Unterkunft kann mit einer guten Sauna punkten
positive_comment: Das Frühstück war sehr gut. Die Sauna hat uns auch gut gefallen. Dort kann man auch eine Kleinigkeit essen. Das Zimmer war groß und der Balkon hatte einen Ausblick zum Dachstein.
negative_comment: Das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis stimmt nicht. Die Busverbindungen in die Stadt waren relativ dünn gesät, so dass man ohne Auto nicht so komfortabel unterwegs war.

title: Erholung pur!
positive_comment: Großes Zimmer mit schönem Balkon, alles da was man braucht. Leckeres Frühstück, es hat an nichts gefehlt. Tolle Therme.
negative_comment: Matratze war etwas durchgelegen, da wir nur eine Nacht gebucht hatten, hatten wir es nicht gemeldet.

title: Kurzer Zwischenstopp
positive_comment:
Überall sehr freundliches Personal...Rezeption, Frühstück, Bar....
Sehr geräumiges Zimmer, alles sauber
Parkplatz vor dem Hotel
negative_comment: Der Außenpool ist sowohl im Textil- als auch Saunabereich sehr klein.

title: Super Wochenende
positive_comment: Sehr freundliches Pesonal, Frühstücksbuffet ist reichhaltig. Alle erwartungen wurden erfüllt.
negative_comment: Hotelbar sperrt leider schon um 22:00 zu....

title: Sembra di vivere dentro un'opera d'arte
positive_comment:
Posto meraviglioso
Architettura stupenda sembra di vivere dentro un'opera d'arte
Buffet molto vario e ottimo
Personalw molti cortrse
La cura di ogni piu' piccolo particolare, la grande pulizia e la qualita' del cibo assolutamente eccellente. Un eccellenza veramente rara da trovare, complimenti!!!
negative_comment: Ci e' piaciuto tutto

title: Unicità sotto ogni aspetto.
positive_comment: È la quarta volta che torno. Mi sembra di vivere nelle favole architettonicamente parlando. L'acqua delle piscine è calda, l'ambiente è caldo e accogliente. Magari potrebbero incrementare le sedute aromatiche in sauna. Mancano brochure e menù in italiano (apparsi questi ultimi l'ultima cena) per cui abbiamo usato spesso lens. Ma è tutto talmente bello ed il cibo talmente buono che va bene anche così.

title: Un luogo rigenerante!!!!
positive_comment: La struttura è unica. In un ambiente lussureggiate. Una architettura armoniosa. Ci si sente come a casa propria.
negative_comment: In verità l unico miglioramento possibile sarebbe il bidet nelle stanze. Ma, All estero è piuttosto raro.

positive_comment: Hanno prestato ommediata attenzione quando ho detto çhe era il compleanmo
negative_comment: Un po' affollato anche in bassa stagione e giorni lavorativi

positive_comment: La locazione e l’architettura della struttura sono favolose! Il posto è accogliente, pulito, rilassante. Si dorme magnificamente.  Buona la colazione e la cena con prodotti e piatti tipici
negative_comment: Ho sempre parlato molto bene della struttura ma quest’anno devo fare un paio di critiche: 1) durante la cena le bevande arrivano con troppo ritardo 2) non ho apprezzato il fatto che la tv non sia in grado di trasmettere un solo canale italiano

title: Bello, rilassante, ottime anche le attività‘ offerte
positive_comment: Bella struttura ben organizzata, cucina distinta, personale molto gentile e disponibile.
negative_comment: La tv non trasmette canali italiani.

positive_comment: L'architettura, l'area Vulkania, la colazione, la pulizia generale, la gentilezza del personale.
negative_comment: Niente

title: il TOP delle terme, originalissimo, pulitissimo ... i posti del cuore
positive_comment: Sempre il TOP delle terme. E' un posto fantastico, rilassante, rigenerante, pulitissimo, originalissimo ... insomma quando penso ad un posto alla terme non può essere che questo. E' la terza volta che ci vengo a distanza di 15 anni ed è sempre tenuto alla perfezione. Sicuramente non sarà l'ultima. Questa volta è stata una tappa in bici del Weinland Steiermark Radtour.
Apprezzabile la libera fruizione di tutti i servizi con un unico badge fornito al momento del check in. Ottima la vasca esterna per il.nuoto libero.

Tolle Lage, wunderschöne Aussichten, großes Saunabereich. Rezeptionistin war super nett!
Großes Zimmer mit schöner Aussicht. Frühstück super lecker.
negative_comment:
Das Restaurant am Abend war nichts besonderes. 
Eine Kleinigkeit: Die Lichtsteuerung im Zimmer könnte besser sein (es war nicht möglich nur die kleinen Lampen eingeschaltet zu lassen).

positive_comment: Great hotel! Clean, delicious breakfast, great spa, very friendly and professional staff who make you feel at home.
Everything was on site for a hugely relaxing stay, the rooms were spacious, it was quiet and the reception and breakfast staff were lovely. The pools were fab.
People from the reception were really helpful and gave me tips to find good places for hiking.

title: Spa destination in wonderful mountain scenery
positive_comment:
Ease of parking 
Large rooms with balconies 
Fabulous spa swim complex 
Excellent gym
negative_comment:
Dinner options a la carte were poor 
We had booked two rooms and ended up in separate buildings

title: Cool and rainy outside..Very nice and comfortable inside
positive_comment: Cleanliness of all locations. Everyone spoke English and they were courteous and professional. The food was much better than the previous time I stayed there and the waitresses were very helpful with making my selection by explaining how the food was prepared.
negative_comment:
The lounge chairs by the pool are far too low and both difficult and unsafe to get in and out. I am 81 years old but I observed many 65+ senior citizens who had difficulty also. One had assistance getting down and up/out. There were a few higher chairs but were all fully occupied. 
The room was very nice but the water from the shower flowed into the other floor and did not drain and a towel had to be used to absorb the water and allow me to stand and brush my teeth etc. 
Two pillows were almost flat and unusable as pillows. When checking out, I told the receptionist and she made a note in the computer for future reference and hopefully this will resolve the problem. Thanks

positive_comment:
Accueil très chaleureux 
Vue à 360 sur les montagnes

Coming back every year! Spa area, the hotel rooms and breakfast are just WOW
Location - cannot get better!
negative_comment:
A little more efforts could be put on cleanliness
The sauna area could be also more controlled in terms of noisy people and opening emergency doors for airing the area

title: An almost perfect weekend
positive_comment: An ideal location for a weekend getaway or vacation. Incredible mountain views, a spacious and comfortable room, and a truly excellent spa. The panoramic windows in the saunas are an additional significant advantage for me.
negative_comment: However, the prices in the restaurant do not match the quality of the dishes and service. But perhaps I was just disappointed with my dessert.

positive_comment: The wellness area is the highlight as well as location.
Very pleasant staff and amenities. Since. We were driving this was perfect as they have plenty of parking.
negative_comment: The food was wonderful

title: Lieu idéal pour se détendre (mais onéreux).
positive_comment:
Nous sommes enchantés de notre séjour à Bad Blumau. Ce lieu permet de se détendre totalement.
Le service est soigné tout au long du séjour : tout le personnel est très aimable; boisson offerte à l'arrivée et au départ; nourriture diversifiée et bien cuisinée au buffet; matériels prévus pour profiter des bassins (casiers, peignoirs, transats, parasols, etc).
Le cadre de verdure et les 11 bassins sont très apaisants. Les lieux sont suffisamment grands pour que nous ne soyons pas les uns sur les autres.
negative_comment: Dommage qu'en dehors du service de base (c'est à dire: baignade et transat classique): tout soit payant.

title: Une immersion cajolant corps et esprit dans une fantaisie de Hundertwasser
positive_comment: Un ensemble architectural exceptionnel jusqu’au moindre détail, un éventail de services impressionnant et une philosophie inédite de l’hôtellerie de bien-être, ciblant les cinq cens et l’esprit
negative_comment: Prix relativement élevés… mais bien compréhensibles en vue de la qualité

title: Volcanic thermal spa in magical place
positive_comment: The volcanic thermal springs are heaven! I arrived in Feb when the hotel area was covered with snow and it was a bliss to enjoy the thermal water and water jets surrounded by nature and with fire place adding the magical atmosphere. I really enjoyed organic food, huge variety and excellent service. The room was spacious and clean and the atmosphere in the spa area very relaxed. I recharged my batteries and planning the next trip soon!
negative_comment: Nothing - it was amazing.

title: Still a very good and relaxing hotel. If they could improve the quality of food, would be an even better place.
positive_comment: Thermal water, relaxing areas, the entire hotel's design, no kids
negative_comment: Dinner was very average. Mains are in low variety, desserts were tasteless and from retail store.

title: Hotel & Spa paradise perfect for recharging your batteries.
positive_comment: I keep coming back since 2012 due to the uniqueness of the architecture and the atmosphere. I love both the spa and the hotel.
negative_comment: The breakfast and dinner buffets had variety, but some dishes were bland or tasteless.

title: Great couple of days.
positive_comment: Lovely food at all mealtimes. Offer of transfer to bus. Comfortable room.
negative_comment: Nothing.

positive_comment: Nice thermal spa. Comfortable beds. Nice view from the room. Very good dinner buffet included.
negative_comment: I did not manage to find something to complain about.

positive_comment: Rooms are a bit outdated while the spa and food were amazing. The staff in the restaurant is marvelous.
negative_comment: Rooms seemed to be clean, especially bathroom but there was some garbage under the TV stand

positive_comment: The hotel has been renovated, so we got very nice and very clean room. My friends weren’t so lucky. The staff on breakfast and dinner were great. I liked the breakfast very much. The saunas were also great.
negative_comment: The front desk staff could be little more polite. The dinner needs improvement. Pretty expensive for the value they are offering.

title: Great short stay!
positive_comment: The location, garage parking, the hotel interior and spa everything was nice. The breakfast was great, i loved that you can order the eggs and other and they come fresh rather than from the buffet. But it could have a bit more options at the buffet.
negative_comment: I would prefer maybe a bit more dinner options or a la cart menu at least, and to be open longer than 20.30 (8.30pm)

title: Family atmosphere in a super relaxing environment
positive_comment: I really appreciated being able to have a fantastic breakfast available until 12 pm, after a relaxing morning swim and sauna. Convenient indoor free parking. Quiet and welcoming atmosphere, smiling staff, clean room with comfortable bed. Unexpected and most appreciated bottle of wine for my birthday! Outstanding indoor and outdoor hot pools with jacuzzi! Different kind of sauna and steam rooms available either with and without swimming suit (separate). Live music evenings in the bar (no noise in the room)
negative_comment: I would have liked a few more regional dishes such as Salzburger Nockerl, beerspatzle soup, goulash, Hasenöhrl, Kaiserschmarn, although the cook effort was super. Too short stay for tasting everything ;-)

title: Excellent spa retreat
positive_comment:
Excellent pool and spa facilities and great breakfast. 
Great location for hiking
negative_comment: Parts of the hotel are a bit dated. Dinners were a bit bland

title: Fantastic hotel in a beautiful location
positive_comment: What a beautiful place. The hotel room was beautifilul, facilities excellent and they were so accommodating with our dog, allowing us to bring her into the bar area to have our meals. The spa and pools were beautifully maintained and provided space to relax.
negative_comment: Everything was great, fantastic attention to detail and a really warm welcome from all the staff.

positive_comment: Very nice spa hotel! The food, service, rooms, and spa are perfect. The staff at the spa, including cosmetologist Anamaria and physiotherapist Christos, were professional and helped my son and me relax even more. The restaurant staff and the barkeeper were very friendly and had nice personalities. The food was of very good quality. I can recommend the hotel. We visited in August, and the weather was not too hot, which made it pleasant.

title: Erholsam
positive_comment: Sehr feiner Kurztrip, sowohl kulinarisch als auch den Wellnessbereich betreffend.

I now, that in Austria is not common the coffee machine in the room, but it would be a very good extra.

positive_comment: Literally everything was excellent.  Friendly and helpful staff, fine dining, thermal swimming pools, spacious and clean rooms.
negative_comment: Everything was excellent.

positive_comment: This is my fourth time at this hotel. I've been coming here since 2004. It's a pleasure to be here.
negative_comment: The price went high, but I understand why. The Euro is devalued at all!

title: Amazing place to relax
positive_comment: We highly recommend this 5 star hotel. Amazing facilities (3 swimming pools, saunas, massage), very good food (including complimentary afternoon cakes) and outstanding staff. We were really impressed by the way the owners are involving themselves in guests entertainment and enjoyment: singing Austrian songs, serving greeting cocktails and other details that make the difference.
Amazing and charming hotel, very beautiful, like from last century but very well taken care of

positive_comment: Always big choice of food, variety of dinner dishes
The food was outstanding, also the leisure facilities were excellent. The reception was also very obliging.
