title: A truly exceptional place for relaxation, where every detail is taken care of. From the comfort of the rooms to the spa
positive_comment: We returned to this hotel after 11 years and were impressed to see how much it has improved — modernized and updated, yet still keeping its unique atmosphere. The bed and bedding are exceptionally comfortable, the view from the room is stunning, and the spa area with thermal pools is outstanding. The sauna ritual is a true delight for both body and soul. Dinner was simply incredible — exquisite cuisine, flawless presentation, and top-level service in the restaurant. Breakfast was just as rich and delicious.
negative_comment: There was nothing to dislike — everything was perfect.

title: Relaxing Luxury with a Few Rough Edges
positive_comment:
The rooms are large, comfortable, and perfect for unwinding after a day of skiing or relaxing in the spa.
The wellness area is fantastic, with expansive indoor and outdoor thermal pools, numerous saunas, hammams, and a serene atmosphere. While massages are available, they are quite expensive - up to €75 for just 20 minutes.
Meal service was exceptional throughout our stay. The multi-course dinners paired with a generous buffet selection offered something for every taste. We looked forward to each evening meal.
The hotel ski shuttle is a huge plus - it will drop you off at any nearby ski slope and pick you up when you're done. This level of flexibility and comfort is rare and much appreciated.
The afternoon snack service, which includes fresh fruit and cakes, is a lovely and delicious touch - and it’s included in the price.
negative_comment: Unfortunately, our arrival was marred by a disappointing policy. We reached the hotel at noon and, despite rooms being available, were asked to pay a €165 fee to check in just two hours early. This felt quite unreasonable; especially as we departed at 8am on our last day and are regular guests. While it’s understandable that early check-ins at 8am should be discouraged, a more flexible approach for midday arrivals would go a long way in enhancing the guest experience. Waiting two hours in the car with a small child was not ideal.

title: Very good choice, gourmet hotel with a huge spa - especially for families
positive_comment: Very good location, big and good wellness area and pools. The staff and the food are amazing.
negative_comment: My bed was quite unconfortable (the mattress had a large indentation in the middle on my side). The hotel is very family friendly, but it meens, it’s a little bit loud and splashing - especially in the wellness area. The room soundproofing is not the best, I woke up every morning at 6:30 for rumbling and other noise. I now, that in Austria is not common the coffee machine in the room, but it would be a very good extra.

title: Excellent facility with excellent staff.

negative_comment: Everything was excellent.

Prima del covid chi arrivava  prima poteva comunque usufruire della spa e ugualmente, dopo aver liberato la stanza entro le 12, poteva tranquillamente usufruire della spa per il resto della giornata. Inoltre pur essendo in bassa stagione la zona spa era talmente affollata che non si poteva trovare un posto per rilassarsi appena usciti da una sauna. Una giornata alle terme Roemerbad - che sono una meraviglia - costa 60 euro.

title: Eine tolle Auszeit
positive_comment: Es war von Anfang bis Ende ein super toller Aufenthalt. Wir haben unseren Hochzeitstag und den 40er von meinem Mann gefeiert, in Ruhe - nur für uns. Das Essen, das Personal und die Therme sind einfach ein Traum! Wir kommen gerne wieder
negative_comment: Gibt eigentlich nichts zum aussetzen

positive_comment: Super Ausblick, Therme m.Meinung besser als die öffentliche daneben
negative_comment: Matratzen sehr desolat

title: Wie man sich ein 5 Sterne Hotel erwartet mit noch einigen Extras
positive_comment: Ein tolles 5 Sterne Hotel! Alles war erwartungsgemäß sauber & gepflegt. Ein ausgesprochen freundliches Personal! Im Restaurant wurden alle Wünsche erfüllt! Für unsere Kinder wurde extra gekocht. Das Ambiente war äußerst stimmungsvoll! Die Thermenlandschaft war sehr gepflegt und lud zum Erholen ein. Wir kommen gerne wieder!
negative_comment: Wir hatten ein Doppelzimmer im obersten Stock. Leider ist dort das Balkongeländer konstruktionsbedingt so hoch gemauert, dass die Aussicht eingeschränkt ist. Das Zimmer selbst war in Ordnung und gepflegt!

positive_comment:
Wir wurden freundlich begrüßt und stets bei allen Wünschen sehr herzlich unterstützt. 
Die Lage des Hotel und der Wellnessbereich waren herrlich zu genießen und immer blitzsauber.
Wir alle, groß- klein & Hund hatten ein paar sehr schöne Tage.

title: Toller Aufenthalt, wunderschönes Hotel, tolle Ausflüge möglich, außergewöhnlich schöne Poolanlage
positive_comment:
Poolanlage war außergewöhnlich, sehr schön, gepflegt, ein Traum!
Zimmer war sehr sauber, gute Größe. Ausreichend Parkplätze vorhanden. Sehr schön und gemütlich eingerichtetes Hotel, es gibt viele gemütliche und hochwertige Sitzgelegenheiten im gesamten Foyer und auf dem Weg zum Restaurant. 
Vor allem die Außen- und Innenpools waren großartig! Es gab genügend Liegen und die Pools wurden sehr wenig von anderen Gästen genützt, was uns sehr entgegenkam!
Es gab ausreichend Handtücher am Zimmer und die Mitarbeiter an der Rezeption waren sehr hilfreich und freundlich.
negative_comment:
Der Service war sehr freundlich. Ich hätte mir mehr Präsenz an unserem Tisch gewünscht, vor allem beim Frühstück, wo uns nicht klar war, dass niemand die Bestellung für die Eierspeisen abholt. Eine Erklärung wäre hilfreich gewesen. Es kam während des gesamten Frühstücks nie jemand an den Tisch, um zu fragen, ob alles in Ordnung ist oder die Bestellung fürs Abendessen aufzunehmen. Der Bestellzettel fürs Essen ist sicher effizient, aber den persönliche Kontakt würde ich bevorzugen, um auch beraten werden zu können. 
Das Essen war ausgezeichnet, mit kleinen Mankos (Erdäpfel und Risotto nicht durchgekocht, Tomaten bei der Vorspeise viel zu unreif, die vegetarische Variante war immer mit Pilzen, auch die Ersatzvorspeise, mir persönlich zu einseitig...)
Auch ohne Pause hat uns das Abendessen mit mehr als 90min oft zu lange gedauert. Ich hätte mir eine schnellere Abfolge der Gänge gewünscht.

title: A truly exceptional place for relaxation, where every detail is taken care of. From the comfort of the rooms to the spa
positive_comment: We returned to this hotel after 11 years and were impressed to see how much it has improved — modernized and updated, yet still keeping its unique atmosphere. The bed and bedding are exceptionally comfortable, the view from the room is stunning, and the spa area with thermal pools is outstanding. The sauna ritual is a true delight for both body and soul. Dinner was simply incredible — exquisite cuisine, flawless presentation, and top-level service in the restaurant. Breakfast was just as rich and delicious.
negative_comment: There was nothing to dislike — everything was perfect.

title: Relaxing Luxury with a Few Rough Edges
positive_comment:
The rooms are large, comfortable, and perfect for unwinding after a day of skiing or relaxing in the spa.
The wellness area is fantastic, with expansive indoor and outdoor thermal pools, numerous saunas, hammams, and a serene atmosphere. While massages are available, they are quite expensive - up to €75 for just 20 minutes.
Meal service was exceptional throughout our stay. The multi-course dinners paired with a generous buffet selection offered something for every taste. We looked forward to each evening meal.
The hotel ski shuttle is a huge plus - it will drop you off at any nearby ski slope and pick you up when you're done. This level of flexibility and comfort is rare and much appreciated.
The afternoon snack service, which includes fresh fruit and cakes, is a lovely and delicious touch - and it’s included in the price.
negative_comment: Unfortunately, our arrival was marred by a disappointing policy. We reached the hotel at noon and, despite rooms being available, were asked to pay a €165 fee to check in just two hours early. This felt quite unreasonable; especially as we departed at 8am on our last day and are regular guests. While it’s understandable that early check-ins at 8am should be discouraged, a more flexible approach for midday arrivals would go a long way in enhancing the guest experience. Waiting two hours in the car with a small child was not ideal.

title: Thermenwelt Pulverer Top!
positive_comment: Ci andiamo periodicamente da molti anni - struttura sempre splendida in un’atmosfera familiare austriaca. Le terme sono state arricchite con una piscina esterna di 25 metri e un laghetto artificiale di grande impatto.

title: Bella e riposante vacanza termale.
positive_comment: Ci è piaciuto tutto. Tre piscine molto belle (una interna comunicante con una esterna e la terza stupenda, perfetta per lunghe nuotate), un laghetto di acqua naturale, varie e articolati idromassaggi, saune, bagni turchi e un bel parco (unica pecca, nel parco non possono stare i cani). Camere grandi e ben arredate, tante sale comuni dove poter stare a leggete o giocare a carte, bella spa, cucina buona (anche se per noi un po' troppo gourmet...), posizione panoramica. Insomma, non ci annoia!
negative_comment: Praticamente nulla. Forse il fatto di non potere tenere il cane con noi nel parco.

positive_comment: La Junior Suite è molto spaziosa, accogliente, silenziosa, con ampio balcone e addirittura con il riscaldamento a pavimento, cosa molto piacevole. Molto gradito anche l'ampio parcheggio.
negative_comment: Adotterei materassi un po' più rigidi.

positive_comment: Let's start from the end, an amazing, amazing, amazing hotel. positive_comment: What a pleasant surprise. All in all … 9+ out or 10 💚soft this resort .

Our only regret was that we couldn't stay longer! After checkout, the hotel allows you to visit the common thermal baths all day long. Breakfast and dinner are very varied and delicious! We will definitely come back again!

title: Great Hotel
positive_comment: The location of the hotel is very convenient, as it is situated right in front of the bus stop for the resort. The rooms are quite spacious and were perfect for our family of four. While the breakfast was mostly cold, they did offer eggs—fried one day and scrambled the next. We also had dinner at the hotel restaurant, which was a good experience.
negative_comment: There isn’t much to do in the immediate vicinity of the hotel, though you can walk to the downtown area in about 15 minutes. Additionally—though this is not the hotel’s fault—the first bus to the resort doesn't leave until 9:00 AM, which is the same time the resort opens. Lastly, we found the beds to be a bit hard.

title: Amazing workers,  amazing hotel!
positive_comment: The hotel rooms are amazing - we stayed in the Room 28 - with the balcony.  Room is really comfortable, clean, with very big and comfortable bed. Receptionist  was kind and she managed to give us room with the balcony immediately upon are kind ask.   Cleaning ladies were also amazing - room each day was exceptionally clean and in order.  Overall hotel has professional staff, amazing breakfast and variety of food at the breakfast, beautiful swimming pool with sauna - and overall we had exceptional stay.  This is our third stay at the hotel.  We are highly recommending this hotel. If you come - you will have unforgettable stay.  For people who love shopping - hotel is only 5 minutes far from the biggest shopping center in Seiersberg.   Thank you!!  I am attaching photos of the beautiful garden which is as beautiful as each detail in this hotel.

positive_comment:
Great property. Perfect location with gorgeous views. Room was a little bit outdated. Great variety of activities offered (yoga etc.) Staff war very friendly and attentive. Breakfast was great with lots of variety. 5 course dinner was good but expected a little bit more. 

It was the perfect place to relax and unwind. The wellness area (saunas, pools) was very clean and offered plenty of opportunities to relax.

title: Excellent
positive_comment:
The hotel is beautifully located, away from the roads. Comfortable large room equipped with everything you need. We did not have a coffee machine and kettle in our room. We asked for it at reception desk and it was brought to us in 5 minutes. Lovely balcony with a marvellous view of the Burgenland hills and fields.
Breakfast and lunch exceeded all expectations! Huge selection of the best quality and natural products. Special thanks to the chefs! Excellent service. The dinners were absolutely delicious! The waiters are very attentive, served quickly and politely. Excellent huge territory with a variety of pools. All new, renovated. A lot of beds for rest. Excellent saunas with access to the pool area and sunbeds for outdoor relaxation.
We liked everything! We will definitely go back there again. We would highly recommend this hotel!
negative_comment: The only thing that wasn't quite comfortable was the pillows. They were too soft. Even though there are 3 pillows for each person, we had to ask for 2 more pillows.

title: Ich empfehle das Haus, doch beim nächsten Mal hole ich mir vorher ein Angebot ein und buche nicht  über Booking
positive_comment:
Sehr freundliches Personal. Ausgezeichnetes Abendessen. Zwei Menüs zur Wahl, die man auch verändern kann.
Neuer Saunabereich leider nur zwei Saunen. Das wird nicht wett gemacht durch Infrarotkabine und Dampfbad. Alles in allem ein sehr schönes Hotel etwas in die Jahre gekommen, Zimmer etwas Old Fashion. Perfekte Massageangebote.
Wunderbar war die Gastlichkeit . Es ist ein Fehler beim buchen passiert. Dieser wurde vom Haus sehr kulant, ausgeglichen da gebe ich eine zehn von zehn😊👍
negative_comment:
Saunabereich mit Ruhebereich zu klein, dadurch gleich überfüllt. Ebenso der Schwimmbereich zu klein.
Frühstücksangebot sehr lieblos . Die Wurst wird in Stapeln angeboten. Der warm und Kaltbereich nicht ansprechend. Eine Kaffeemaschine, d.h. Wartezeit, wenn einige zusammen frühstücken. Das beste ist die Frühstücksköchin, die lockert alles wieder auf.
Im Zimmer kann man Kaffee kochen und es gibt außer eigenes Quellwasser. Diese Leistung ist beim Frühstück auch inbegriffen. 
Ansonsten muss Tee, Kaffee und das Quellwasser, wenn man es zum Tisch bestellt, bezahlt werden .
Das passt nicht mehr in die Zeit, das gehört heute dazu.
Im Großen und Ganzen gab es an dem ganzen Aufenthalt nichts zu beanstanden, was wirklich gravierend gewesen wäre.

positive_comment: Frühstücksbuffet sehr umfangreich und für Jeden etwas dabei. Abendessen mit mehreren Gängen und köstlich. Wir hatten eines der "alten" Zimmer, waren damit aber auch sehr zufrieden.
negative_comment: Die Brotmesser am Buffet sollten getauscht werden. War keine Freude die tollen und köstlichen Brote zu schneiden.

title: Alles top gepflegt!
positive_comment:
Alles top! Frühstücksbuffet und Abendessen waren ausgezeichnet! Das Ambiente und der Wellnessbereich wunderschön!
Wir waren sehr zufrieden!

title: Sehr genossen, kommen sicher wieder zurück. Vielen dank an sehr freundliches und professionelles Team!!!
positive_comment:
Superfreundliches Personal, Abwechslungsreiches Saunabereich, atemberaubende Blicke ins Wald (direkt aus Sauna/Ruhebereichen), ins Tal(Restaurant), viel Grün. Neu renoviert, in Holz optic - sehr gemütlich. Sehr moderne und bequeme Zahlungs-/Schlüsselsystem - mit Uhr kann mann alles. 
Gutes Buffet, 
Vielfältige Angebot im Spa - Behandlungen auf hohem Niveau
negative_comment:
Verbesserungsvorschläge:

1. Schlapfen im Badetasche

2. Mehr Trinkmöglichkeiten in Saunabereich direkt

3. Die Auswahl der Hauptgerichte im À-la-carte-Menü teilweise sehr speziell war (z. B. Am gleichen Abend: Leber oder Fisch). Es wäre schön, wenn künftig auch etwas „allgemeiner beliebte“  Optionen angeboten würden. 
Sonst Essen war sehr gut

title: Erholung pur
positive_comment: Traumhaft schön!Immer wieder gerne.auch kulinarisch spitze!
negative_comment: Teppich zur Hoteltherme🤪

title: War nett für 2 Nächte.
positive_comment: Tolles Frühstück, tolles Abendessen. Die Hoteltherme war nett, jedoch nur sehr klein.
negative_comment: Hoteltherme hätte größer sein können. Fußreflexzonen Massage war sehr schwach. Keine Rede von Massage, eher nur Füße berühren.

positive_comment: Wasserangebote Top,Sauberkeit Top,Essen ausgezeichnet,Athmosphäre sehr angenehm,
negative_comment: Unser Zimmer war etwas zu klein, Badezimmer auch sejr klein.Es war jedoch sehr sauber ,das Zimmerpersonal sehr freundlich somit war alles in Ordnung.

title: Gutes Preis- Leistungsverhältnis. Insgesamt schön gelegene Anlage mit gutem Service.
positive_comment: Sowohl das Abendessen als auch das Frühstück waren regional gehalten. Top Service von Küche und Restaurant. Die Zimmer sind funktionell und ausreichend groß.
negative_comment: Die Lage der Zimmer "Wald" des Hotels bedingt dass man durch den Bereich der Seminarräume gehen muss. Das mutet bei Nutzung der Seminarräume durch Institutionen etwas seltsam an und liegt an der Anordnung der Gebäudeteile.

title: Alles Bestens, zum Empfehlen
positive_comment: Freundliches aufmerksames bestens geschultes Personal. Leckeres Essen
negative_comment:
Betten für meinen Begriff etwas zu hart.
Schade, dass es nicht ein paar Zimmer für Gäste mit Hund gibt

positive_comment: Meine Frau und ich haben hier eine Nacht mit 2 Tagen Aufenthalt verbracht. Das Frühstück und Abendessen war wirklich sehr gut. Wenn jemand nur 1 Nacht Zeit hat und 2 Tage genießen möchte ist hier genau richtig.

Wir waren von der Ankunft bis zur Abreise zu 100% zufrieden. 
Jederzeit wieder,  danke an das gesamte Team.

title: Una garanzia sul piano prezzo-qualita... spero di tornarci
positive_comment:
Non è a prima volta che ne sono ospite.
Mi piace la libertà di potersi muovere tutto il giorno tra saune, piscine, bagno turco e lettini indossando solo l'accappatoio.
Se ci fossero limitazioni (ad esempio di tempo come spesso accade in molte strutture in Italia) credo che non ci tornerei più: invece è una garanzia di puro relax, specialmente se si sceglie la zona riservata ai soli ospiti dell'albergo.
negative_comment:
Quest'anno il menu - inteso nelle portate principali del trattamento in mezza pensione non è stato all'altezza degli anni passati.
Ottimo invece sia il buffet dei "contorni" che quello delle colazioni: non manca proprio nulla e tutto di qualità elevata.
Adatto anche a bambini

title: DUE GIORNI DI RELAX IN UN ANNO IMPORTANTE 1965-2025
positive_comment: TUTTO QUANTO, UNA STRUTTURA ECCELLENTE. C'ERO GIA' STATO PRIMA DEL COVID 2/3 VOLTE E RITORNARE E' STATO BELLISSIMO. CI TORNERO' SICURAMENTE.
negative_comment: NULLA

title: Tutto bene!!
positive_comment: Belle camere, ottimo terrazzo, riscaldamento in stanza perfetto. Tutto perfetto come sempre. Poi la cena!!! Ma chi c’è in cucina? Un genio?? C’erano degli Spätzle agli spinaci che erano la fine del mondo , il pesce formidabile. Un gigantesco complimenti a tutta la cucina-pasticceria. Mangiare da voi é un esperienza, parola di Restaurantleiter.
negative_comment: La mattina , ordinare un cappuccino all haferl Milch diventa difficile. Magari il caffè si, quelle macchine così, non sono così buone.

positive_comment: Struttura molto pulita e organizzata , con grande attenzione all' ambiente e con arredamento molto gradevole. Piscine e strutture termali super !

title: Sempre un piacere ritornarci...
positive_comment:
Temperatura acque (siamo molto esigenti). Disponibilità di molteplici saune e bagni turchi, oltre alle svariate piscine per ogni gusto e genere.
Non ci sono limiti sul tempo in cui stare in relax e con orari molto ampi.
Asciugamani a continua rotazione, se necessario (senza sprecare, ma se hai fatto 3 saune è bello poterlo cambiare con uno asciutto e pulito).
Premesso che ormai abbiamo superato i 10 anni di visite... e meritabsempre ritornare: in Italia non ho ancora trovato qualcosa di simile a questi prezzi (mai "regalati").
negative_comment: Hanno rifatto una parte della zona riservata ai clienti hotel, in modo piacevole e molto comodo; purtroppo hanno eliminato una stanza che amavo (musica rilassante ed immagini-video random di natura). Hanno anche rifatto completamente il bagno turco in quest'area, ma sbagliando "di brutto": piccolo, senza profumi e senza quella fontanella al centro che era funzionale x rinfrescarsi alla bisogna...

positive_comment: Great owners, breath taking view, the room was very clean and the bed was very comfortable

title: Amazing stay for a weekend
positive_comment: We really enjoyed all the facilities in the hotel, as well delicious cuisine and extremely friendly and helpful staff. Selection at the bar was great with local wines and beers available. Spacious areas to relax near pools with both free and paid options
negative_comment: Everything was great, so there is nothing to point as "bad". The only inconvenient thing was bad Google Maps navigation, so it was difficult to find the right entrance to the hotel when we arrived in the evening. Maybe an electric sign would be good for the first time visitors arriving on their own.

title: Good spa holiday but I would have expected a little more
positive_comment: A hotel connected to the spa site and combined with many thermal pools and dry and wet sauna areas. There is no doubt that the spa and pool complexes are the hotel's standout feature. Sometimes it is difficult to find a place to sit around the pools. Breakfast is very good and rich. .
negative_comment: From 10 pm there is no service at the front desk. There is no coffee maker in the room. Very small and thin shower towels. Soap and shampoo are combined and there is no conditioner. At dinner the salads and side dishes are repetitive. Small main course.

title: Hotel with an amazing spa
positive_comment: Hotel with an amazing spa, excellent rooms, friendly and helpful staff, excellent breakfast and dinner.

title: Good relaxing long weekend in a well maintained wellness hotel
positive_comment: Wellness facilities, sauna rituals, comfy room, breakfast and dinner. Refurbished wellness area.
negative_comment: Towels in the room could have been softer. They looked like they had past their sell by date. Charging for parking in the parking deck.

title: Amazing place to relax
positive_comment: Truly exceptional experience! Food, property and staff were amazing!

title: amazing spa hotel
positive_comment: Let's start from the end, an amazing, amazing, amazing hotel. The reception staff, maids and kitchen staff are courteous, smiling and professional, the hotel is clean and decorated in an amazing way, the rooms are new and clean, the bed is very comfortable, and the shower is excellent, free parking, the breakfast is excellent and the dinner is amazing, the food is varied and delicious, the spa in the hotel is beyond expectations, spacious, clean and quiet, the hot pools and jacuzzi are great, if it were possible to give this hotel 6 stars, that's what it would get

title: A well balanced spa resort
positive_comment: What a pleasant surprise. Staff is super kind and helpful, the food (considering it’s a huge place) is superb and always presented with great pride, the hotel spa and the big open spa offer everything one could want, the rooms are furnished with lots of thought plus are spotless and the hotel must have done renovations recently as almost all common areas look stylish and cared for. All in all … 9+ out or 10 💚soft this resort .

Our only regret was that we couldn't stay longer! After checkout, the hotel allows you to visit the common thermal baths all day long. Breakfast and dinner are very varied and delicious! We will definitely come back again!

title: Wohlfühl Oase, wenn man Auszeit braucht oder nach der Messe wieder Kraft schöpfen möchte bzw sich regenerieren möchte

positive_comment: Spa area, location, top service, supreme breakfast, adults only. Especially the bistro is top. Thanks to Lenka because of her professional service & friendliness.

title: Superb. I’ll be back
positive_comment: It was exceptional. The facilities are as good as I’ve seen anywhere
negative_comment: Nothing. It really was excellent

positive_comment:
Great property. Perfect location with gorgeous views. Room was a little bit outdated. Great variety of activities offered (yoga etc.) Staff war very friendly and attentive. Breakfast was great with lots of variety. 5 course dinner was good but expected a little bit more. 

It was the perfect place to relax and unwind. The wellness area (saunas, pools) was very clean and offered plenty of opportunities to relax.

title: Excellent
positive_comment:
The hotel is beautifully located, away from the roads. Comfortable large room equipped with everything you need. We did not have a coffee machine and kettle in our room. We asked for it at reception desk and it was brought to us in 5 minutes. Lovely balcony with a marvellous view of the Burgenland hills and fields.
Breakfast and lunch exceeded all expectations! Huge selection of the best quality and natural products. Special thanks to the chefs! Excellent service. The dinners were absolutely delicious! The waiters are very attentive, served quickly and politely. Excellent huge territory with a variety of pools. All new, renovated. A lot of beds for rest. Excellent saunas with access to the pool area and sunbeds for outdoor relaxation.
We liked everything! We will definitely go back there again. We would highly recommend this hotel!
negative_comment: The only thing that wasn't quite comfortable was the pillows. They were too soft. Even though there are 3 pillows for each person, we had to ask for 2 more pillows.

Very happy with the location and immense views!

title: Ein 5Sterne Hotel mit echtem herrlichen Bergblick und Verwöhnen auf höchsten Niveau
positive_comment: Schon der Empfang im Hotel Bergblick war sehr freundlich... man fühlte sich sofort wohl! Gepäck wurde gleich auf das,Zimmer gebracht, wir konnten schon nit der erweiterten Halbpension starten... Das,Essen war wirklich exquisit, jeden Tag konnte man verschiedene Gerichte auswählen; vor allem das Galamenue war wirklich hervorragend! Auch die Zimmer waren sehr modern und ansprechend ausgestattet, in jedem Zimmer hat man den "Bergblick". Wir haben uns seeehr wohl gefühlt! Nicht zu vergessen der inzwischen wieder erweiterte Spabereich... 3 verschiedene Saunen, Dampfbad, Infrarot, Eisbad, Salzgrotte und wunderbare Ruheräume... keine Wünsche blieben offen! Auch die Behandlungen von Mara und Ludwig waren außergewöhnlich! Alles in allem ein Haus, das den 5 Sternen zurecht entspricht! Danke für diese tollen Tage!
negative_comment: Im Service waren fast ausschließlich Bedienungen aus dem Ausland, die immer sehr freundlich waren!. Manchmal kam es zu längeren Wartezeiten... aber das gibt es ja überall! Ehrlich gesagt,  ist dies kein wirklicher Makel... Das Personal war wirklich immer ausgesprochen nett und freundlich!

positive_comment: Alles hat uns gefallen. Die Angestellten sowie der Chef alle super freundlich und zuvorkommend. Und die Küche ist hervorragend. Es gibt nichts aber auch gar nichts zu beanstanden. In diesem Haus wird vieles richtig gemacht . Wir empfehlen zu 100 Prozent weiter
negative_comment: Wir waren leider nur eine Nacht aber wir kommen wieder

negative_comment: Everything was great, so there is nothing to point as "bad". The only inconvenient thing was bad Google Maps navigation, so it was difficult to find the right entrance to the hotel when we arrived in the evening. Maybe an electric sign would be good for the first time visitors arriving on their own.

title: Good spa holiday but I would have expected a little more
positive_comment: A hotel connected to the spa site and combined with many thermal pools and dry and wet sauna areas. There is no doubt that the spa and pool complexes are the hotel's standout feature. Sometimes it is difficult to find a place to sit around the pools. Breakfast is very good and rich. .
negative_comment: From 10 pm there is no service at the front desk. There is no coffee maker in the room. Very small and thin shower towels. Soap and shampoo are combined and there is no conditioner. At dinner the salads and side dishes are repetitive. Small main course.

title: Hotel with an amazing spa
positive_comment: Hotel with an amazing spa, excellent rooms, friendly and helpful staff, excellent breakfast and dinner.

title: Good relaxing long weekend in a well maintained wellness hotel
positive_comment: Wellness facilities, sauna rituals, comfy room, breakfast and dinner. Refurbished wellness area.
negative_comment: Towels in the room could have been softer. They looked like they had past their sell by date. Charging for parking in the parking deck.

title: Amazing place to relax
positive_comment: Truly exceptional experience! Food, property and staff were amazing!

title: amazing spa hotel
positive_comment: Let's start from the end, an amazing, amazing, amazing hotel. The reception staff, maids and kitchen staff are courteous, smiling and professional, the hotel is clean and decorated in an amazing way, the rooms are new and clean, the bed is very comfortable, and the shower is excellent, free parking, the breakfast is excellent and the dinner is amazing, the food is varied and delicious, the spa in the hotel is beyond expectations, spacious, clean and quiet, the hot pools and jacuzzi are great, if it were possible to give this hotel 6 stars, that's what it would get

title: A well balanced spa resort
positive_comment: What a pleasant surprise. Staff is super kind and helpful, the food (considering it’s a huge place) is superb and always presented with great pride, the hotel spa and the big open spa offer everything one could want, the rooms are furnished with lots of thought plus are spotless and the hotel must have done renovations recently as almost all common areas look stylish and cared for. All in all … 9+ out or 10 💚soft this resort .

Our only regret was that we couldn't stay longer! After checkout, the hotel allows you to visit the common thermal baths all day long. Breakfast and dinner are very varied and delicious! We will definitely come back again!

title: Very nice hotel
positive_comment: The hotel is quite big, lots of options of saunas and pools, indoor and outdoor. The "hotel spa" is quieter and prettier, the other side (where I guess people can also buy a day pass) is busier but still really nice. Everything is clean and organised. I would recommend!
negative_comment: As vegetarians, we just thought they could offer a bit more for those who don't eat meat. Specially at dinner.

title: Excellent stay, complete relaxation!
positive_comment: The food was really great, all areas were very clean and the staff were helpful and nice. We particularly liked the fact that the hotel has its own thermal baths and sauna (separate from the main one), only for the hotel guests. Nice garden and scenery around. We will definitely come back again!
negative_comment: We did not like that it was allowed to smoke at the poolbar (main Therme). Did not fit at all with the health concept, and we were bothered by all the smokers gathering there.

title: Superb. I’ll be back
positive_comment: It was exceptional. The facilities are as good as I’ve seen anywhere
negative_comment: Nothing. It really was excellent

positive_comment:
Great property. Perfect location with gorgeous views. Room was a little bit outdated. Great variety of activities offered (yoga etc.) Staff war very friendly and attentive. Breakfast was great with lots of variety. 5 course dinner was good but expected a little bit more. 

It was the perfect place to relax and unwind. The wellness area (saunas, pools) was very clean and offered plenty of opportunities to relax.

title: Excellent
positive_comment:
The hotel is beautifully located, away from the roads. Comfortable large room equipped with everything you need. We did not have a coffee machine and kettle in our room. We asked for it at reception desk and it was brought to us in 5 minutes. Lovely balcony with a marvellous view of the Burgenland hills and fields.
Breakfast and lunch exceeded all expectations! Huge selection of the best quality and natural products. Special thanks to the chefs! Excellent service. The dinners were absolutely delicious! The waiters are very attentive, served quickly and politely. Excellent huge territory with a variety of pools. All new, renovated. A lot of beds for rest. Excellent saunas with access to the pool area and sunbeds for outdoor relaxation.
We liked everything! We will definitely go back there again. We would highly recommend this hotel!
negative_comment: The only thing that wasn't quite comfortable was the pillows. They were too soft. Even though there are 3 pillows for each person, we had to ask for 2 more pillows.

title: Supreme
positive_comment: Man kommt an und fühlt sich wohl. Unglaublich freundliches Personal, Top-Zimmer, hervorragendes, überaus reichliches Buffet und eine tolle Wellness-Landschaft.

title: Sehr entspannter Aufenthalt.
positive_comment: Ausgezeichnetes Essen. Sehr freundliches Personal. Schöne Lage der Anlage.
negative_comment: Der Lobby-Bereich ist mittlerweile etwas in die Jahre gekommen.

title: Ein perfekter Aufenthalt
positive_comment: Exzellente Küche  und ein außerordentlich nettes Personal. Der Pianist Julius war der Highlight des Abends. Die  Kellner Peter und  Abel waren sehr zuvorkommend. Das gesamte Team war absolut perfekt.

title: Ein Traumhotel, wir werden sicher wieder kommen
positive_comment: Aussergewöhnlich schönes Hotel, Lokation und Angebote, Service Overall
negative_comment: Es bedurfte bei Ankunft klarer Formulierung der Wellness-Buchungs-Wünsche, aber es wurde sehr zuvorkommend und schnell am Folgetag reagiert.

title: Skvělé
positive_comment: Vše bylo perfektní, od velmi milé blondýnky v recepci při příjezdu až po posezení v baru. Wellness je špička! Náš pokoj byl vkusný a vždy dokonale čistý. Snídaně - vše čerstvé a v nejvyšší kvalitě. Ideální je koncept oddělení "dětského hotelu" od samostatného adults only hotelu. Areál je veliký a všude lze najít něco zajímavého - romantická zákoutí, sportoviště, zvířata.
negative_comment: Divný zápach na chodbě. Příště bychom volili jinou kategorii pokoje s lepším výhledem.

title: Wir kommen gern wieder und empfehlen das Reiters gern weiter.
positive_comment: Frühstück Mega, Spa sehr schön, Service hervorragend, Spa ist ein Erlebnis und Abendessen muss man erleben, einfach sehr sehr gut.
negative_comment: Alles Prima

positive_comment: really clean, good food, good value, good enviorement
negative_comment: never seen a smile from the staff, overall they were polite and helpful, but felt no hospitality, and once I heard a conversation with an another customer and they were so rude toward her, I felt secondhand embarrassment. I know its not 5* but these little things can really spoil the experience.

title: Pleasant stay for one night
positive_comment: Located very close to the transit road leading towards ski resorts in Alpes. Comfortable, spacious area near the reception for having a beer or meeting with friends. Clean rooms with multiple beds to fit larger families.
negative_comment: There was no restaurant service onsite - only bar + microwave pizza (you could always go by car to a town nearby). Bowling alley was almost antique - rather for small kids to simply have some fun (even the balls were half the normal size & weight).

title: Amazing hotel
positive_comment:
Wonderful location.

Top quality.

Everything was perfect.

- Breakfast was excellent
- Room was clean and spacious

title: The best staff, the best value, excellent saunas and beautiful location. Worth experiencing!
positive_comment: Firstly, the service of the staff (especially Wolfgang) was the most welcoming and professional we have experienced our whole trip in Europe. Selena was excellent upon checkin, the facilities were fantastic and the value for money impressed us greatly. We loved the saunas and the surprise of the conservation and animal rescue facility next door was a bonus! We also were surprised with the variety of the included breakfast wow! Thanks for such a good stop over and we wish we could have stayed longer!

positive_comment: Well looked-after and clean. Great breakfast, helpful staff
negative_comment: Nothing

negative_comment: Everything was perfect.

title: Great relaxed stay with amazing food.
positive_comment: Great place for relaxation in nature - the spa pools are quite small, but quiet with plenty of space around them to relax in; the sauna area is large with lots of different types of sauna. The real stand out bit for me was the food - amazing breakfast with a huge selection and excellent high quality food in the evening - even though a lot of it was self service the food was exceptionally well presented and fresh and tasted amazing. Superb value for money.
negative_comment: I was a bit surprised that the staff at reception had very little knowledge of the local area - I asked for a route for a morning run and they couldn't really advise; the same for a local walk. They just tried to sell us a little brochure with walks in the area many of which required a car - we went to tourist information in the village (1km away) and got a free map with many local walks. So I was a bit surprised. I'd have thought that I'd not be the first person wanting to go for a morning run ...

title: The experience was excelent down to every detail.
positive_comment: The spa facilities were outstanding, with the heated pool, saunas, and an amazing view making the experience remarkable. The breakfast was also delicious, and so was the dinner. We also really like the room and the view.

title: Relaxing is the goal
positive_comment: This is our second time at the establishment, and we have no regrets. We really enjoyed all the services offered by the hotel. And as this is our trip to relax, booking with breakfast and dinner included means we don't have to worry about a thing. The variety and quality of the food, both for breakfast and dinner, is definitely one of the reasons we come back. And a great extra is that the bathroom floor is heated.
negative_comment:
Our trip took place during our birthdays, but one of the birthdays was on the day we checked out.
While the birthday person, who had been at the hotel all day, received a hand-written card, balloons, a special arrangement in the room and a cake at dinner, the other birthday person on the day of check-out received nothing. We understand the difference, but at least a personalised card at check-out would have been nice.

title: I plan to go again for more relaxing days.
positive_comment: The staff were outstanding and always helpful, the atmosphere was truly relaxing, and breakfast and dinners very varied, tasty and filling.
negative_comment: Did not get my TV to work but also did not ask - was not there for that.

title: Vale la pena
positive_comment: Una piccola perla, hotel all'interno di un parco naturale ideale per famiglie con bambini. Dispone di un parco giochi notevole, con scivolo maxi e altri giochi. Accanto l hotel scorre un ruscello con cascatelle da cui è stata ricavata una vasca Knaip. L'hotel offre un servizio di cena a buffet, 18 euro ad adulto 12 a bambino ma non ne abbiamo usufruito preferendo un giro nel paese vicino.

title: Un séjour relaxant, un endroit idyllique et un accueil performant pour votre compagnon à 4 pattes
positive_comment: Cet hôtel est un paradis pour les animaux de compagnie. Notre Weimaraner a beaucoup apprécié toutes les attentions qui lui étaient dédiées. Les repas sont excellents et suffisamment variés pour que chacun puisse trouver de quoi satisfaire son appétit. La chambre est spacieuse et bien ordonnée. Le spa permet de se relaxer et les services proposés performants à un prix correct.
negative_comment: Ne changez rien, on approche de la perfection. Les prix des encas du bar sont un peu élevés.

title: Amazing hotel
positive_comment:
Wonderful location.
Very clean, spacious, relaxing spa area.
Top quality.
Wide selection of tasty food at breakfast.
Most helpful personnel.
Everything was perfect.

title: Excellent resort
positive_comment:
Excellent service, everything was of highest standard.
Amazing heated outside pools.
Delicious meals.
Smiling, helpful staff.
negative_comment: Everything was perfect.

title: Great relaxed stay with amazing food.
positive_comment: Great place for relaxation in nature - the spa pools are quite small, but quiet with plenty of space around them to relax in; the sauna area is large with lots of different types of sauna. The real stand out bit for me was the food - amazing breakfast with a huge selection and excellent high quality food in the evening - even though a lot of it was self service the food was exceptionally well presented and fresh and tasted amazing. Superb value for money.
negative_comment: I was a bit surprised that the staff at reception had very little knowledge of the local area - I asked for a route for a morning run and they couldn't really advise; the same for a local walk. They just tried to sell us a little brochure with walks in the area many of which required a car - we went to tourist information in the village (1km away) and got a free map with many local walks. So I was a bit surprised. I'd have thought that I'd not be the first person wanting to go for a morning run ...

title: The experience was excelent down to every detail.
positive_comment: The spa facilities were outstanding, with the heated pool, saunas, and an amazing view making the experience remarkable. The breakfast was also delicious, and so was the dinner. We also really like the room and the view.

title: Relaxing is the goal
positive_comment: This is our second time at the establishment, and we have no regrets. We really enjoyed all the services offered by the hotel. And as this is our trip to relax, booking with breakfast and dinner included means we don't have to worry about a thing. The variety and quality of the food, both for breakfast and dinner, is definitely one of the reasons we come back. And a great extra is that the bathroom floor is heated.
negative_comment:
Our trip took place during our birthdays, but one of the birthdays was on the day we checked out.
While the birthday person, who had been at the hotel all day, received a hand-written card, balloons, a special arrangement in the room and a cake at dinner, the other birthday person on the day of check-out received nothing. We understand the difference, but at least a personalised card at check-out would have been nice.

title: I plan to go again for more relaxing days.
positive_comment: The staff were outstanding and always helpful, the atmosphere was truly relaxing, and breakfast and dinners very varied, tasty and filling.
negative_comment: Did not get my TV to work but also did not ask - was not there for that.

title: Perfect value for money. We are regular guests staying at this Juffa hotel for WE skiing at Weineben
positive_comment: The nature around, billiard, nice breakfast, kind staff let us to play billiard a bit after their official hours. Excellent espresso coffee for breakfast, plenty of fruit and vegetables. Wellness is well equipped with different saunas, open area, tea and snacks, very clean. Parking lots always available.
negative_comment: The other users of sauna did not behave well: talking loudly, overheating and cooling the finnish sauna without considering preferences of other users, water was all over the floors after they've used showers, etc. My suggestion is that staff should from time to time come and check the wellness area. Unfortunately the written rules of usage are not enough.

positive_comment: The stuff was friendly, responded quickly and communicated professionally. I was arriving late and they gladly left the key for the room in a special locker at the entrance. The stuff was already there at 6:40, they prefilled the registration form, which allowed quick and early check out. The breakfast was a solid buffet and was already there at 7:00 as promised.
Great stay, big territory, nice staff and great breakfast
Nice terrace. Viuld have more tables there. Open restaurant in the evening. Great Hugo drink. Good breakfast.
negative_comment: American pancakes dough should be improved.

title: Great place for families
positive_comment:
Room was cosy and nice. The hotel is very clean. There are many activities for the kids, playground, bowling etc. Breakfast had many options and dinner was good. Staff is great, unfortunately don't know her name but the lady on the reception was amaizing to us. We liked it and will coke back. 

The only negative would be that it was too hot in the room at night, had to open windows to let some fresh air in..
The hotel offers a variety of sports and relaxing entertainment for children and adults. The food is varied and delicious.
It provided additional content for kids, familly and group of friends

title: Tolles Jufa
positive_comment: Das Personal war außerordentlich freundlich und hilfsbereit. Zimmer war schön und wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt. Wir kommen gerne wieder.
negative_comment: Das Frühstück war sehr ausreichend und gut aber die Semmeln waren an beiden Tage nicht frisch.

positive_comment:
Lokalizacja - bardzo blisko (2-3 min) do wyciągu talerzykowego, którym podciągamy się i zjazd do kanapy. Jesli jest śnieg można na nartach podjechać pod budynek.
Posiłki smaczne.
Przytulna jadalnia.
negative_comment:
Niby jest bilard i rzutki. Ale wszystkie strzałki były połamane. 
Brakowało jednej kuli do bilarda.
Ping-pong jest na zewnątrz.

title: Fajny hotel przy stoku dla dobrze jeżdżących narciarzy.
positive_comment: Czyściutki i cieplutki hotel. Obsługa miła i uśmiechnięta. Pokoje nie za duże /przynajmniej ten trzyosobowy, który zajmowaliśmy/, ale jest wszystko co potrzeba. Wystrój raczej surowy niż przytulny. Posiłki w formie bufetu. Na śniadanie zawsze ten sam zestaw, ale na tyle szeroki, że każdy dla siebie coś znajdzie. Obiadokolacja różnorodna i smaczna. Napoje do obiadokolacji dodatkowo płatne. Bardzo bliziutko wyciągu - talerzyk, którym goście JUFY za darmo mogą dotrzeć pod dolną stację kolejki krzesełkowej.
negative_comment:
Nie doczytałam, że na hotel składa się z kilku budynków, w których usytuowane są pokoje, stołówka i sauna to kolejne, niepołączone ze sobą budynki. Tak, że trzeba przechodzić dworem.
Trasy narciarskie raczej dla zaawansowanych. Niebieskie trasy strome i bardzo wąskie. Dla początkujących i niezaawansowanych pozostaje szkółka dla dzieci w dolinie bez widoków :(

title: Amazing hotel

Very clean, spacious, relaxing spa area.
Top quality.
Wide selection of tasty food at breakfast.
Most helpful personnel.
Everything was perfect.

title: Excellent resort
positive_comment:
Excellent service, everything was of highest standard.
Amazing heated outside pools.
Delicious meals.
Smiling, helpful staff.
negative_comment: Everything was perfect.

title: Great relaxed stay with amazing food.
positive_comment: Great place for relaxation in nature - the spa pools are quite small, but quiet with plenty of space around them to relax in; the sauna area is large with lots of different types of sauna. The real stand out bit for me was the food - amazing breakfast with a huge selection and excellent high quality food in the evening - even though a lot of it was self service the food was exceptionally well presented and fresh and tasted amazing. Superb value for money.
negative_comment: I was a bit surprised that the staff at reception had very little knowledge of the local area - I asked for a route for a morning run and they couldn't really advise; the same for a local walk. They just tried to sell us a little brochure with walks in the area many of which required a car - we went to tourist information in the village (1km away) and got a free map with many local walks. So I was a bit surprised. I'd have thought that I'd not be the first person wanting to go for a morning run ...

title: The experience was excelent down to every detail.
positive_comment: The spa facilities were outstanding, with the heated pool, saunas, and an amazing view making the experience remarkable. The breakfast was also delicious, and so was the dinner. We also really like the room and the view.

title: Relaxing is the goal
positive_comment: This is our second time at the establishment, and we have no regrets. We really enjoyed all the services offered by the hotel. And as this is our trip to relax, booking with breakfast and dinner included means we don't have to worry about a thing. The variety and quality of the food, both for breakfast and dinner, is definitely one of the reasons we come back. And a great extra is that the bathroom floor is heated.
negative_comment:
Our trip took place during our birthdays, but one of the birthdays was on the day we checked out.
While the birthday person, who had been at the hotel all day, received a hand-written card, balloons, a special arrangement in the room and a cake at dinner, the other birthday person on the day of check-out received nothing. We understand the difference, but at least a personalised card at check-out would have been nice.

title: I plan to go again for more relaxing days.
positive_comment: The staff were outstanding and always helpful, the atmosphere was truly relaxing, and breakfast and dinners very varied, tasty and filling.
negative_comment: Did not get my TV to work but also did not ask - was not there for that.

title: A truly wonderful stay at the castle <3
positive_comment:
The stunning castle, picturesque surroundings, excellent accommodations, and incredible historical ambience provide a truly remarkable experience. I extend my highest recommendation <3 

IMPORTANT CLARIFICATION – THIS IS NOT A DEFECT

I wish to inform anyone that air conditioning is not a standard feature in every room in the castle. 
In the main castle structure, air conditioning is exclusively available in the LOFT room (the other rooms in the castle are without air conditioning). 
Nevertheless, a separate building located immediately adjacent to the castle offers air conditioning in all its rooms.

title: Gorgeous castle, beautiful rooms, amazing service
positive_comment: Amazingly beautiful castle build late 19th century. Each room is different. I stayed in the tower room where you have to climb steep stairs. My friend's room had a private chapel inside the room!! The service was so fantastic.

title: A special unique place to stay, highly recommend a stay in this lovely castle.

negative_comment: Nothing not to like.

positive_comment: Great experience in a castle! Beautiful view and kind staff! Had all rooms equipped with air conditioners, it would be perfect for a summer vacation!

title: Fajny hotel przy stoku dla dobrze jeżdżących narciarzy.
positive_comment: Czyściutki i cieplutki hotel. Obsługa miła i uśmiechnięta. Pokoje nie za duże /przynajmniej ten trzyosobowy, który zajmowaliśmy/, ale jest wszystko co potrzeba. Wystrój raczej surowy niż przytulny. Posiłki w formie bufetu. Na śniadanie zawsze ten sam zestaw, ale na tyle szeroki, że każdy dla siebie coś znajdzie. Obiadokolacja różnorodna i smaczna. Napoje do obiadokolacji dodatkowo płatne. Bardzo bliziutko wyciągu - talerzyk, którym goście JUFY za darmo mogą dotrzeć pod dolną stację kolejki krzesełkowej.
negative_comment:
Nie doczytałam, że na hotel składa się z kilku budynków, w których usytuowane są pokoje, stołówka i sauna to kolejne, niepołączone ze sobą budynki. Tak, że trzeba przechodzić dworem.
Trasy narciarskie raczej dla zaawansowanych. Niebieskie trasy strome i bardzo wąskie. Dla początkujących i niezaawansowanych pozostaje szkółka dla dzieci w dolinie bez widoków :(

title: Volle Punktzahl
positive_comment:
Ein wahres Juwel in den Bergen Österreichs !

Das Hotel liegt zwar etwas abgelegen, aber die atemberaubende Aussicht, die Nähe zu dem umliegenden Skipisten und die umliegende Natur macht es mehr als zu einem unvergesslichen Urlaub.
Die Zimmer und das Hotel sind sehr sauber, das Essen ist hervorragend und das Frühstück ist ausreichend und vielseitig.

Das Personal ist sehr nett und zuvorkommend, man fühlt sich sofort wohl. 

Das Hotel ist ideal für Wanderer, Skifahrer und alle, die Ruhe und Erholung suchen.

Wir kommen gerne wieder!

Das Zimmer war sehr sauber, die Matratzen bequem, wir haben sehr gut geschlafen.
Das Frühstücksbuffet hat absolut keine Wünsche offengelassen. 
Die Umgebung war super um mit dem Hund spazieren zu gehen. Wir werden auf jeden Fall wiederkommen. Insgesamt ein super Hotel, sehr hundefreundlich und sehr nette Gastgeber!

title: Fajny hotel przy stoku dla dobrze jeżdżących narciarzy.
positive_comment: Czyściutki i cieplutki hotel. Obsługa miła i uśmiechnięta. Pokoje nie za duże /przynajmniej ten trzyosobowy, który zajmowaliśmy/, ale jest wszystko co potrzeba. Wystrój raczej surowy niż przytulny. Posiłki w formie bufetu. Na śniadanie zawsze ten sam zestaw, ale na tyle szeroki, że każdy dla siebie coś znajdzie. Obiadokolacja różnorodna i smaczna. Napoje do obiadokolacji dodatkowo płatne. Bardzo bliziutko wyciągu - talerzyk, którym goście JUFY za darmo mogą dotrzeć pod dolną stację kolejki krzesełkowej.
negative_comment:
Nie doczytałam, że na hotel składa się z kilku budynków, w których usytuowane są pokoje, stołówka i sauna to kolejne, niepołączone ze sobą budynki. Tak, że trzeba przechodzić dworem.
Trasy narciarskie raczej dla zaawansowanych. Niebieskie trasy strome i bardzo wąskie. Dla początkujących i niezaawansowanych pozostaje szkółka dla dzieci w dolinie bez widoków :(

positive_comment: Dieses Hotel liegt großartig in völliger Ruhe oberhalb von Ellmau mit wunderbarem Blick auf den wilden Kaiser. Sehr persönliche Atmosphäre. High-end Wellnessbereich mit sehr vielseitigen, hochprofessionellen und wirkungsvollen Treatments bis hin zur authentischen Ayurveda Behandlung. Das hat ebenso 10 Punkte verdient wie auch der Roof-Top-Pool, den ich für mich als best ever tituliert habe. Dieses Haus hat für mich das Zeug, zum Stammhaus zu werden.
negative_comment: Eigentlich wäre eine glatte 10,0 möglich. Dazu haben für mich aber zwei Dinge gefehlt: einerseits war mein Zimmer und auch Teile der Speiseräume sehr barock-antiquiert eingerichtet. Hier braucht es dringend ein Refresh im moderneren Design. Und: der Restaurant-Service war nicht sehr aufmerksam. Und so war es auch nicht nach zwei Tagen klar, dass ich keine Milchprodukte vertragen kann. Die Küche war dabei überraschend unflexibel und nicht in der Lage, Alternativen anzubieten. So hatte ich dich immer und immer wieder Sahneprodukte auf dem Teller. Leider gab es beim Frühstück auch gar kein veganes Angebot, was mir bei der Unverträglichkeit gut geholfen hätte und ausserdem auch durchaus gefragt ist. Für ein Haus dieser Kategorie braucht es auch da etwas mehr Modernität. Alles in allem deshalb schon auch sehr teuer.

title: A truly wonderful stay at the castle <3
positive_comment:
The stunning castle, picturesque surroundings, excellent accommodations, and incredible historical ambience provide a truly remarkable experience. I extend my highest recommendation <3 

IMPORTANT CLARIFICATION – THIS IS NOT A DEFECT

I wish to inform anyone that air conditioning is not a standard feature in every room in the castle. 
In the main castle structure, air conditioning is exclusively available in the LOFT room (the other rooms in the castle are without air conditioning). 
Nevertheless, a separate building located immediately adjacent to the castle offers air conditioning in all its rooms.

title: Gorgeous castle, beautiful rooms, amazing service
positive_comment: Amazingly beautiful castle build late 19th century. Each room is different. I stayed in the tower room where you have to climb steep stairs. My friend's room had a private chapel inside the room!! The service was so fantastic.

title: A special unique place to stay, highly recommend a stay in this lovely castle.
positive_comment: This was a special place to stay, the staff were friendly and helpful, we really enjoyed being shown around the castle by the lovely Slovenian lady at reception.  The courtyard for relaxing and dining was lovely, our room was excellent.
negative_comment: Nothing not to like.

positive_comment: Great experience in a castle! Beautiful view and kind staff! Had all rooms equipped with air conditioners, it would be perfect for a summer vacation!
This s place has amazing atmosphere that makes me come back. It’s an unexplainable magic

title: Ein 5Sterne Hotel mit echtem herrlichen Bergblick und Verwöhnen auf höchsten Niveau
positive_comment: Schon der Empfang im Hotel Bergblick war sehr freundlich... man fühlte sich sofort wohl! Gepäck wurde gleich auf das,Zimmer gebracht, wir konnten schon nit der erweiterten Halbpension starten... Das,Essen war wirklich exquisit, jeden Tag konnte man verschiedene Gerichte auswählen; vor allem das Galamenue war wirklich hervorragend! Auch die Zimmer waren sehr modern und ansprechend ausgestattet, in jedem Zimmer hat man den "Bergblick". Wir haben uns seeehr wohl gefühlt! Nicht zu vergessen der inzwischen wieder erweiterte Spabereich... 3 verschiedene Saunen, Dampfbad, Infrarot, Eisbad, Salzgrotte und wunderbare Ruheräume... keine Wünsche blieben offen! Auch die Behandlungen von Mara und Ludwig waren außergewöhnlich! Alles in allem ein Haus, das den 5 Sternen zurecht entspricht! Danke für diese tollen Tage!
negative_comment: Im Service waren fast ausschließlich Bedienungen aus dem Ausland, die immer sehr freundlich waren!. Manchmal kam es zu längeren Wartezeiten... aber das gibt es ja überall! Ehrlich gesagt,  ist dies kein wirklicher Makel... Das Personal war wirklich immer ausgesprochen nett und freundlich!

positive_comment: Alles hat uns gefallen. Die Angestellten sowie der Chef alle super freundlich und zuvorkommend. Und die Küche ist hervorragend. Es gibt nichts aber auch gar nichts zu beanstanden. In diesem Haus wird vieles richtig gemacht . Wir empfehlen zu 100 Prozent weiter
negative_comment: Wir waren leider nur eine Nacht aber wir kommen wieder

positive_comment: Un balcón grande, el sofa cama muy chulo y práctico y 2 teles, una en cada habitación. Y es un buen detalle que haya en la cocina una nevera y congelador aparte del minibar. También había un microhondas, cafetera y tetera.
negative_comment: El baño pequeño y simple.

positive_comment: Bien ubicado a las afueras de la ciudad si llegas con coche. Posiblidad de parking gratuito (si hay sitio). La piscina y las habitaciones muy bien. Personal muy amable en todo momento. El desayuno abundante y variado.

title: Increíble!!!
positive_comment:
El desayuno es muy variado y rico. La piscina temperada y el sauna impecable. El diseño y el mobiliario es moderno.
Le dimos con mi hija un 10!!!
negative_comment: Nada, sólo que está alejado del centro.

title: Rundum zum Wohlfühlen!
positive_comment: Sehr freundliches Personal, mein ursprüngliches Zimmer hat mir nicht gefallen - ein Zimmertausch war sofort und problemlos möglich, das Hotel ist sehr funktionell und durchdacht ausgestattet (zB Ablagen im Bad - wichtig für Brillenträger und leider nicht immer selbstverständlich..., große Kofferablage, Schreibtisch und viel Platz für Kleidung im Zimmer, Schuhputzutensilien in der Lobby, Parkgarage vorhanden wenn benötigt) - alles da, was man braucht :-)
negative_comment: Mein Bett war mir persönlich eine Spur zu hart, aber das ist Geschmacksache

title: Ankommen und Wohlfühlen
positive_comment: Frühstück, Zimmer, Gartenanlage und Wellness sind außergewöhnlich in dieser Preisklasse! 👍

title: Rundum für unseren Aufenthalt perfekt
positive_comment: Das Hotel hat einen außergewöhnlich guten Service, zuvorkommende Mitarberiter, die sich um alles kümmern, Hunde sind auch sehr herzlich willkommen. Das Frühstück bot eine riesige Auswahl, das Abendessen war hervorragend. Die Gänge des Abendmenüs waren hervorragend abgestimmt. Die große Auswahl an Weinen lässt keine Wünsche offen. Der Spa-Bereich sowie der Outdoor-Pool auf dem Dach sind perfekt für eine Auszeit. Wir waren im Herbst da, im Winter nach dem Snowboarden bittet der Spa-Bereich sicherlich noch mehr Erholung vom anstrengenden Snowboard-Tag :) Unser Zimmer war zwar eins der älteren Generation, dennoch super Raumaufteilung, viel Platz, getrenntes Bad und WC.
negative_comment: Unsere Matratze war leider schon etwas durchgelegen. Das hindert uns aber nicht daran, trotzdem die volle Punktzahl zu vergeben. Ansonsten gibt es in keiner Weise etwas an unserem Aufenthalt auszusetzen.

title: Was ist die Steigerung von außergewöhnlich? Genau - herausragend, einzigartig, unübertrefflich!
positive_comment:

title: Relaxing hotel with a lot of potential
positive_comment: The view was amazing, the spa area was really nice and the swimming pond a great addition. The staff was friendly and helpful and the rooms are really big. Overall, we had a very relaxing stay.
negative_comment:
The hotel is marked as a 5-star hotel but on their own website and when we arrived, we could see that it was actually a 4-star hotel. 

The bathroom was weirdly cut and could have been utilised a better - making one room instead of a closed off shower room and a toilet room.
We were a bit disappointed with the food. The quality was really high and the food was delicious, but we had to queue for many things at breakfast and the dinner servings were very small (just remove the buffet and make the actual 3-course meal servings larger). Further, we had to pay for water (except breakfast) as well as coffee in the afternoon for the late lunch/ cake - which should be included. There is also no service at the swimming pond and very limited sun beds and umbrellas. The swimming pond also looked very different than on the pictures - it is probably a mock up before they built it. Finally, the gym was quite small and the ceiling low making it difficult to exercise on the cross trainer when you’re a bit taller. 

If these things were adjusted we would love to come back but it didn’t feel like good value for money as it is.

title: Perfecto
positive_comment:
La habitación, que prácticamente era un mini-departamento, muchos armarios, refrigerador, caja fuerte, un escritorio para trabajar con la laptop. Mi niño de 3 años durmió en una cama extra y seguíamos teniendo mucho espacio libre, el piso completamente alfombrado, con calefacción, en el piso inferior hay un restaurante grande y no hubo olor a comida en la habitación.

El hotel tiene un aparcamiento grande y gratis en el exterior, el aeropuerto de Graz está muy cerca y no escuché ruidos por la noche.

Hasta el centro de la ciudad hay aproximadamente 15-20 minutos porque la velocidad en todo Graz es de 50 kmh.

La recepción fue muy rápida, la habitación se abre con una tarjeta que también sirve para la puerta exterior.

Hay aire acondicionado.

title: Optimale Lage, wenn man vor oder nach  einem Flug vom/ab dem Airport Graz übernachten möchte.
positive_comment: Sehr großes Zimmer mit einem "gläsernen" Badezimmer :) Luxuriöser Massagestuhl mitten im Zimmer, den wir natürlich auch genutzt haben. Sehr gutes asiatisches Restaurant im Erdgeschoss. Wir haben nicht gefrühstückt, da unser Flug sehr früh ging. Gute Lage, etwa  1,3 km vom Flughafen, zu Fuß haben wir etwa 20 Minuten benötigt.

Es war alles super.
Vielen Dank für den Kaffee am morgen der Abreise , auf der Terrasse.
Das Zimmer war schön und das Bett war sehr gemütlich. Das Essen im Restaurant war ausgezeichnet. Das Personal war sehr freundlich.
negative_comment: Leider habe ich wegen dem Straßenlärm schlecht geschlafen

positive_comment: Unterkunft ist Verkehrsgünstig nahe an der Autobahn gelegen. Zimmer modern eingerichtet und alles sehr sauber und gepflegt. Man hat alles was man braucht. Kostenlose Parkplätze vor dem Haus vorhanden. Wifi funktioniert stabil. Self check in auch bei später Anreise per Code am Automaten Problemlos möglich. Sehr gutes Hotel speziell wenn man auf der Durchreise ist. Sehr hilfsbereites Personal. Reibungslose und zügige Kommunikation auch über Email möglich. Alles Bestens, wir kommen gerne wieder.

title: Gutes Hotel, gratis Parken
positive_comment: Das zimmer ist groß und schön eingerichtet. Das Frühstück ist lecker und man kann Abends chinesisch essen. Parkplatz ist gratis.
negative_comment: Die Tür zum Zimmer lies sich nicht verschließen. Kein Lift.

title: Alles bestens
positive_comment: Prima Hotel, bestes Restaurant, ideale Lage und sehr freundliches Personal. Einmaliges Preis- Leistungs-Verhältnis 👍🏻

title: Schönes, helles Zimmer
positive_comment: Das Zimmer war geräumig und das Bad wunderschön. Wir hatten einen Massage Sessel im Zimmer und 2 Türen auf einen großen Balkon mit Sitzgruppe. Das Personal war extrem freundlich.
negative_comment: Der Blick auf einen naturbelassenen  Garten wäre noch schöner gewesen,  wäre der Garten nicht als Müllablagerungsplatz mißbraucht worden.

title: Außergewöhnlich nette Gastgeber und super Essen

Wir mussten um einen Tag verschieben und das war gar kein Problem (kein aufpreis) ...Sehr nett und zu vorkommen

title: Wir kommen wieder.

title: Wie immer ist Graz eine Reise wert

title: Muy buen hotel, pero con demasiados fallos que no compensan el precio pagado.
positive_comment: Un muy buen hotel con todo tipo de servicios. Tiene acceso directo a la Griesbachklamm (estupendo trekking por el río Griesbach) que es buenísimo. Servicio en bar y resto de instalaciones muy bueno, excepto en restaurante. El buffet muy bueno y muy completo. Está relativamente cerca de todo (Kitzbühel, Salzburgo, Zell am See, Baviera, Pilersee, etc). El masajista del último día, Sebastian, muy bueno.
negative_comment: En el spa eché en falta piscina de chorros, duchas escocesas, etc. algunos jacuzzi no funcionaron en toda mi estancia (en 9 días en temporada alta no es normal). El servicio de restaurante lento y aunque la mayoría de los camareros eran muy amables, había una camarera mayor, bastante borde. No me gustó que mi habitación no tuviese buenas vistas. Reclamé nada más verla, pero no es sólo que no hicieran nada para cambiarla, es que ni siquiera contemplaron la posibilidad. El masajista del primer día, Attila, no me hizo caso a nada de lo que le dije que hiciera.

title: Ein 5Sterne Hotel mit echtem herrlichen Bergblick und Verwöhnen auf höchsten Niveau
positive_comment: Schon der Empfang im Hotel Bergblick war sehr freundlich... man fühlte sich sofort wohl! Gepäck wurde gleich auf das,Zimmer gebracht, wir konnten schon nit der erweiterten Halbpension starten... Das,Essen war wirklich exquisit, jeden Tag konnte man verschiedene Gerichte auswählen; vor allem das Galamenue war wirklich hervorragend! Auch die Zimmer waren sehr modern und ansprechend ausgestattet, in jedem Zimmer hat man den "Bergblick". Wir haben uns seeehr wohl gefühlt! Nicht zu vergessen der inzwischen wieder erweiterte Spabereich... 3 verschiedene Saunen, Dampfbad, Infrarot, Eisbad, Salzgrotte und wunderbare Ruheräume... keine Wünsche blieben offen! Auch die Behandlungen von Mara und Ludwig waren außergewöhnlich! Alles in allem ein Haus, das den 5 Sternen zurecht entspricht! Danke für diese tollen Tage!
negative_comment: Im Service waren fast ausschließlich Bedienungen aus dem Ausland, die immer sehr freundlich waren!. Manchmal kam es zu längeren Wartezeiten... aber das gibt es ja überall! Ehrlich gesagt,  ist dies kein wirklicher Makel... Das Personal war wirklich immer ausgesprochen nett und freundlich!

positive_comment: Alles hat uns gefallen. Die Angestellten sowie der Chef alle super freundlich und zuvorkommend. Und die Küche ist hervorragend. Es gibt nichts aber auch gar nichts zu beanstanden. In diesem Haus wird vieles richtig gemacht . Wir empfehlen zu 100 Prozent weiter
negative_comment: Wir waren leider nur eine Nacht aber wir kommen wieder

title: Amazing workers,  amazing hotel!
positive_comment: The hotel rooms are amazing - we stayed in the Room 28 - with the balcony.  Room is really comfortable, clean, with very big and comfortable bed. Receptionist  was kind and she managed to give us room with the balcony immediately upon are kind ask.   Cleaning ladies were also amazing - room each day was exceptionally clean and in order.  Overall hotel has professional staff, amazing breakfast and variety of food at the breakfast, beautiful swimming pool with sauna - and overall we had exceptional stay.  This is our third stay at the hotel.  We are highly recommending this hotel. If you come - you will have unforgettable stay.  For people who love shopping - hotel is only 5 minutes far from the biggest shopping center in Seiersberg.   Thank you!!  I am attaching photos of the beautiful garden which is as beautiful as each detail in this hotel.
negative_comment: Everything was perfect.

title: A wonderful experience and top-notch service; we will certainly return.
positive_comment: The accommodation was very pleasant, and the room was spacious and impeccably clean. We would especially like to praise your excellent breakfast and the helpful staff who were up to the task. The pool is very charming, while the sauna is excellent and provides quality relaxation.
negative_comment: The only minor downside is the high occupancy of the parking lot. Upon arrival, it can be challenging to find a free parking spot before the check-in itself or before gaining access to the garage, which causes some difficulties.

title: Wonderful hospitality and perfect stopover
positive_comment:
We only stayed one night at Weinrefugium Brolli on our way down to Croatia, but that was more than enough to experience the charm and warmth of this lovely hotel. From the moment we arrived, the hospitality was outstanding – genuinely welcoming and attentive.

Our room was spacious, modern, and offered stunning views over the vineyards – a perfect place to unwind.

Dinner was a true highlight, with fantastic food and excellent wine pairing recommendations that really elevated the experience.

All in all, a memorable short stay – we would love to come back for a longer visit!

The hotel is pristine! Super clean and perfectly kept.
The view is stunning from all sides of the property.
The kitchen is fantastic and the staff are very helpful and welcoming.

Everything from the staff esp Christina to the housekeeping team and the entire staff just felt like family. I felt home away from home! Not something we experience everyday. Thank you for making our stay so memorable. We will surely return soon again!
Everything was perfect! From the staff until the breakfast! We will come back for sure.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: A comfortable and hassle-free stay from arrival to departure.
positive_comment:
We arrived late in the evening, but the check-in process was smooth and very quick. The staff was friendly and helpful, which made our arrival stress-free despite the late hour.

The rooms were quiet, clean, and well maintained. Everything was tidy and comfortable, allowing us to rest properly after a long journey.

Parking was available and well organized, which was very convenient for us. Overall, we had a pleasant stay and would definitely recommend this hotel to others.

Saubere, moderne und gepflegte Zimmer, traumhafte Lage in den Weinbergen, professionelles und herzliches Personal, innenpool und Sauna!

title: Herzliche Gastfreundschaft & rundum erholsamer Aufenthalt
positive_comment: Wir durften früher anreisen und dadurch den Wellnessbereich bereits den ganzen Tag nutzen sowie das Zimmer früher beziehen. Das Zimmer war sehr sauber und geräumig. Frau Brolli hat uns persönlich und sehr herzlich empfangen – man merkt sofort, dass ein Familienunternehmen mit viel Gastfreundschaft dahintersteht. Auch das Frühstück war sehr lecker und wir wurden von allen immer freundlich begrüsst. In der Nähe gibt es zudem schöne Spazierwege und falls das Gasthaus geschlossen hat, erhält man tolle Empfehlungen zum Essen gehen. Für uns ganz klar 10/10 – wir kommen gerne wieder.
negative_comment: Einziger kleiner Minuspunkt: Die Fensterläden schliessen nicht ganz komplett – entweder Schlafmaske mitnehmen oder etwas früher aufstehen 😉

title: Absolut Top
positive_comment: Alles! Von der genialen Aussicht bis zur tollen Matratze und separater Toilette
negative_comment: Ich habe nichts zu kritisieren

title: Auszeit mitten im Weinberg
positive_comment: Wir hatten einen sehr angenehmen Aufenthalt. Das Zimmer war groß (vor allem das Badezimmer), sauber und bot einen tollen Blick über die Weinberge. Besonders hervorzuheben ist das sehr gute Frühstück sowie die herzliche, familiengeführte Atmosphäre. Man merkt, dass sich alle sehr bemühen, die Gäste willkommen zu heißen und einen schönen Aufenthalt zu ermöglichen – was man bei diesem Preis allerdings auch erwarten darf.

Gepflegtes, hochwertiges Ambiente mit großzügigen Zimmern. Alles wirkt sehr sauber. Man merkt, dass es sich um ein familiengeführtes Haus handelt. Ausgezeichnetes Frühstück mit toller Auswahl und hochwertigen Produkten. Personal fragt am Tisch freundlich nach Interesse an verschiedenen Ei-Gerichten und die Chefin verteilt gebackene "Mäuse" (noch warm) als Kostprobe. Tolles Frühstücks-Erlebnis!
negative_comment: Die Wartezeit beim Abendessen haben wir als Grenzwertig empfunden. Die Weinkarte könnte zudem umfangreicher sein - es ist uns schwer gefallen, einen passablen österreichischen Rotwein zu finden, der nicht direkt 100 Euro oder mehr kostet.

title: Erholung mitten in den Weinbergen !
positive_comment: Wunderbare Lage mit Blick über die Weinberge! Sehr schöne Zimmer und bequeme Betten! Von Vorteil ist auch die Klimaanlage… es war rundherum auch sehr ruhig und man kann die Natur genießen 😌
negative_comment: Leider hat das Angebot beim Frühstück etwas nachgelassen … aber es war alles frisch und geschmacklich sehr gut.

positive_comment:
Der Service war traumhaft. Bei Fragen immer Auskunft und Empfehlungen erhalten. 
Die Lage ist traumhaft.

title: Wir waren vollends zufrieden..

negative_comment: Wasserkocher auf dem Zimmer wäre schön..

positive_comment:
Sehr freundliche Mitarbeiter

title: Riesengroße und schöne Anlage mit freundlichem Gastgeber :-)
positive_comment: Wir waren auf der Durchreise von Deutschland in den Urlaub in den Süden. Da bot sich eine Zwischenübernachtung an. Von der Autobahn abgefahren sind es ein paar Kilometer, aber mit dem Auto stellt das kein Problem dar. Es handelt sich um ein familien (Inhaber-) geführtes Hotel. Uns hat die Größe der Anlage schlicht überrascht. Riesig. Die Zimmer und die Anlage sind auf dem neuesten Stand, sehr sauber, sehr ordentlich. Der Inhaber empfing uns fröhlich und höflich und hatte für alle Gäste ein nettes Wort. Auch unser Hund war gern gesehen.
negative_comment: An diesem Abend (einem Feiertag) war das Restaurant leider nicht geöffnet, das wussten wir nicht und daher mussten wir uns noch einmal ins Auto setzen und etwas suchen. Schade, wir hätten uns gern an die Bar gesetzt oder im Restaurant gegessen.

title: Super Zwischenstop - super Lage, sehr nette Gastgeber, großzügiges Zimmer
positive_comment:
Super nette Gastgeber, sehr tierfreundlich und trotz Feiertags und eigentlich geschlossener Küche haben wir noch ein kleines Abendessen im Restaurant bekommen. 
Super gelegen für Durchreisen, nahe Autobahn und trotzdem ruhig. Sehr erholsam

title: Großes, gut ausgestattetes Zimmer, sehr hundefreundlich 😄

positive_comment: The layout of this hotel was very good. It had a kind of motel feeling. The restaurant was separate from the rooms area. There were covered areas outside with tables and chairs for inclement weather as well as a roof sunning area with sun loungers. This location is suitable for groups of people and the food was good and plentiful.
negative_comment: There was nothing that we did not like. We were travelling by private car but we did notice taxi and minibus service with groups. Not sure how easy it would be to get there using public transport.

title: Schloss Gamlitz is a lovely stay

title: Wonderful hospitality and perfect stopover
positive_comment:
We only stayed one night at Weinrefugium Brolli on our way down to Croatia, but that was more than enough to experience the charm and warmth of this lovely hotel. From the moment we arrived, the hospitality was outstanding – genuinely welcoming and attentive.

Our room was spacious, modern, and offered stunning views over the vineyards – a perfect place to unwind.

Dinner was a true highlight, with fantastic food and excellent wine pairing recommendations that really elevated the experience.

All in all, a memorable short stay – we would love to come back for a longer visit!

The hotel is pristine! Super clean and perfectly kept.
The view is stunning from all sides of the property.
The kitchen is fantastic and the staff are very helpful and welcoming.

Everything from the staff esp Christina to the housekeeping team and the entire staff just felt like family. I felt home away from home! Not something we experience everyday. Thank you for making our stay so memorable. We will surely return soon again!
Everything was perfect! From the staff until the breakfast! We will come back for sure.
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment: Amazing Hotel, beautiful setting, super helpful and friendly staff, well designed modern rooms, fabulous place!
Amazing place. Wonderful location. Delicious food. Lovely staff. Highly recommended!

The hotel has a great location with beautiful views. Our room (and the entire hotel) was spotlessly clean and spacious. The staff was very friendly and helpful. We very much enjoyed the breakfast which had a huge selection and nice coffee. The wellness area and sauna were really good as well. Their wines are delicious, too. We are happy that we spent 2 nights here  and will be back in the future.
negative_comment: We were not 100% satisfied with the restaurants' starters and dessert selection as for such a great place we had a bit better expectation but still loved the place.

positive_comment: The location is great and the views from the hotel absolutely gorgeous. The pool and breakfast set up are amazing as well.
negative_comment: Upon arrival, we were handed the key to our room, were not even taken to the room, asked whether we needed help with luggage or given any information about breakfast, wifi etc. We also found out upon arrival that the restaurant and spa were closed for the days we were there. Overall we felt like we were bothering when asking questions to the receptionist. Also a few extra sunbeds by the pool would've been nice to avoid having to lie on the floor. Finally the cleaning could have been done a bit more thoroughly. I did find the place gorgeous and the setting incredible, however the service did not live up to a 4* hotel in my opinion.
