I didn’t mind this for food & drink given the quality, but it was going to cost €40 to wash a gym top and shorts - I asked the hotel if there was any flexibility on that and they said they’d check with housekeeping, but never got back to me.

positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, spa and views. Staff were so lovely too. Such a gorgeous place to celebrate my 40th birthday
negative_comment: The spa needed to be tidied more frequently

title: Possibly the most tranquil place we’ve ever visited
positive_comment: Yes it’s an expensive hotel, but the attention to detail and friendliness of the staff is probably the best I have experienced. The lake views and surroundings make it such a special place. The spa was beautiful and whilst treatments were expensive, again the service was amazing.
negative_comment: The lighting system in the room was a little overcomplicated, but this was a minor detail. Everything else was first class

title: Definitely to be tried again , is a hidden gem
positive_comment: Settings are amazing , pictures , decoration Interio design simply perfect
negative_comment: Location far from anything

positive_comment:
Marvelous scenery, service , rooms , spa . just  great.
We got excellent service from evryone but would like to mention sebastian the consierge and the waiters  samuel and luca.
negative_comment: No such thing.

title: The perfect escape
positive_comment: Everything. This is a beautiful hotel in a stunning location

This property is stunning!!!  Impeccable service, excellent food, beautiful spa.
We stayed in this hotel for many years before it became a Rosewood hotel.
It was wonderful back then, and now with the new renovation and team, it has become a dream!

title: The perfect Christmas getaway
positive_comment: A truly wonderful Christmas stay. The service was impeccable and the location and ambiance amazing. Food quality was very good and gym and wellness area first class. We look forward to coming back soon. Regards
negative_comment: Non applicable it was great!

title: Hoping to return to this exceptional welcoming piece of paradise
positive_comment:
The food was exceptional.   Staff was friendly.  
It was fine dining and service

title: Great hotel with 5 star quality & service
positive_comment: Fantastic breakfast with a wide variety of choices & all fresh juices etc. Bar & lounge excellent. Location was so close to everything. Staff were all so lovely & helpful 10/10 experience!!! Would definitely return

title: If there is a God, he/she will let us return to this wee slice of Eden again one day.
positive_comment: Everything. The facilities, quirky decor, spa, pool, service, breakfast, incredible meals, sitting by the fire in the beautiful bar, your skis and boots sitting ready for you in morning, the free popcorn machine and candy stall in the foyer, the real fire in the room  and the balcony with a Mountain View. Did I mention the staff? This beautiful team of people are incredible. It’s a very rare thing to see such professionalism delivered without an inch of stiffness and a genuinely warm and friendly manner. Not just from one or two, but every single person on the staff.
negative_comment: They ran out of candy bananas on my last day, but tbf, substituted them for strawberry snakes.

title: Obsługa robi klimat tego miejsca
positive_comment: Lokalizacja, obsługa przemiła i pomocna , smaczne jedzenie .
Staff were exceptional.  Property had a nice traditional ski village atmosphere.
negative_comment: No in room temperature control…had to open windows…then hear partiers coming home at 3 am.

title: Amazing
positive_comment:
Kind staff, clean, near everything!!! 
Just love it

title: I would stay again
positive_comment: Good location and helpful staff.  Didn’t eat in restaurant but bar food good.
negative_comment: A couple of issues with room on arrival. Safe not working, sink stopper stuck and room phone not working.  All issues were resolved by next day

title: One of the best hotel stays
positive_comment: Hotel personnel was extremely helpful, they noticed my daughter is not feeling well and and offered at their wn initiative to prepare the room couple of hours prior to checking in time. It was very unexpected and helpful on their behalf.

title: Great value- a cut above Sheratons I have stayed in other cities.
positive_comment:
Reception staff provided an outstanding service.
Hotel location is perfect for access to Mirabell and easy walking distance to old town.

title: Super comfortable and great location
positive_comment: Very well appointed with a great shower and super comfortable large double bed.
negative_comment: They take a long time to release the hold on one’s credit card which is annoying and blocks our ability to use some of our travel funds on the next leg of our trip.

title: Excelent venue. Very friendly staff. Not cheap but worth the money spent.
positive_comment: Most of the experience was really really good. The staff tried to accomodate our needs even when some mistakes were made, they were rectified immediately
negative_comment: The menu in the restaurant was not good enough and did not have plenty of options. The staff in the bar was pressuring all the time not allowing us to relax

positive_comment: The room with the balcony is the best value.. close to many places.
negative_comment: There was a noise in the shower room that they couldn't fix, they offered to change to a room with a balcony for an additional fee. We insisted on not paying and it took a while before they agreed to move us free of charge.

title: Absolutely Amazing! Loved this hotel!
positive_comment: This hotel is absolutely amazing! It is luxurious, comfortable, close to the centre, cosy and relaxing to stay in. Staff is very welcoming and ready to help, whether it's reception or restaurant staff. They are so polite and happily ready to serve with a genuine smile. I wish I could stay longer at this hotel. However I will definetley be back to Salzburg and will not look for any other accommodation, except this hotel to stay with my family!!

title: Hotel was first class operation. Skiing mediocre on account of foggy weather.
positive_comment: breakfast was high end buffet style with grill and omelette station. Not ski in ski out however very accommodating shuttle. great access to main street and to transit
negative_comment: Town atmosphere and charm is lacking. Restaurant choices limited as to varied cuisine.
